Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We had 3 in a room which meant a couch bed which didn t provide much room But it catered for us so we didn t mind   Location was great very easy to navigate around London from here Room was clean and value for money

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Free water at every floor Everything needed was in the room including usb charging great if you are travelling from another country with different plugs Room is big even though we had a small room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Can t think of anything perfect   The hotel exceeded all of our expectations excellent location beautiful well equipped bedroom with so many extras like free coffee drinking water and bottles fridge and microwave

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Walls a bit thin noticed some doors closing   Warm welcome at the front desk very elegant lounge with coffee newspapers etc on offer TV and PC areas Room pleasant and quiet well equipped gym Great location near Monument station local restaurants and pubs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Staff at check in were fairly abrupt and not very welcoming Room small   good location room fine for a nights stay Free water and teas Easy checkin and was able to check in early

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: A few of the staff could have been much much friendlier The majority were amazing though  The hotel was very luxurious for such an amazing price in central London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Breakfast is an option in an adjoining basement restaurant it s an Argentinian steak restaurant Didn t like it very dark but lots of alternatives nearby   Close to Central and Northern lines Fastest procedure ever for checking in and out Very good room well equipped for business or leisure tourist Nice lounge area with newspapers and coffee machines You can walk to Globe theatre Tate Modern St Paul s Tower of London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Sadly the bed was lumpy and very uncomfortable It s a shame as this is the most important feature to us when staying in a hotel They let themselves down by skimping on this   Nice hotel in a good good location and excellent access to the Tube Friendly staff clean decent sized room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing   Extremeley polite and helpful staff Position to where we attending a wedding reception Leadenhall Market Comfortable and clean Interconnecting door with Wetherspoons next door

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very modern room lovely comfortable bed Excellent shower Slept very well and quiet considering the location in the heart of the city Excellent for a one night stay but would be good for a weekend break

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The heating cooler facilities in the room weren t fantastic It was quite hot and the cooler wasn t very good maybe installation of AC in the future would be good   Comfortable beds with extra pillows extra that maybe needed located in a cupboard on each floor Location was good 5 min walk between Bank and Liverpool St tube stations Polo Bar about 5 min walk away open 24hrs for fantastic food Small Shop nearby but also Vending Machine facilities within the hotel if you need a quick snack

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There s one person on reception he is Sikh his attitude is so cold When you enter he never gives any smile Rest of the staff is very nice and friendly   Everything was perfect

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I had a steak sandwich whilst the steak was tender it was insipid very pale No colour just like it had been defrosted in a microwave not nice at all considering the price and steak restaurant on the premises

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The fact that having hanging space in the room cost extra   Excellent location We liked the a coffee machine and fresh fruit in the foyer Checking in and out was fast and efficient

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It felt like a dormitory not a hotel and check out took ages despite the fact we had pre paid perhaps if our invoice had been slipped under our door that would have been one less person in the enormous queue Also having coming back after a lovely evening and dinner the staff on duty were curt and uninterested when we asked where we could get a nightcap and the information was wrong   Location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room little bit small   The location is good easy to reach everywhere is the city by public transportation or with walking distance Provide coffee tea snacks fruit in the lobby which is nice

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Everything was great value for money I couldn t think of anything that would have put a dampener on our trip   The location was great the hotel also provide a mini fridge and coffee maker in reception all of which were complimentary That really gave it an added extra

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The kitchenette was really just a sink and a microwave which was a bit limiting for meal preparation   The central location and proximity to tube stations and the centre of London was great

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing we had an amazing stay   This hotel was amazing there was a water bottle filling station in the hall and they allowed early check in free of charge since it was our first stay Can t recommend them enough Best hotel in London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: This particular hotel was in the heart of the business district so there weren t many restaurants or cafes open at night Things shut down early in this neighborhood Transportation however was good and fast so it was easy to get around Its a great location for business but less so for tourism I will stay at this hotel again but will choose another of its London locations  I stayed in this hotel for six nights so I got a chance to really settle in It was a wonderful stay I must say There were wonderful complimentary perks provided daily Downstairs in the lobby one could always find free newspapers coffee and tea cookies fruit snacks water bottles with purified water umbrellas for rainy days All of these things were provided for all guests everyday It was wonderful to come back tired and find a nice cookie and a warm cup of tea or coffee The internet was fast and easy and the staff was friendly and always helpful I really will stay in Club Quarters Hotels again It was excellent value for the price

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No mirror wardrobe hairdryer in room Bedroom doors close extremely slowly   Easy check in and check out Complimentary drinks and snacks Good location for business

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Check in was a little confusing as it was all automated There was a member of staff but she wasn t overly helpful   The bed was extremely comfortable The complimemtary drink selection was very good A great idea to have empty plastic bottles and a chilled water dispenser on each floor of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I didn t like that the view I had was two walls I also didn t find the bed at all comfy they re rock solid   Love the staff they were pleasant and helpful I also loved the room especially the shower

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Really nothing to complain about   The location was good shop s around clothes shops restaurants etc Plus we are fans of Chelsea Football team it was good because being that far away from Fulham Broadway the Underground District line from the monument to Fulham Broadway no hassle of seating fantastic location for this hotel everything was spot on Looking forward to stay there again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The price was fantastic for a hotel in the City Couldn t find a light bite as the Gaucho Restaurant was a little full on and busy for me on my own and all cafes in area closed after hours But can t complain

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The hotel is in a great location close to main attractions and the tube There are plenty of bars and bistros around and Tesco round the corner I recommend sandwiches from Dilieto Deli on Fleet Street The room was clean and comfortable very quiet extremely comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room very stuffy decor a bit dark and depressing Lounge depicted is basically just a few chairs off the lobby not a dedicated area where you could really work or socialise was disappointed by this   Location convenient for certain things interesting lobby decor helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Left a pair of trainers in my room when I checked out my fault but were not found by housekeeping   Great location Bed and Pillows very comfortable Breakfast was very nice Clean Fast check in and checkout

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It did get a little noisy at night later in the week from voices carrying outside especially towards the weekend which was surprising since the whole area is pretty empty after 7pm on weekdays and pretty empty the whole time on the weekend a bit like how Wall Street gets in New York Also it was pretty hot at night if you don t ask them to keep the air conditioning on they turn it off every night in your room   I m 25 this was my first business trip alone and my first time to London I was a guest here for 8 days and my office was right around the corner It was a convenient location near a lot of tube stops it was very clean bed was comfortable workout area was clean and I loved the free printing for my plane ticket and free water bottles Overall I had a great experience

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room service was shocking It took 1hr and 25mins to get room service delivered That was after 4phone calls to ask where it was and be told three times it s on it s way to be then told it hasn t been cooked at all and was on the grill When it turned up the order was incomplete chips were cold and the chicken having allegedly just come of a grill was all dried up At that stage because it was 9 20pm I didn t have the energy to complain or ask for it to be replaced Terrible terrible terrible service and food NEVER AGAIN

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: At night could hear when guests in nearby rooms were using the shower and bathroom   Location is ideal for working in the city Great little extras like complimentary soft drink cans and fruit in the lobby and bottled water on the floors

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: no staff so I cannot say if they are nice or not checkin and checkout is fully automated it is not particularly clean especially the bathroom the stay was not bad but it also was not good it was average   location rooms adequate

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very good location in Insurance business cluster The metro station is nearby The hotel itself is cosy Nice snacks 24 7 in the lobby The room was clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Extra pillows would have been nice but I m been picky   Reception staff excellent room had everything we needed great location quiet at weekends but walk towards Liverpool st Station and plenty bars restaurants to choose from

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bit confusing with the charge deposit they add on during check in Had a few issues with getting money back but got resolved eventually   Really impressed with the price for the quality of the stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Wireless disconnected all the time fridge had still the old bottles from former guests in it there was a hair on the toilet we booked for three but only had two sets of toothbrush glasses hand towels and toiletries   The lounge was good including free coffee

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Gym was small and too warm The treadmills were ancient and their surface was uneven was like running over broken bricks   Location was good hotel was amazingly clean and well appointed Bed was very comfortable Free filter water stations were nice Excellent lounge

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The bed covering blanket had a few stains  All extra services are a good value beauty products complimentary water coffee tea gym TV with movie channels very large and quite room with large bathroom extremely well located and very convenient

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about however this hotel is located in the business district of London and may not suit all It was disappointing that the added treats in the lounge were not available on the weekend   The lounge was enjoyable during the week days when there is access to newspapers nibbles and fruit The coffee machine in the lounge delivers good coffee The microwave in the room was useful The location was convenient for us It is close to Monument station and the Thames is only a short walk away The view from the room window took in the Gerkin the Shard and the Walkie talkie Leadenhall Market is just across the road and is very picturesque Wi fi is good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Dusty rooms and did not look like the pictures on the website  Very nice location in the middle of the city and clost to monument and bank underground stations

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Shower needed an upgrade Room nice size but bed cramped in corner   Very clean great location Nice complimentary toiletries Overall good place to stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bad noise during the night causing disruption to our sleep The neighbour appeared to be having a bedroom party at all hours while slamming their door Felt afraid to say anything No hairdryer in the room as advertised   Complementary toiletries and water very tasteful and accessible very clean and well decorated bed was comfortable there was free coffee in the reception

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room was not wide enough for the bed so it was a challenge to get out of bed Mattress was cheap so restful sleep was not an option A laughably hiked price of 17 pp for breakfast was an option we did not take   Shower was really big and the water pressure was very good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very quick and easy to check in and out all the staff were very nice and friendly the location was perfect for my meeting and also for some sight seeing just wish I could of stayed longer

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Maybe 2 pillows and a softer one but apart from that everything was fine   The location was very good especially for the Tower of London St Pauls Tower Bridge etc and lots of good eating places across the bridge Would use this location again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Cannot recommend this hotel more Booked it as part of a surprise trip for my father s 70th birthday and the staff were fantastic great communication prior to our stay and they happily accommodated a couple of small requests I had They also provided a welcome basket and a bottle of wine I m not sure if this is standard practise or due to the special occasion but it was a nice touch all the same Room was lovely large clean and nicely decorated Location is excellent for getting around London Bank station is a 5 min walk and has great connections to the rest of the city Walking distance to London Bridge St Paul s Cathedral and a number of other attractions The immediate area is very quiet over the weekend not many restaurants bars open so you will have to venture a little further afield As it s the business district Friday night was very lively with local workers but the area seems to shut down Saturday Sunday There is a Wetherspoons right next door to the hotel which does reasonable food and is open every day Overall a fantastic stay I will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It s abit dated Cleanliness is not there You could tell the carpet and duvet needs a thorough clean The toilet design needs an upgrade So are the doors of the closet and the toilet the tables in the room are all dated   The facilities gym ice free water coffee and tea

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: for a 4 star hotel I had expected a minibar and a rack to place the suitcase on insulation of the room could be better noise from the corridor was sometimes to hear  Nice big room even with a little view friendly staff water bottle station with chilled water on each level free drinks in the lobby coffee water

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: found it strange there was not hair dryer in our room We did look for it but could not find it anywhere so we assume it was not provided   air conditioning in the rooms was amazing the bathroom facilities were nice and check in and check out process was so fast and streamlined very impressed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I like to sleep fairly high so asked for an extra pillow was told they didn t have any Air con was very noisy The room described as Queen sized must have been one of those really small queens But apart from that much like any travel lodge style hotel nothing special but ok for a stay in central London   It was adequate and a great location handy for London Bridge and attractions

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There needs to be a mirror over the desk writing area so one can see oneself when using said hairdryer The full length mirror round the corner doesn t do the job at all   very convenient for my visit I liked the coffee machine and complimentary snack bars and fruit and access to water Good to have professional grade of hairdryer

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There could have been more staff Checking in and out there was a long line and only one staff member trying to help There were computers for check in but I prefer the human experience to the automated one Again probably best for a business trip but fine if you re booking last minute and there aren t many affordable options left in central London   It was a very nice clean hotel I think it would be perfect for a business trip Close to the underground and right in the financial district Staff were helpful luggage storage was convenient I thought it was a great price for the quality and being fairly centrally located

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Lovely Hotel great value for money It is walking distance from most sightseeing attractions Our stay was very comfortable Loved the fact that we could get purified water for free

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Once the cleaning service didn t change towels   Location is excellent Inside the hotel is very beautiful Staff was helpful and friendly There were free snacks nachos and walkers cookies and water

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: A room for 3 people and a kitchen with 2 knives 2 glasses and 1 fork A double bed with only one bedside table Bedside lamps that didn t work Dirty drip marks down the woodwork and you don t want to know how horrible under the bed was I dropped my glasses down the back of the bed due to the lack of a bedside table and had to crawl under the bed to retrieve them The phone was unplugged so I had to charge it up to use it Finally on arrival we couldn t even nap due to the bagging on the wall behind our bed by workmen   The location and the air con

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Don t prepay 17 for breakfast if the option comes up when booking it costs less when you just order from the menu when you are there   Convenient location for the City of London for meetings comfortable room and pleasant staff happy to help with any questions

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There needs to be a clearer arrangement between booking com and the hotel on breakfast We booked breakfast with our booking paying 17 for a full English breakfast but found that there was not a full English breakfast on offer for this amount There is also a lack of flexibility in the breakfast offering This is not a comment on the quality of the food which is good but the the lack of clarity on booking

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Our room had a window but opposite to that was a wall So no sunlight or view The room had a slight odour like someone had smoked in there Tho location was pretty central in the city of london but the nicer eestaurants etc are somewhere else Maybe better suited for business trips At the check out it turned out that the hotel restaurant tried to charge us something we didn t order That got sorted out after a while Then my card didn t work the first time the receptionist tried it and he started asking if we had enough money The situation was pretty awkward The third time the card worked fine who knows what the proplem was All in all I wouldn t recommend this hotel You can find better for this money   Quite a clean hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing   The kitchen facilities available including a fridge The tea coffee lounge The free filter water and bottles provided to fill and take with you The air conditioning in the rooms The bed was super comfy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: This is the first time for us to be in UK and this is the first hotel of our trip The location is really good and there is a subway station nearby which gives a lot of convenience

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No complaints The hotel provided adequately for my needs   I booked a suite for myself and two adult daughters as we were attending a family wedding in the City The suite was very spacious had a kitchenette with fridge and microwave and was really like home away from home for the weekend we stayed It was more than adequate for our needs The hotel is in a great location for anyone who wants to take advantage of City sights and above all it is very good value for money Don t be fooled by the small check in desk The hotel provides for all your needs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very small reception area no place to just sit and relax and very small basic rooms Just felt like a budget hotel   Fairly good location although a good cab ride or long walk from Shoreditch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: This does not feel like checking into a normal hotel No customer service what so ever barely acknowledged that I was a customer standing in front of them at check in I asked to have extra pillows delivered to my room and they told me to collect them in a guest closet myself on the floor I was staying on There was nothing in the guest closet except 1 iron so that wasn t very helpful   The bed was comfortable but the room was a bit worn Nothing special

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No Parking as there was a P symbol on the hotel features list we assumed there was Yes there is parking but only public parking and not too close I had emailed the hotel the day before about this to check but received no response I emailed the manager this morning and again no response I would not have booked if I had known website is misleading   Location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No hairdryer in the room Gap in bathroom door fine of you are a solo traveller but not if you have company   Location was good 10 min stroll to main tube and train station Refreshments in lobby were nice

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The first room smelled like cigarette and the window didn t close They offered me a second room which didn t have a sofa and whose bathroom doesn t works correctly You have to pull hard to make it flush I am sure my booking included a bathtub but after the check in even the image of the room changed so I couldn t complain   Limpieza

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Not many places open in the surrounding area near hotel at weekends you do need to travel to a different part of the city for entertainment  Near the subway easy access to London city centre

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Gym was rather paltry   Chilled water readily available on each level near the lifts with plastic bottles was amazing for filling up before heading out

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Prices are still extortionate That s London for you   Good location just ten minutes from Liverpool street Really comfy beds and helpful staff Fast wifi and good coffee downstairs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: a little expensive compares to other club quarters in other countries   perfect location free coffee and snacks in the lobby good baggage service two elevators

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There were self service check in and out desks which made the entry and exit feel impersonal The carpet was dreadful and the spoons for tea were plastic stirrers cheap disposable The view was another building   Bed was comfortable and the shower had good water pressure Liked the midday checkout

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Didn t like the tiny dark reception   Location very safe on the weekend when travelling with a child very easy to reach underground Hotel very quiet and low key

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The room were poor standards bed was uncomfortable and only one pillow no extra in cupboard  The restaurant makes this a 4 star and the lobby looks nice

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The hotel facilities for food although we knew that when we booked   The location was excellent for the Tower of London St Paul s Cathedral the Thames walk Opposite Leadenhall Market where there was a lot going on except at the week end Fairly quiet for London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing major More milk portions in room please   Location for us was perfect Central for all places of interest from Whitechapel to Westminster Liked that it s in a quieter part of the city Elegant and stylish use of a magnificent building Free WiFi and complimentary tea coffee in lounge

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No shower cap breakfast came up as 17 on our on line booking but was in fact miles cheaper  Free water on all levels hot drinks in lobby location ease of booking in polite staff nice toiletries good value breakfast QUIET at night

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Had little contact with staff but didn t give them top marks because when I arrived the person on duty seemed a little perfunctory She explained whatever I needed to know but it was all done quickly with little warmth Otherwise excellent  Complimentary drinks and papers in lounge Room facilities excellent

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Kettle in the room switch was faulty But a minor inconvenience otherwise superb  Excellent location Accommodation of a very high standard very impressed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I had trouble choosing just egg sausage bacon mushrooms beans on the breakfast menu although they did mostly facilitate my requirements when I asked   Very comfortable and all the good things above

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room was fine bed comfy shower glorious Tea coffee milk etc freely available Water fountains with bottles are an excellent idea Proximity to Liverpool St station 7 min walk for train to Stansted Airport

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I didn t find anything I was unhappy with  The location is brilliant beside Leadenhall Market The bedroom was large clean and well equipped for preparing for meetings with desk etc

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Dated decor   Great location Room had dated decor but claen and all facilities were there Ironing board iron hair dryer desk fridge and small kitchnette All very useful Great free coffee purified water availabe on all floors

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Informed you before our visit that it was my wife s birthday on the 25th No offer of a complimentary anything which was very disappointing Hotels in past have always done something to make the day special   Location good Room small Shower not bath and not informed of No mirror at the dressing table Hotel room Door would close on a spring with a very loud bang No discount offered to eat in the hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The hotel is in the financial district close to the Thaimes and some main stations However this area is pretty dead in the weekend There is no threshold in the shower so the bathroom floor is totally wet after a shower   Quiet and comfortable rooms and fast internet

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Large room but strangely it wasn t well designed bed was right up against window could only easily get in from one side or end Couldn t easily see tv from bed Cupboard door opened out in front of desk Only one lift working   Huge very comfortable bed good shower Comfortable chairs in lobby lounge with complimentary tea coffee and iced water As the breakfasts were expensive we went next door where there is a Wetherspoons who do good basic fare served promptly Convenient for Monument tube just a short walk

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Perfect location the resturant downstairs gaucho was just lovely fab setting great staff and wonderfull food also there was a pub just outside our window and we couldnt hear a thing with the sound proof sliding glass

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Breakfast was very expensive especially when you consider there is a Weatherspoons next door offering breakfast for a quarter of the price  The staff were friendly room was clean and an ideal location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Staff not very personal approachable open and friendly   The location is perfect Central and close to the metro station Lots to do in the surrounding area of the hotel as well

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The reception was possibly the worst I have encountered not only because is was in a cubby hole but it was the least welcoming It was all about taking the money There was no smile no welcome and no explanation for example of breakfast or how to use the life For your information you need to use your key card in there in case they don t tell you First impressions are so important and for that reason it had a big impact on the stay   The breakfast was querky with a south American twist I think I actually quite liked it The room was clean and OK

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing  The bed was very comfortable room great size had everything to make A comfortable stay in the foyer coffee machine iced water soft drinks all free nice staff great value for London underground close bank and monument would come back

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No parking but that s London   Quick check in excellent friendly staff top restaurant beautiful rooms with large beds very clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The lighting in the room was not practical one switch turned on all of the lights in the room so when I went to bed my husband and son had to sit in the dark in the separate living area otherwise I would have a bright light above my bed if they switched the lights on Nothing luxurious about the furnishing or fittings in the room bathroom but simple functional and clean Because it is in the business district most nearby shops are shut on the weekends but comes back to life on weekdays   We upgraded to a room where the queen bed was partitioned from the living room This gave more room for my son s extra bed in the living area the triple room with queen sofa bed was too cramped for the 3 of us Purified water available on each floor and snacks down in the lobby lounge in the afternoon were convenient but simple

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It s clearly a hotel that caters for the business traveller predominantly But sadly with no sanitary disposal equipment in the bathroom there s a worrying assumption that city guests are male only Very disappointing   Proximity to Shard London Bridge and City sights

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing Only one lift was working but this is because the other was being repaired   The helpful staff the room was very clean very quiet the shower Air con coffee machine at reception

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: As the hotel is located in the business district most of the shops and bars are shut or close early Keep this in mind when booking Our room backed onto the alley at the back of the hotel which was very noisy plus the room next door had a problem with the pipes making a loud noise every time the toilet was flushed This led to a sleepless night   The location is great to get around London The ease of check in and out was great The room was basic no fridge but the small queen was a good size and was ok for one night

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Cleaning wasn t brilliant somebody had left a sock under the bed and it was still there and very dusty which is an indicator No food available apart from outsourced room service we arrived quite late so this was a bit of a problem   Free bottled water efficient check in and check out Good location but a very quiet area in the morning so you could easily get there from further afield before anything got going Leadenhall Market almost opposite is nice

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We were in the City for a wedding this hotel was centrally located and fuss free from the moment we arrived It had everything we needed great spot if you re looking for a hotel as a base to tour around at weekends and quieter than the West End for sleeping

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: When we arrived we got greeted and asked for a card to take just in case they needed it so my partner gave them his debit card they said we won t take any money from this it s just a incase anything happens so he gave his card and we went to our room We went out later that even for dinner and the card was declined they had taken the 500 out of the account this wasn t a card we were going to pay with for the hotel and now didn t have any money for the weekend We went to reception and told them that the money had been taken and this wasn t on They told us there was nothing they could do about it accept try and put the money back on the card they told us it would take 3 days to go back on I paid for the hotel 3 days later with my card as we were leaving but my partners card still didn t have the money back on it 1 week after we had stayed there with lots of phoning and chasing the money was back on the card This was extremely bad customer service and not on

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: If you need anything extra like a pillow iron or toiletries you have to go to a secret cupboard and help yourself There are no signs or notices to tell you that though Seems quite cheap for an otherwise lovely hotel   Excellent location near Bank tube which has a number of lines so great for getting around Good pub next door for a cheap breakfast Free teas and snacks in the lobby are a nice touch Would stay here again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The staff were incredibly welcoming and helpful It seemed as if nothing was too much trouble for them Air conditioning and free purified water helped to make for a very comfortable stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I found an empty water bottle under the chair from last customer   the hotel is located very close to tube stations And Bank underground station has variety of lines so it s very convenient to travel anywhere the area is a super safe business area and not too loud at night compares to other areas in London the hotel offers free water coffee and snacks 24h

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Rooms are not exactly soundproof therefore they might be a little bit noisy in the morning   Loved to have purified water on the floor Very good location close to the subway and to ledenhall market Very friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Trouble with the payment system meant they tried charging my card 4 times and then couldn t produce a proper receipt For an international customer this is quite concerning Their tip for next use a credit card instead of a debit card surely a payment system should be able to cope with a debit card What a joke

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: During the booking process I was asked whether I would like to pay for breakfast at 17GBP per person which I added to my booking On the final day of my stay I visited the restaurant and was informed that this was an error on Booking com and that there was no set breakfast price leading to an increase frustration

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I booked this hotel as a gift for my parents anniversary and birthdays as they were staying in london I had lots of special requests to make champagne for the room etc The staff were prompt and helpful with their communication to me and helped with all my requests flawlessly My parents said there room was extremely clean and very comfy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The room we had this time was quite noisy in the morning there was obviously some delivery maintenance going on in the courtyard below A bit annoying when nursing a mild hangover   Location ideal for our needs Compimentary drinks ideal when rushing to get out

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: the room was very small not suitable for a long stay   very friendly and help staff at reception room was clean and comfortable great for a short stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Minor issue as I was only there for one night but there was no security locker in the Small Queen Room  Good Staff Very Clean Perfect location for my occasion in London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing reasonable price   Good location close to underground and sites although area itself is quiet at the weekend This didn t bother us Free coffee and water available

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing  All the requests that we made before trip and during trip where done to the very best standard and first time on business with our toddler hotel staff extremely helpful All so friendly we travel a lot and this hotel is a gem

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No Milk was in the room for tea and coffee The bed was small and cramped next to window and lavatory could have made more of the space  location was ok and near a tube 5mins

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room looked directly close into neighbouring offices luckily we stayed during a bank holiday Bathroom was not well vented and air con noisy   Great location Short walk from Liverpool Street Staff were very helpful Good coffee tea always available in foyer Foyer could get quite busy as only small

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room much smaller than it appeared on Booking com photos We know everyone uses creative and wide angles Faced the back of the building with a wall a few metres away also not as anticipated It was a place to sleep   Easy and painless automated checkin process

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Although the staff were polite they appeared a little cold and dis interested The rooms were the same standard as a premiere Inn and similar in layout we though we had been a little misled by the reviews and web site pictures   Location was good but most London hotels would be Easy check in and out no queues

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Breakfast service style was a little abrupt in manner Service was a little too late in the morning for me my meeting started 8 30 so I just had to buy my own portable breakfast the day before   Decent coffee machine in lounge

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There is no bar restaurant or proper lounge downstairs so there is no proper place to go and relax There are just some comfortable chairs in the main foyer reception area and that s it really   It is in a good location for the city and also for Liverpool Street Station The room was clean and fine The bathroom and the shower were good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: rooms were a good size quiet and clean complimentary tea and coffee in rooms and at reception also have a pc and printer in reception to print airline tickets and tour tickets etc staff were very friendly could leave bag after checkout then visit some tourist sites and return to pick up bag before leaving for airport close to Monument and Bank tube stations which meant it was easy to travel around London and get to and from airport its beside Tower Bridge where you can take a boat trip from and also the Tower of London loved our stay and weekend would definitely recommend this hotel it was great

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Could hear what happened in the next room when the lady was screaming in her lovely moment funny   Amazing staff great location good facilities and fast internet They even have water machines to drink in each floor where you can take a plastic bootle and use

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: A lot of the shops and restaurants in Leadenhall Market and close by were closed on Saturday and Sunday but we did find a couple of pubs open by the monument in addition to Weatherspoons next door   Great extras including water machine and bottles in corridor access to cupboard for extra teas coffees etc Free tea coffee machine in reception Door through to Weatherspoons pub next door Quiet rooms 3 of us shared a superior queen room which had plenty of room and a kitchenette Helpful staff can leave luggage in storage when you ve checked out Close to Monument and Bank tube stations and London Bridge

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bed was a bit too hard for me but not everyone likes a soft bed and at check in the procedure wasn t explained very well felt like it was left up to ourselfs no explanation of where room was or that the card was needed to go up the lift we got most of the info we needed from the welcome card in room we did get early check in for free as our room was ready so that was good and staff did seem very helpful when needed anything  Nice quiet hotel at night most staff was friendly short walk to tube station too in the quieter financial district so weekend very quiet area

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very helpful and pleasant staff Quiet room which was not very large exactly as expected but well organized Hotel well situated for City and worked well for weekend stay Lounge is a nice facility

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Noise from building works when window was opened Slight bad odour from bathroom shower drains  Cost very reasonable staff attentive location central to attractions free water and coffee room ticked all the boxes required

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I like the hotel staff Restaurant however was a mistake One waitress for whole breakfast Made mistakes tried to fix the door instead if inviting us in we were waiting Continental breakfast was missing items but they still insisted on charging full price Literally every single guest I saw in restaurant left unhappy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There was nothing to dislike  The welcome was great very helpful staff Room lovely super location away from the masses Will definitely return when I travel to London again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing  Spacious room good location in the City walking distance to the Sky Garden Tower of London Borough Market and Tate Modern among others and free good coffee at the lobby Good deal

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: perhaps the carpet a bit concern if its vacuumed   Spacious comfortable room love the amenities available especially the water dispenser which came with the bottles very thoughful Staffs were friendly helpful

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It was more of a business area But close to transport   Clean nice hotel Coffee and snacks anytime in reception Close to the london bridge and monument

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing really except the general dislike of parking in London But 38 pounds overnight still beats getting ticketed   Location is good 5 mins walk to monument station and bus stops too Room is clean and special care was made to my grandma s room thank you

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The breakfast was expensive 14 per person so we went next door to cross keys only 5 there   The room was spacious the bed comfy the location was good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There were no towels at all on our arrival The shower was very poorly located and caused water to cascade onto the bathroom floor   Good Location Quiet

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No plug socket near mirror in our room so had to borrow an extension cable for my girlfriend s straighteners That was only only thing could fault   Great location opposite Leadenhall Market Great to stay at weekend as very quiet as located in City

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: All perfect   The room was a great size for a city hotel The shower was great Lovely old building with character In a perfect spot Free tea and coffee and snacks felt like this happens on weekday mornings Superb staff So helpful and efficient

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Well situated for visiting central London with easy access to tube lines but in a part of the city which is quiet at the weekend so no issues with noise Extremely well placed for visiting the SkyGarden

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We booked a triple room but this was for two adults and a child We let the hotel know before hand and they did put up a camp bed for no extra charge   Excellent location Lounge area with tea and coffee

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Noisy with yelling neighbours all night long and no way of leting know the front desk and last but not least HIDDEN COST prices in booking are WITHOUT THE VAT Also bed not comfortable  Location stuff friendly

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Overpriced insufficient breakfast for which you have to pay directly I suspect I will be charged twice and will have to complain Tiny double bed close to the wall on one side on which there was no bed table Small bathroom  Nice decor Free water and coffee Good internet connection in the rooms Quiet Comfy bed nice towels

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I found the service appalling I had Firstly called your hotel on Friday may 6th to advise i would be using another card to pay for my stay than the one i had originally booked with I had asked could I just charge the original card or would I need to have it with me the man i spoke with advised I would need it with me and he would have to send me an application of authorization I never received the email Secondly on my way to the hotel I had called to advise what the situation would be and that I would be using a new card instead The lady on the phone advised me I could not check into my room until 3pm when making my booking on booking com it specifically asked me what time i would like to check in I selected 11 12 box This was another stress that was not necessary and the lady still could not guarantee my room would be ready This should not be advertised to customers if their rooms are not available until 3pm Thankfully there was a room available when we arrived On checking in there was no explanation that my card was going to be charged an extra 30 pounds for a security for breakfast etc I checked my bank account today and had to call the hotel to ask what this extra charge was for none of this was explained on arrival We were not even given times of breakfast or told anything about the Amenities in the hotel At exactly 12pm on Sunday may 8th checkout our telephone rang in our room reception presumably 5 mins later a man knocked on our room door as i answered he he was asking am i staying an extra night or checking out I found this absolutely outrageous that within 5 minutes of being late out of room i had telephone call and a knock on my door I was at reception to checkout by 12 09 It was harassment I will never return to this hotel I was absolutely disgusted with how guests are given no information about anything and the lack of interest your staff show towards the customers   The room was comfortable shower was spacious

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Quite tired looking from inside rooms in particular The way the property is marketed is not consistent with reality so one obviously is disappointed   Location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Wish that we had been told on arrival that our room was designed for disabled use the shower tray was almost non existant hence when using shower the room became awash   Very comfortable room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Didn t get told much information at reception eg where the amenities of the hotel were or even pointed In The direction of the lift  The extra bed was perfect for our 6 year old and it was handy having a kitchenette

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: the room was not really very clean still breadcrums on the floor Noisy surroundings in corridor and next door s room   Location was good Not too far from underground and busses Check in ok but it is nicer to see a welcoming face

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: An alarm in a neighbouring building went off for a long time through the night it wasn t the hotel s fault but the night watchman went to help turn the alarm off in the neighbouring building and was very apologetic  The nice staff the area loved it

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: we were upgraded to a bigger room free of charge it was lovely and quiet free water and coffee was an added bonus we were even offered an umbrella as we forgot to bring ours

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Some rubbish had been left in the corner of the room And the purple carpet with green carpeted skirting boards in our room wasn t pleasing on the eye   The bed was comfy the location was superb and the room was quiet

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I got a small Queen room nothing bad just that would have preferred if there is a cupboard for me to hang clothes and that the hotel provides toothpaste I kind of expected these two items to be included in a 4 star hotel regardless of room size   I had to bounce between Tobacco Docks and SOHO so the location was pretty good for me near to Bank station which has access to a few metro lines and some of the attractions like Tower of London Borough Market St Paul Cathedral Tate Modern Staff were friendly and helpful WiFi was strong and good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Doors bang when people leave room could do with springs hinges however this was about 7am and not all night  Great location for sight seeing quiet room cold bottled water available free friendly staff Nice room too and good shower

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Allowed to check in at 11am so we could get out for the day Staff very helpful in all matters Bed very comfy and like the USB sockets for charging devices Returning vistitor will return again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Can not fault this place   Everything you need ticked all the boxes for Our stay in London at a amazing price we will stay again And a superb Wetherspoons pub next door made it perfect place to stop

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Location good close to tube Excellent clean hotel especially compared to prices of other hotels Free tea coffee water available in lobby Pleasent staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There was a problem with the flush in the bathroom I didn t really enjoy the fact that my room was looking at a commercial building very close I needed to keep my curtains shut all the time   It could be the largest London hotel single room I ve ever stayed The room was very clean

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: When asked if we could book an extra night staff stated as we booked with booking com we were obliged to do so again online This was slightly inconvenient as we were in a hurry The room had various stains on chair seats and on the carpet giving the room a dirty appearance The room felt very much like a ferry cabin airplane bathroom More suited to the travelling business man rather than a luxury trip away   Location was handy and within good walking distance to major stations Sound proof rooms Good heating system

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The rooms are very corporate and a little tired but the hotel are in the process of a refit so hopefully this is in hand  Convenient location great facilities great staff very helpful friendly Lovely to have the lounge and refreshments available

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It s great during the week but because it s in a business district a lot of cafes and restaurants were closed around the hotel on the weekend Breakfast was terrible not much of a selection and I got a blank look when asking if they had anything gluten free Plan to go down the road for a brunch   Location location location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Use this hotel quite a lot for work Great value for money close to Bank for the DLR from the airport and right in the middle of City of London and financial centre

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Breakfast was minimal Perhaps they weren t anticipating many takers as it was a Sunday morning but it was a disappointing spread   We had a room at the back of the hotel which meant less traffic noise The room itself was clean and had everything we wanted The bed allowed for a good night s sleep Staff were friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The shower is tiny The shower curtain keep sticking to my arm during the shower   There is a little food corner where you can enjoy coffee fruit and some energy bars Good for breakfast when you are in a rush

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Not friendly staff we were staying with friends for a weekend no room service after 11pm and no bar in the hotel so if you want a drink you have no options and staff is not helpful at all We asked where can we go in the area but the man in reception just told us that he doesnt know anything not interested in helping at all Maybe good for business quests but not for leisure just because of the location Room was old and soulless needed some good dusting

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bathroom very small Only one hand towel per room double occupancy   Good size bedroom and bed Liked the free coffee tea chilled water Able to access extra pillows etc

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Was given a small double room which was a fair size however the view was terrible Overlooked an old shed type building which was close up to the window The view was so depressing it made the room gloomy so I had to keep the curtains shut for the duration of my stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The tea and coffee facilities were poor For someone who likes cups of tea There was one tea bag each and one sachet of milk and one sugar each Not a lot for the money

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bed uncomfortable big dip in middle Inch gap under door so light coming in all night Room very warm at night   Location and value for money at weekend Bottled water

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: I couldn t get a glass of wine at 10 15 on a Sunday   Comfy beds good location pleasant staff Great reception with free access to printer Coffee machine and news papers in the lobby

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: This was meant to be an anniversary and it was ruined unfortunately the only way I would be happy with this booking is if i was in any way refunded I will not be promoting this hotel   Not much to comment on here

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: If you want to be in the heart of the action then the city area might be a bit quiet for you at the weekend   Great central location Nice room modern clean It was small but we knew that before we picked it The price was reasonable given the location in central London Would certainly recommend and stay here again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: One can see that the hotel hasn t been renovated for a while It s still very clean but the usage is visable  Good location large rooms easy to use

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bit confused about restaurant facilities for dinner   Lady on desk very helpful with advice and info on how to get to meeting next day Advised on booking that wife had mobility problems and room supplied accommodated this well although in end she did not travel due to illness

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: My e mail was used without my consent to contact me with promotional material I complaint about this but never received an explanation   Friendly staff and good location in the city

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast however there s a weatherspoon right next door with costs 1 4 of the price The rooms look slightly older than we expected from the pictures   Very central to two major underground stations Stayed during bank holidays so we payed a fraction of the usual price to stay here Friendly staff and 24 7 reception Comfy bed clean room Overall pleasant stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Nothing   I left my bag with them very early in the morning before check in and when I returned it was put safely in the room they allocated Helpful member of staff who printed out an invitation to a function I was attending Comfortable bed and room Good location and proximity to the underground Convenient for a wedding at the Walkways Tower of London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Would have liked an extra pillow on the bed   Excellent location for exploring London Spacious room with good supply of essentials toiletries hairdryer etc Free coffee in the lounge at all times is a nice touch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Disliked the automatic check in process that wasn t immediately obvious and being made to feel an inconvenience by a staff member who had to direct me to a machine   Great location for a night out in the City and I was surprised how quiet it was given its location Liked the free filtered water machines on each floor too many hotels charge a fortune for bottled water

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very much geared towards the business sector but to be expected being in the financial district   The chilled water and bottles on each floor was good as were the closets where you could pick up extra pillows etc without bothering staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The baby bed was dirty we ve noticed some blood staines on the side actually this was unacceptable   Top location friendly staff fair price quality

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Shower could have been more modern staff members were nice but looked uninterested sometimes  Great location clean and comfortable room free water dispenser and plastic bottles for take away on every floor

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The hotel bar and room service both finish up at 10 30pm on a Saturday night We weren t given any alternative places to drink or go to once these had closed   Location was great and room was a decent size for the money

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Budget bathroom being ripped off on New Year s Eve room was twice as much as normal but not too fussed about the price as it was New Year s Eve Cleaning staff knocking at 10 in the morning when check out was at 12  Restaurant downstairs and adjoining pub comfortable bed location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There is nothing negative to say   The location for the Firms Christmas Party was excellent Room was comfortable very clean and I will certainly book again when needing a stop over in London as excellent value for money

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Staff were very helpful The location is well located for City business travellers although a little further for main tourist attractions However the underground is very close as is the river walkway While the room was fairly compact it was perfectly adequate and comfortable for my needs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We got locked out on fire stair case No stairs I don t like using lifts Also worried in case of fire  Where situated price and staff helpfulness

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Only one flat pillow each and a noisy air con unit on roof which rumbled away all night   Very efficient check in Complimentary hot drinks in reception area Nice decor throughout Great location for all City attractions

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Great staff Room was snug but not too small Great location Very central Water on each floor saved us from going to the bar for it which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We arrived with a party of 5 women for a 30th birthday occasion 3 of the party had a fabulous spacious room with small kitchenette with view of the Shard The other two of our party had a much smaller double room so would recommend the rooms with a small kitchen Location was within a few yards of high street with high end and lower end of shopping spectrum Tube station was a 5 8 min walk from hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: We had a very noisy room on the 8th floor Completely ruined our first night there Couldn t wait to leave the room and was given a different room much quieter on the 2nd floor

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: As we visited at the weekend a hotel in the business district perhaps wasn t the wisest choice of ours as all of the bars and restaurants were closed so we had to go further afield for food and drink   Great looking hotel Great room well appointed and with some nice touches like an iPod dock and a little fridge for keeping our own drinks cool

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Rather depressing everything is grey in this place nothing cosy here ok for sleeping but that s about it definitely no 4 star feeling  Location fast check in pretty cheap for London 96 for a Friday night

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: A very nice low fuss clean hotel nice sized rooms large bathroom was also a plus its a low thrills hotel but I would stay there again because I enjoyed being in a quite hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: It was in a perfect location for our stay Very close to Bank station The room was spacious and fitted the 3rd person in easily There isn t much life to the area around the hotel but this wasn t a problem for us

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Very uncomfortable bed and I m pretty sure it has bed bugs On the airplane on our way back home both my husband and I noticed we were full of bites   The location of this hotel is the best thing going for it In the business district and within walking distance to the London tower restaurants and public transport Walk out of the hotel go right and about a block away is the largest T K Maxx I ve ever seen It also has a pub next door which serves very decent food for breakfast lunch dinner

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: There were not hair dryer available but it is a detail as I did really enjoyed the hotel and will definitely chose it again   The location the friendly personnel the comfortable room the lounge with free tea and coffee I didn t select to take the breakfast at the hotel so I can t talk about it I did not either have time to try the Gaucho restaurant or the fitness center

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: This is the second time we have stayed at this hotel it is central enough to site see a local tube station is 5 mins walk it s lovely to have a small kitchen to eat if need to

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The room was very hot at night   Hotel was comfortable clean and our room was well equipped We did not pay for breakfast as went to the Weatherspoons next door Location is brilliant as close to Liverpool Street No charge for leaving cases after check out Impressed with the complimentary wine and nibbles for my son who was celebrating his 21st birthday

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Unfortunately many of the restaurants and bars in this area are only open Monday to Friday   This is a lovely hotel with great facilities We did have a problem with the heating and our bed broke very early in the morning but staff were vert helpful and accommodating

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Breakfast is very expensive next door there is a huge pub that serves for half price   It is the best location you can find few steps from monument station just so close to the center

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Great location only a couple of minutes walk from either Bank or Monument underground station Hotel staff always helpful Room clean and very comfy Really nice having the free tea and coffee downstairs so can take a drink up with you or out and about

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Bathroom tatty in need of modernisation Bed was very uncomfortable Impersonal self check in that I would not associate with a 4 star rating   Good location in the city Nice restaurant on site

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: No restaurant inside   Fast free internet complete with printer which is easy to access Free coffee tea in the lobby and drinking water in every floor at anytime we like

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Room facing onto the road was a little noisy late at night but hey it s a city centre hotel   Efficient and friendly staff excellent location for our needs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: Even though I checked in online the day before the room I selected wasn t ready   Room was a good size for being a double and in central London Staff helpful

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: If we were to be picky Pillows a little thin could do with new ones Location of the bed is right next to the door so could be a little noisy but didn t stop me from sleeping  Computer and printing facilities were free in the entrance lobby great for last minute prointing of tickets and vouchers Kept our luggage for us Staff helpful and good location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch

Full_Review: The hotel was very tired and the bed were like sleeping in the floor Staff weren t very helpful when we wanted late check out which I has requested prior to stay We requested late check out for a lay in and they reception rang the room to see what time we were checking out when the previous day I had been to check that they were aware of us checking out late Then we went to leave reception told us that we had a 30 charge Manager ended up taking it off but we were very annoyed that were not informed of the extra charge Very disappointed indeed   Location was good and shower was good Very clean

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The put up third bed was not as comfortable as the main bed but it was okay The hotel was basically an up market travel lodge with self catering aimed squarely at the traveling business world So the staff were great and helped you use the self check in good wifi and if you ever need to hold a meeting there is a place to do that with free coffee and smarties close to hand   The location was brilliant minutes from the monument tube in the very hart of the city An easy walk to the Tower of London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Gracechurch
Full_Review: The location was Fantastic three minute walk to the London Bridge The globe theatre and the tower brige are also very near I would say for sight seeing it s fantastic there are a lot of monuments in the area If you want to do some shopping it s not so great although there are a couple of shops around The hotel itself is really outdated The room was really dusty When I opened the curtains there was dust when I sat on the bed dust rose up I am not over exaggerating My nose got blocked and I couldn t stop sneezing the whole time I was there The bathroom was outdated too Only had a shower and no tub And it would steam up really bad a sauna literally and it took a long time for it to clear up On a positive note they have a lot of free stuff Free cans of drinks chocolate and nuts in the lobby Free unlimited wifi which doesnt require a password It has a computer suite which has a free printer and a gym I didn t really use any but it was good that they were there Oh it had a funny smell to Overall it is not the worst however the level cleanliness was disappointing oh I forgot to mention they had a basket of toilet tissues under the bed it may not bother some however it bothers me also it needs MAJOR refurbishing it too old Hope it helps

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Breakfast price seemed very high 23 95  Arrived early before 3pm check in time as we were seeing a show at 2 30 and needed to leave luggage Hotel checked us in and gave us an upgrade room that was available complimentary along with a plate of cake with Happy anniversary written on it had previously emailed 4 hotels asking if we can leave luggage prior to check in and the fact it was our Silver Wedding Anniversary This hotel was the only one that bothered to reply Excellent room with real dark wood furniture comfy bed excellent bathroom with plenty of gels and soaps Good TV with many channels Tea and Coffee with plenty of both available along with Milk Receptionist sent up Soya milk F O C as my wife can not drink dairy Check in was quick staff brilliant and location superb All in all a lovely hotel very reasonably priced including the room service menu My only slight grump was that the breakfast was 23 95 which seemed unreasonably steep compared to great prices on room menu strange I highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Was booked to Grange Blooms Hotel but when we arrived we were directed to the hotel next door Grange White Hall Apparently it s the same the building is connected and of the same standard but it didn t look like it and we didn t appreciate the bait and switch to a hotel other than the one we booked   Location was good Next door to British Museum short walk from St Pancras Train station Staff were friendly Area was quiet especially as our room faced an inner courtyard garden
