Full_Review: The bathroom was tired needed a fresh paint the toilet needed a good clean Decor furniture could do with update   The room was airy very comfy super king bed spotlessly clean sheets and towels very well equipped bathroom toiletries

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Management should ensure that all the room doors do not end 5cm above the floor It really steals privacy and makes the room very noisy We changed the room then and the second room was fine   Good value for money in London To me the style is typically British Close to Tube station various bus stations and a nice wee park around the corner Perfekt PT connection to almost everywhere in the city and to Heathrow airport Rooms are small but clean and big enough for a weekend city trip

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: No plug sockets next to bed so cant charge phone or any devices next to you have to keep getting in and out of bed to answer phone etc when charging had to boil kettle on the floor as again no plug socket unless you unplug tv shabby bathroom and when you look up to the sky light in bathroom its FILTY I didn t feel it was clean very shabby and dusty when I tried to move bed to look for plug sockets again very diet under bed so it s being cleaned thoroughly   location is good

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Staff was extremely pleasant and helpful Room was large clean and well decorated Location is absolutely perfect two minute walk from the British Museum and the best dining and shopping

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Hard to complain about this hotel  Convenient location just a couple of blocks from the nearest Metro Staff were friendly and helpful Excellent for short or long stay

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Could not swing a cat in the room or the bathroom No safety rails in bath to enable a safe entry and exit into and out of the bath for a shower Had to squeeze past the end of the bed to get to the other side of the bed

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Excellent location Spacious clean and comfortable bed and bathroom Stylish classic interior Have stayed at different hotels from the Grange hotel group in this neighborhood and wouldn t want to stay anywhere else Compared to other hotels in London this is really good value for money

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The 1st floor windows can be walked up to via all the flat roof space and the lock on the windows was flimsy at best The door into the room did not seal so could not be a fire door it let plenty of noise and light through from the creaking floor outside You could listen to conversations from other rooms   Comfortable bed high ceilings

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The hotel met all my needs but Stayed on my own and walking back to the hotel at night I felt a bit nervous as the street did not have many people although it was close to the x2 tube stations It may be because it was Bh

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Very worn decor and a poor breakfast despite it being free   Clean and friendly staff Quiet yet accessible location The staff were very efficient in offering us alternative accommodation and a free breakfast when a leak developed from the room above

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing really For a short overnight stay and the price I paid this was suitable   Chose this due to it s location near Russell Square Decent hotel with lovely staff was offered an upgrade from single to double room due to my preference of room location Standard facilities and clean rooms Walking distance to Russell Square tube station a Tesco and a Sainsbury is around the corner plus some food places

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Staff allowed my ill partner late checkout until a room was available in a sister hotel around the corner as we could not return to our apartment due to late running building works and had to extend our stay

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Could ve had more tea and sugar in the room and room perhaps could ve been a touch warmer   The staff were very friendly and accomadating The style of the room was nice and homely and there was plenty to watch on TV when you wanted to

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: My room was a single but even taking that into account it was small Difficult to find anywhere to put the suitcase small It was impossible at times to get cold water from the mixer taps  Room was warm bed was comfortable and the staff were most helpful Located on a quieter street in Bloomsbury off of Russell Square My bedroom faced the rear over the garden and was very quiet Room was also reasonably clean and quality of room service two night stay was high I would use the hotel again because it is very well located for the British Museum and Senate House

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: We were first put in a room that was quite small and stayed in that a night The next day complained and we were put in a much larger room which was very good of the hotel   Location was excellent and staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: I paid more than other guests from abroad as happened to be waiting by the desk when someone was checking out Not fair is it booking com   The staff were really really good very helpful and friendly For a single room it was a good size and very comfortable The location was fabulous

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Hot Water and shower broke down but no problem really   Comfortable spacious bed with superb decor Fine historic building and location Staff willingness to help Easy access to all venues we enjoy in London

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The room was very small as was the bathroom The sink in the bathroom was tiny and very low making it difficult to use There was no shelf in the bathroom and therefore nowhere to put toiletries The room did not have temperature control or air conditioning and was a bit too hot There was a ceiling fan although we were asked to turn it off because the people in the room above complained about the noise Hotel was nice but a little overpriced costing me 450 for 3 nights I think 100 120 per night would have been more reasonable   Excellent location D cor of the hotel was very nice much more character than a standard hotel

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Advertised a whiskey library which didn t exist and you had to use the bar in the sister hotel   Position of hotel comfortable bed staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Disappointed that the Library whiskey bar was not open as a number of colleagues and myself had thought it would be a great place to make a bit of a get together Having to walk down to the White hall hotel a few doors down for food or drink was a bit odd Not a great issue but not ideal   The Grange Bloom is a very nice hotel very jolly British The staff are lovely and helpful and the food is also very nice if somewhat basic The room was very pleasant and extremely clean with easy access via a lift It was ideal for my work in the British Museum as it was so very close The resident spook was wonderfully polite and chose not to haunt my room anyway However there just was not anything really special to make this a great hotel Good enough value for central London you could do an awful lot worse as it does have remarkably high standards for inner London just quite bland

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Massive gap under the door you could hear everything in the hallway Had to plug the kettle in on the floor as there were no plug sockets where the tea station was The bathroom was below average for the price And my boyfriend wanted to surprise me for my graduation with decorations which he paid for But the decorations said happy anniversary   Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: In need of some furnishing updates eg dark and heavy swags and tails Mattress for me a little too soft One piece of damaged furniture that should be removed   Very friendly and helpful staff Nice sized room Good bath products Nice and warm weather very cold

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing  Clean modern room Generous amount of toiletries tea and coffee Good location walking distance to west end Staffs very friendly I was upgraded thanks

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: There was no toilet roll holder which meant having to hold it to unroll not very hygienic particularly st this time of year with the winter bugs   Very comfortable homely there was fruit in the room which was a great treat staff were very welcoming friendly

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Cleanliness could have been better Hairs in the bathroom Rooms could have been bigger We were in an executive room supposedly it was tiny Floor was wonky everywhere   Location and staff were good

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The shower over a bath wasn t cleaned well at all and there was lots of hair over the shower walls and bits of dirt on the walls that all came off with the shower head showering over them so the cleaner obviously hadn t bothered to clean the walls There was also a clump of girls long hair in between the pillows though the bed did appear to have been freshly made We Googled exactly what 4 Star actually meant after being disappointed with what we were expecting versus what we got We asked for a complimentary late checkout when we arrived and were offered 12pm instead of 11am and advised our booking would be updated so we wouldn t be called before 12pm We received two phone calls before 12pm the first at 11 18am to tell us checkout was at 11am so we explained we were given a 12pm checkout and then a second call at 11 58am to let us know checkout was at 11am Pretty frustrating   Good location off the main busy roads nearby so much less traffic quieter The bed was comfortable and the curtains were great and made the room into a blackout room except for the cracks in the door showing the hallway lights The room heating was so good in a room with a very high ceiling that we had to turn it down when we arrived

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The breakfast was not included and was expensive at 23 each so we walked round to the Bella Roma cafe and had one for 6 50 with a view of the British museum   The room was very nice just one night stay hotel away from all the London noise but close to the theatre in Drury Lane where we were going and 15 20 min walking distance from kings cross St Pancras station

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Perfect location come out of the station turn left cross at the traffic lights enter the gardens if they re open walk diagonally to the opposite side and you ll see Montague Street on the right It s clean tidy old fashioned but stylish Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: We were told to walk to the next hotel which we hadn t booked The room they showed me had a dirty toilet used and not flushed The next room was enormous and clean the bed was a pull down one from the wall no bedside cabinets or electric plugs tea making facilities good but there was no plug for the kettle nearby The staff asked when we left had we enjoyed our stay we said no they said had we enjoyed breakfast we hadn t had it they told us that the receptionist when we booked in had offered us a complimentary breakfast we were not told of this We voiced our dissatisfaction the manager did write to us but the outcome of her review has not been forwarded to us Altogether a poor experience   nothing

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Repair the bathroom window as a terrible draught comes in no handle to secure the window from draughts Surprised only 1 radiator in the bathroom and none in the bedroom   All was very comfy and very clean

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: There were no pillow protectors fitted We did not have breakfast at the hotel as we thought it was far too expensive we may have considered it at half the price   Quiet and more than comfortable enough to sleep despite the single glazing

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Just the bathroom was a big small   Location so wonderful staff very friendly and hotel quite clean and comfortable No complaints at all it s not a luxury hotel really but a perfect spot from which to explore London and the British Museum

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing to do with the hotel really but consideration from other guests regarding noise would have been good   We stayed in the Theatre Royal room which was lovely and quiet with a comfy big bed

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The bathroom was very small and the zink extremely low The cab driver the hotel called for us tried to rip us off pretending Heathrow Express was cancelled this Sunday Thought this very bad since the company cooperates with Grange Hotels   Excellent location in nice area Quite good value for money in a pricey area

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Charming old style hotel on a quiet and beautiful street in lovely Bloomsbury Our room opened onto the cute little garden in the back Complementary tea and fruit Staff was accomodating

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Room v small and bed not comfortable  Free wifi but kept dropping out so I would not pay for it Room was really small bed was very soft too soft for me If I wanted a drink I had to go next door and breakfast was over 20 which even for London is too much

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Booked this hotel months ago made it perfectly clear to hotel and booking com my wife has disability and in wheelchair My wife had to walk up stairs to entrance and down to depart was told there would be a makeshift ramp on arrival Should have been told hotel not suitable when booking The lady on reception read my email on arrival as she said she wasn t aware Disappointing break  Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: FIrst room smelled badly of smoke Changed rooms and the room was brown and badly lit The decor was like a one star hotel The bed was a fold out from the wall The carpet was old and stained Nothing like the photos Avoid

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: First room we were allocated we found water pouring from the ceiling light fittings having been relocated the room lacked air conditioning a fridge adequate power points or hot water pressure shower For this day and age a modern television with more than five channels should be considered the norm Our four poster bed had not been cleaned properly and both the room and bathroom appeared generally tired 170 for one night should command higher standards very disappointing We would not recommend or return   Not very much

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Unfortunately my room backed onto the lift shaft The lift was in use most of the night and was extremely noisy I slept VERY little during the two nights I stayed at this hotel   All the staff were polite helpful professional and friendly The room was a single room but spacious enough for one person

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Layout of room no drawers in main room no air conditioning and poor extractor fan in bathroom hair dryer would have been better and more effective in main room and had to tighten shower head as leaking water pressure took 5 mins to get good flow then intermittent towels were hard too no bottled water in room either   Location and garden

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Sound proofing nor brilliant so snoring neighbour and all night rattling ceiling fan nearby were a nuisance on last of three night stay  Freebie fruit in room and on reception sweets with a good selection on the hot drinks tray in room all good plusses

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Receptionist not very friendly and didn t make us feel particularly welcomed A smile goes a long way Electronic booking in on tablet took too long Nice room but small as it was a corner room Within a minute of us arriving in the room the mini bar a packet of crisps and a couple of miniatures on a tray was whisked away Have stayed in other Grange hotels numerous times before and not experienced this   Great location as we were attending an event at the British Museum Could not have been more convenient Covent Garden very easily accessible too

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Room on first night had no shelf or space for toiletry items in the bathroom more annoying than it sounds The wifi didn t work Second night upgraded to room with normal bathroom shelf space and good working wifi Pompous drapes around the bedhead full of dust which rained down every time we moved Some sort of fan or other machinery droning all night long nearby with no obvious way of switching off Water pump in loft space ran loud whenever someone used water Restaurant basic and unimaginative shame as the garden setting is very nice   Great location around the corner from the British Museum Lovely old fashioned boutique style with delightful garden Helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Lack of breakfast included in room fee is a serious shortcoming Lack of microwave and refrigerator in room is very inconvenient Computer facilities inadequate Rear patio garden nice but needs better upkeep   Nice room if a little small with French doors overlooking rear patio garden Coffee maker in room is convenient

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: We thought breakfast was in the deal it wasn t and at 23 something it s a seriously expensive option we didn t take up We had a ground floor room which was convenient but unfortunately the hotel structure in general being quote old transmits quite a lot of noise so anyone moving around in adjacent rooms or the corridor was very noticeable Unfortunately the reverse switch broke on the fan rendering it unusable and we weren t there long enough to get it repaired   The hotel has great character and is very nicely located for exploring There s also a great cafe in the park opposite Convenient for the tube it s a good base to get around from it s nicely appointed and to a good standard without excessive formality Comfortable room nice big bed very narrow bath though all the usual amenities and although no air conditioning a 10 foot ceiling with a ceiling fan Away from main roads so no significant external noise VERY personable and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The TV didn t work for us no biggie or we would have called Reception for a fix We could have done with more power points for charging the various devices   The bed was very comfortable indeed perfect mattress great pillows slept like at home and I m quite fussy The toiletries were generous the bathroom was roomy enough and the shower was good The room size was bigger than average for London for the price The location was perfect too The hotel was quiet being on the edge of the British Museum there was very little traffic noise

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Entire hotel overheated Fortunately we could open the window before we expired There is no refrigerator in the room and this would be annoying for longer stays Bathroom floor was as slippery as ice even with dry feet and no water on floor Really perilous Room was tiny nowhere to put luggage   Cannot beat the location Extremely comfortable bed and luxurious bed linen Appreciated the fresh fruit in the room and tea and coffee making facilities We have stayed several times before and find the accommodation and service consistent Love the fact that we could open the window Excellent shower

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: For what we paid we were very happy   The room bed was very comfy We were upgraded to a double instead of twin beds which was a nice surprise We were also able to leave our case for a few hours after check out We did not have breakfast so cannot comment on food however there was a nice bowl of fruit in the room

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: At midnight I decided I wanted a snack I ask for two items marked as available 24 hours by an asterisk a Parisienne sandwich and vegetable samosas The concierge told me vegetable samosas aren t available at this hour I mentioned that it was marked as available He replied But I ll need to turn on the oven If you really need the samosas I guess I can do that stressing the point if I really need it and indicating his preference to not bother with more than he needs to do I replied no that s fine I don t need it Just bring me the sandwich When he finally arrived with the sandwich he set down the tray and doing so knocked out the TV s box He apologized and proceeded to tell me things weren t going well for him I told him not to worry about it and I m sorry to hear things weren t going well Of note some of the other staff were friendly and would treat me with a smile Other staff gave me strange looks with neither a greeting nor the semblance of a warm welcome I pride myself on being a warm kind generous person So to be met by such expressions by the staff was a bit disconcerting and unexpected Not sure it was worth the price but then little in London is   In general it s a beautiful hotel in a really excellent location quieter than something on any main streets but also central and and extremely convenient A place with such a location couldn t possibly fail

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The location is a little noisy for traffic and the TV only had 5 channels   The staff were extremely friendly and helpful and upgraded us to a four poster bed for free

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Free wifi Cheaper breakfast Staff banging around in a store room next to our room at all hours   Great location Friendly staff Reasonable price Very clean Ideally located for London tour buses 10 minutes walk from theatre land

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The breakfast menu was a little over priced   The concierge service was excellent really appreciated all your help and allowing us to leave our luggage whilst we went to explore The rooms were clean and comfortable and the hotel s location was excellent Thank you we will definitely be back soon

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Quality of the bathroom supplies could have been a bit better   Friendly welcome and we were up graded to a very comfy king size room Room was very clean

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: I could tell that the hotel done its best effort to keep the room clean but because the hotel is quite old I saw the accumulated old dusts at the corners of the bathroom and also the glass screen of the bathtub   The staff were quite helpful and flexible The location was good only 5 minutes walk to the Russell Square Almost the next to the British Museum Good neighborhood It is not avoidable of small rooms in London thus I recommend you to book a double room I was glad I could stay at the room with a bathtub especially in this cold season

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Breakfast wasn t included in our deal so we didn t get to see the breakfast room We understand that the dining room is in the sister hotel next door So the only facility we saw was a lovely but small sitting room   Lovely traditional elegant but homely decor Exceptionally clean reception staff very polite

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Thank you so much for the lovely staff for giving us such a nice room for our anniversary I hated to ask but it was very much appreciated Also loved the seating area outside only wish we had more time to make the most of it

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The temperature was very high in the lobby corridors and the room although the radiator was not on in the room Not too much of an issue though as we opened the window nice to be able to on a second floor room   Very friendly staff allowed us to leave our bags before check in time so we could go round the British museum Room was lovely well appointed light clean and fresh

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: There was an extremely loud droning noise in our room which was on and off from about 7am we are assuming it was something to do with the water system as the guests started showering in the morning ruined a Sunday morning lie in The shower door was broken and if you moved the shower head higher so that you could wash your hair the shower turned off There was no breakfast team available in the room The room was also stifling hot when we arrived I appreciate it is cold out and guests like different temperatures but we turned the radiator off and needed the fan on all night I can only assume our room was adjacent to a boiler When mentioned to the member of staff on reception as we checked out she seemed to laugh and said any thing else as if we were exaggerating A rare weekend away was marred by choosing to stay at Grange Blooms  Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Found it tricky as the shower door was restricted to pull out from the sink being in the way as I m disabled and struggle to bend to reach taps etc and there was not enough plugs it was awkward having to move stuff around constantly  The location was good

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Very thin walls we had room 3 which is the worst room possible We were woken in the middle of the night by the night guard and the receptionist talking to each other We could hear every single word I don t know if the hotel was fully booked or our room assignment had to do with our cheap booking com rate of 82 GBP but it was very poor regardless Besides room service didn t do a very good job as there was an old bottle in our room upon arrival TV was very old and remote did not work due to receiver way below the bed and behind stuff You have to get up to adjust volume or change stations Like said our rate was 82 Sterling which the hotel in another room is maybe worth but if you have to pay the full rate you can get more bang for the buck elsewhere   Nice room good location in Bloomsbury right behind the British Museum fresh fruit in the room spacious bathroom very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Small room but as it had a high ceiling it didn t feel too cramped  loved the decor a refreshing change from so many bland boring hotel rooms Also liked having a proper bathtub Very friendly staff great location Didn t go on the outside terrace but like the idea of it and had a nice view of it

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: The Windows weren t double glazed and we re old and rickety so there was a draft and noise The bath ad shower was old and felt uncomfortable to use the sockets and switches were old and discoloured and there was no big light just lots of lamps   The staff were very helpful the location is good very close to Holborn station the bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: I had booked a last minute trip to London with my partner and decided the hotel rooms looked great on the booing website so went for it I was happy with my booing until I got to our room The room was very small there wasn t enough room to fold down the iron board and iron not with two people having to manoeuvre around it each other The double bed was disappointing it wasn t a double bed It was a 3 4 bed with a single duvet on the top Sleeping in the bed was annoying enough when you re a little bit cold during the night and are trying to keep covered with a duvet but can t because it doesn t even cover your body completely It was a midnight tussle for some duvet warmth between us both as only one person would be fully covered by what the hotel management consider a double duvet on this double bed which didn t even fit us two on Laying down on our backs side by side meant that my arm would drop off the edge of the bed It s NOT a double bed and I m annoyed it was described as a double bed and even more annoyed I had to pay for it   Friendly staff and a great location

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing the hotel is lovely There is a short flight of steps you can t avoid at the Russell Square tube station   We had a long flight from Australia and the reception staff were wonderful about booking us in early I had emailed and asked if it was possible and they were so accommodating as well as giving us over 60s a ground floor room If you are a history archaeology buff as I am this is the hotel for you right next door to the British Museum and around the corner from the main entrance The underground station Russell Square is a short flat walk away

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Free wifi was unreliable Minor quibble Although the room came with an electric kettle it had to be placed on the floor in order to be plugged in   Extremely courteous helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Grange Blooms Hotel
Full_Review: Nothing the hotel can do about traffic noise most of the day and night as the hotel is on a busy street No a c it wasn t needed but the open window for air let in noise from the street   The location was good easy walk to shops restaurants parks underground British Museum The room though small was comfortable tastefully decorated had updated plumbing and in room snacks

Full_Review: Hotel getting in need of modernisation   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Concierge was extremely helpful and full of positive energy Tony and his colleague helped collect a box so I could FedEx items back to the U S all I had to do was pack and provide my account number and address THANK YOU They were also extremely knowledgeable of the city and surrounding areas Provided excellent The concierge provided excellent transportation directions to various areas Again THANKS Front desk was aware of my arrival from the another country and had a room available for me to check in upon my arrival from Manchester The gal at the front desk was very hospitable beautiful smile and suggested a great place for a traditional English breakfast All the staff I met are keepers

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The worst experience was at the sky bar lounger where it felt that I am being paid to have a drink The attitude of the bar tender was not at all acceptable I had expressed checked out and have not received my invoice yet Its been 5 days already No Pool  The breakfast spread was amazing Metro access to walking distance The sky lounge is a one time must go place View

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The picture of the rooms are deceiving and our room was disappointingly smaller than I expected the queen bed was very small for 2 Our room looked out on Pepys street and not hotels fault but noise from building work opposite We came back from breakfast the next morning to pack to move rooms as not one available on arrival to find the maid tidying the room and making our bed for us She was very lovely but we couldn t get her to understand we didn t need it and wouldn t leave We were moved to King room facing inside bed much better intrusive view from other rooms No coat hooks not many hangers 4 night stay or drawers the mirror over the desk is too high TV on apple mac has no programme guide The air conditioning panel has a cover but it doesn t cover it side view so when in bed shone in my eyes Key card needed to use lift is temperamental Sky bar gets very busy with external visitors and struggled to get seated to eat Service charge is still added to drinks bill if you buy for the bar The carpet in the corridor on level 5 is rucked up in places and come away from the join causing me to trip   The staff are always willing to help and very nice Daniel on front desk was very helpful and moved rooms for us Breakfast very good roof bar has an amazing views great cocktails

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price of drink in the hotel lobby 13 for a glass of wine and 5 50 for a small Heiniken extremely expensive whne you consider that in Witherspoons the same would cost half of that The breakfast while grand could have a bit more variety for teh price The English breakfast got a bit boring on the third day A bit of white and black Irish pudding would be good a few kippers possibly   Location ideal for access to Underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was quite good   Very nice excellent hotel Very courteous and friendly staff well designed nice restaurant inside hotel with a great choice of organic and natural products a natural and relaxed atmosphere sunlight everywhere spacious rooms great lobby and excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No bath in the room   Staff were very friendly nice touch having a cookie on arrival Room was compact but adequate for our stay Roof top bar was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: the view from our room looked straight out on to a brick bridge not very pretty I m sure some people got good views but we were obviously just unlucky   Bar on the 12th floor was great lovely views etc Warm cookie on arrival was also very nice although we checked in separately at different times and only one of us got a cookie Room was clean and fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks quite expensive   The room was spacious clean and well equipped with a lovely shower nice toiletries and complimentary water The breakfast was superb fabulous omelettes on offer excellent variety of food and the staff were first class friendly efficient and welcoming On arrival the queue for checking in was quite long it was Friday but staff came around with complimentary orange juice nice touch Reception staff processed our 6 rooms relatively quickly The hotel is very handy for taxis never had to wait also the underground is only 100 metres away Great transport options

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Arrived early room not ready told it would be ready for 15 00 that was no problem Went back after 15 00 room not ready and it would be over an hour they then changed our room to a disabled one got to room half eaten chocolate left in the fridge Next day room not made not by 19 05 given 6 complementary drinks but we only wanted things right as we had paid for which was not cheep   good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On returning to the hotel late in the evening we wanted to have a drink to finish off the day The lobby bar was empty and being vacuumed so we headed to the SkyBar which we found very disappointing as whilst not crowded offered limited seating and music was so loud we could hear it from the lift As it was mainly couples in the bar the loud music seemed unnecessary We left without having a drink as did other people who were in the lift with us One other annoying feature was the lifts failed to recognise that you had inserted your key card and therefore on a couple of occasions didn t stop at out floor loads of people were complaining in the lift about this   A warm welcome and a cookie on checking in was a nice touch The staff we came into contact with were polite and professional We would definitely revisit the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Poor coffee as usual and long wait to check in although this was down to extra security measures  Well appointed rooms including Apple TV Modern bathrooms and large rooms

Full_Review: We booked this as it had been described as luxurious and because it was a special birthday We had wanted luxury so didn t mind paying more than our usual Premier Inn choice We were really disappointed in the low standard of the room and had to upgrade to a King We felt that the Premier Inn at Euston was better and felt really let down   Restaurant breakfast choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Full_Review: Rooms were comfortable the maid who made my room was really friendly like every member of the staff The breakfast was complete with lots of things to choose

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It was my partner s very significant birthday and on booking I had requested a room with a view of the river if at all possible as I wanted everything to be perfect On the 6th July 2 days before arrival I received an email offering champagne chocolates rose petals etc at a cost to help celebrate I skimmed it and didn t think any more about it On arrival I was told no rooms with a view were available and I had been sent an email to that effect which I didn t think I had and even if I had how would I cancel and rebook another hotel in London so close to the travel date The receptionist spoke to someone on the phone and asked for executive access I presume to make up for the disappointment I think she was told no and instead gave us four drinks vouchers which we used We were given a small room with a view of an office building on the fourth floor or the option to wait five minutes till 3pm for a room on the 7th which she said also didn t have a view Today I have checked for an email saying no rooms with views were available and couldn t find it By chance I re read the email about champagne and chocolates received on 6th and buried in the middle is general information saying no rooms with views were available but I had missed it It would have been much better to have explained this at the time of booking so as to avoid great disappointment and no option to rebook anywhere else 2 days before arrival time at the height of summer in London For 269 I expected a little better treatment or advanced warning to mitigate disappointment on the day   Comfortable beds pillows very clean bedding large towels quiet Nice plain carpet in hallways no swirls to make your eyes crossed Staff helpful fast and efficient especially at breakfast Wide choice at breakfast fresh and plentiful range very little wait even at peak time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Really good sized rooms Excellent staff extremely helpful and attentive Even during the breakfast rush period the longest wait was less than 5 minutes to be seated and the food was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The shower tended to leak onto the floor because of the design of the shower which led us to using extra towels Wish the trash cans in the room were a little a larger   The staff at the front desk and management were very nice The executive lounge staff were exceptional and they had a lot of nice food offerings during the day The bar and restaurants were nice and the location was primo

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Loved the location beautiful view of the London Bridge from the rooftop lounge Rooms were fantastic and the staff very friendly and helpful We booked the executive queen which gave us access to the executive lounge This included free breakfast happy hour and heavy snacks in the evening Saved us a bundle in meals for our family of four The concierge went above and beyond to help us wirh transportation to Heathrow Would definitely return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: If you don t go to breakfast till 8 AM then you will spend about 20 25 minutes in a queue waiting to enter the breakfast room   Close to a metro station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We went out for the morning afternoon on our first day and by 3 30pm ish our room hadn t been cleaned The staff came around while we were getting ready to go out for the evening but were only able to leave fresh towels and bottles of water I felt that the bartenders in the Sky Lounge could have been friendlier and more welcoming   We forgot to pack toothpaste so we called reception and they sent us up a little complimentary tube The staff on reception were all very friendly and we got cookies on arrival which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The so called room upgrade for my girlfriends 21st seemed useless the room was a lot smaller than when I attended a year beforehand and I even paid more this time Also as pathetic as it sounds we weren t offered anything extra and weren t even given a cookie upon arrival like everyone else   The staff were very helpful when approached with an issue Quick to get everything sorted

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: More check in Check out front of house staff quite a jam up checking in ad out  Hi this was an excellent experience thank you The staff bar none were exemplary and friendly professional and on point Two x tea bags in the teapot for one this is a small thing but very welcome and shows real attention to detail

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No plug socket by bed side on both sides one person felt left out Breakfast seemed too expensive so we didn t bother and ate out instead   Super quick service Easy to sign in and out Room was amazingly clean with great facilities and you get a free cookie each plus the room supplied you with tea and biscuit for the morning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We have been overcharged for the room Although we have managed to sort it out during check out but 200 pounds is still being blocked on my credit card and we left a hotel over a week ago Our pyjamas were hijacked by cleaning staff It took us two days to free them To sum it up we have been expecting a little bit more   Large room good location very helpful staff in the breakfest area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Although the rooms are usually pretty good on this stay I had a room on the second floor with horrible outlook Would not want to stay in this room again particularly at the price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No information in the room about dining options in and around the hotel which would have been a great help to a lone traveller in an unknown area   Very comfortable room Welcoming friendly staff Impressive Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The walls in the corridors rooms looked tired Requested anything special the Hotel could do for my sons 18th birthday as it seemed very expensive for 1 night Toilet in my sons room didn t flush Got nothing even sent the card to me and not my son  Bed really comfy muffins best i have ever tried

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location nice hotel with good amenities and the sky lounge is great on a warm evening The staff were fantastic and all very professional and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The carpets in the corridors and rooms were quite old   Our room had a new bathroom The rooms were really quiet and we slept well in the comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel is situated in a side street seconds away from a tube station and the tower of london On arrival we were welcomed with a warm cookie which is a lovely touch after the stresses of travelling in london The room was clean and well equipped with modern styling A huge bonus for us was the sky lounge rooftop bar Outstanding views of the city with delicious cocktails and a good range of foods available The breakfast is buffet style with a huge range of foods on offer all exceptional quality and delicious initially on booking we did think the additional cost for breakfast was steep We would now urge you to pay the extra Range includes continental full english pancakes muffins and waffles

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff in the restaurant was rude we were aware we had to pay for breakfast and out of nowhere without us asking he approached my boyfriend and made us aware we had to pay We went to celebrate my boyfriends birthday and him making that comment was uncalled for One of the cleaners were also rude as I was trying to explain to her I just walked out of my room and left one bag in there and she accused it not being my room when she saw me walking out of it   The room location and rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was charged 25GBP extra per night as a deposit which i do not still why This was no mentioned anywhere in the conditions Really small rooms   Quiet You can have a proper sleep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Despite taking an Club room the room size was still very small and certainly had no view at all Faced another office building  I like the location of the hotel the restaurants at the hotel and the bar at the top

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: sky bar was amazing in terms of views set up however the service wasn t great 25 minutes waiting for a drink once ordered the girl who looked after us in the end made up for that she was great she was running around like a headless chicken and couldn t be more helpful   very comfy bed beautiful hotel shame that there is no views of london however this didn t spoil our stay the sky bar was amazing loved it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Door in the room had a really big scratch on was unsightly   The staff gave my partner drinks vouchers as it was his birthday The sky lounge is incredibly relaxed We also got 2 hours free late check out because of my partner s birthday

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: prices at bar could be very noisy given complementary token for bar but only for one person and we were two I thought as booked way in advance and explained it was my husbands birthday n a bottle of wine or something in room a little disappointed hoped there may have been a small surprise  bed was lovely all clean and fresh

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I am very disappointed that no one saw fit to inform me that I would need to pay a Congestion Charge for having driven to the hotel especially as the concierge arranged my parking and knew I had not visited London before This has turned into a very costly mistake for me

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room had all the facilities you would want from a hotel I especially liked the computer tv great sound for listening to the radio channels Breakfast was great a very good choice of continental or full English My only problem was that we sat in the lobby which wasn t the problem but the cooked food wasn t hot and the plates were cold But we all enjoyed our breakfasts both mornings On our second morning we had a very nice young in training waiter called Daniel who was very attentive to our needs We have stayed in quite a few hotels in London over the years and I can honestly say this is one of the better ones by far

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: In my booking the breakfast was included when I arrive to have breakfast they told me it was not included then I have to pay for it I have to send the email confirmation to them they had to check and then they allow me I told them if the can give room service fue to the inconvenience they told me yes but I have to pay extra money for it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had 2 rooms booked I asked for them to be together 6 months ago when we arrived they were apart and one room was not ready until nearly 7pm If I wanted one earlier they would have to be on totally separate floors What happend to 3pm check in We were not the only ones waiting I met a couple who walked the streets with their cases until their room was ready Also we booked this hotel for the sky bar only to find out under 18 s were not allowed in after 6pm So my daughters did not even see it After 9pm I could accept but 6pm We ve been all over the world in roof top bars and never come across this   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Expensive  Professional service as you expect Spacious room for London standards equipped with all facilities Excellent beds good location only 100 metres from London tube Tower Hill station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was not what I had booked a king size room for a romantic weekend away including proposal and we walk in to 2 single beds When the manager came to apologise he walked in on my girlfriend getting changed he didn t knock or give warning The room looked nothing like the photos

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: LONG QUEUES AT CHECK IN AND CHECK OUT ONLY 2 PEOPLE ON DUTY AT CHECK OUT BEFORE ARRIVING SPOKE TO HOTEL REQUESTING AS IT WAS MY BIRTHDAY TO SEE IF THERE WERE ANY UPGRADES AVAILABLE WAS TOLD IT WOULD BE PUT ON MY RESERVATION BUT NO MENTION WAS MADE OF THIS ON CHECK IN DISAPPOINTED   VERY CLEAN ROOM LIKED THE ROOFTOP BAR FROM WHICH THE VIEW WAS SUPERB

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only fault We was on the 6th floor and there was a horrible smell from the lift all the way to our room for the whole duration of our stay  Great rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower had good pressure which is always a plus Comfy beds large room and the Apple TV was excellent Loved the location of the hotel Could see Tower Bridge from the rooftop bar Would stay here again in a heart beat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Good breakfast but most B B s do better cold fried eggs are not my thing   Some how we ended up with an accessibility room on the ninth floor I didn t notice this option when I placed the booking on Booking com as it turned out this was a good thing as it gave extra room in the bathroom and bedroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Being offered the choice of a cookie I didn t really want one but felt I had to have it I d rather say no and a donation go to charity   Everything Rooms very quiet Pillows and bedding fantastic Staff extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hallways smelled like a mixture of vomit and urine The carpets need cleaned and there was an area in my room where the carpet was also dirty Couldn t get the smell out The price they want to charge for a breakfast is ridiculous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The upgrade didnt seem value for money not sure what extra i got for it The view wasn t very impressive especially after paying for the upgrade  The roof top bar was a nice place to relax and take in the view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Dirt in the shower smell of egg methane in corridors staff at rooftop bar are not attentive and don t look like they can be bothered   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Roof top bar prices very expensive you always expect to pay a little bit more when you visit London but 15 for a bottle of cider and a corona bit over the top  Comfy bed roof top bar great views of the city cookie on arrival nice breakfast everything was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: there was fusty smell in the corridor  great location just few steps from Metro and Tower Bridge wide range of breakfast nice staff clean large room and bathroom beautiful view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not a big issue but i would have preferred to have the room service menu in print in the room   The staff was very polite and helpful I had a couple of issues that had nothing to do with the hotel itself but had to be resolved and the staff was extremely forthcoming informative and professional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was super comfy Room and bathroom nice and spacious the sky bar is one of the best hotel sky bars I ve been to definitely recommend having a cocktail on the balcony over looking the city Staff very professional knowledgeable and helpful I needed to find a hair dressers for a blow dry and the concierge was extremely helpful Would happily stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room service was awful food terrible Complained as we checked out but didn t seemed to register with the receptionist an just said hope to see you soon We would never stay there again Lift and corridor smelt staff unfriendly  nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was a little dusty although requested twin beds Was only adjusted to twin after my arrival The jam pastry was over cooked and hard More tea coffee milk would of been good  Beds comfy facilities good Was allowed to check in 3 4 hour early The cooked breakfast was tasty The large cookie on arrival was tasty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was VERY small for being a King size room dated rugs were dirty bathroom immensely small using room key for elevator was cumbersome because cards wouldn t work had to have new cards made twice view was fishbowl of everyone else s room staff required us to use them for our luggage transport obviously wanted tips no restaurant on site staff hurried you along didn t get the feeling you were a customer more like cattle Apple TV was a pain couldn t scroll through to see what shows were on had to back out of a channel and try another prepaid room and was double charged at time of registration plus this property had a major identity crisis 1 Name on booking com DoubleTree Hilton another when they sent a reminder registration Best Western and a 3rd name when credit card charged name I never heard of it was like a bait and switch you pay for a Hilton property are given the expectation of a Best Western and wind up with something you never imagined overall would not stay here again   Only thing I liked was the location because my husband wanted to go to the Tower Of London Don t misunderstand the view from the property was zero view of anything but other people s rooms Hello peeping Toms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: As with all London hotels drinks in the bar are hugely overpriced   Friendly staff from reception to housekeeping Great location near underground station historical tourist sites and great bars and restaurants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I would have thought that robes should have been provided The TV Apple computer was not practical as it took too long to load up sometimes froze picture and could only be switched off manually at the back a separate TV is the answer   Very comfy bed sky lounge great good breakfast with quality produce

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We liked the Nature restaurant however the chairs could have been a little more comfortable considering my age 73 Breakfast was very good so were the beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drink prices but expected  There were 5 of us in total and 3 rooms My brother was visiting from New Zealand The rooms were a lovely size we had an accessible room but still suited us fine My brother was upgraded due to noise issue which was appreciated and vouchers for wine and free breakfast the sky lounge is lovely The situation of hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: All good   The car parking concierge Mr Yuri He s the man very good service friendly and also gave me a VIP drinks card to resume at the sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room furniture a little on the spartan side I had to do some work but it wouldn t bother most people   Good location and easy to get to You just need to remember there s a Hilton Tower Hill and a Hilton Tower Bridge The Sky Lounge is pretty good Very pleasant and efficient staff I liked the breakfast and there s enough choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bathroom is a bit outdated for the price the sink did not drain well and the loo flush required a lot of effort to push The apple computer tv is also a bit limited   Super helpful professional and approachable staff very comfortable bed breakfast was worth the extra money It was very quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There are no help call points in the bathroom if you got locked in you are trapped our door handle could be easily pulled out The view from the room was awful overlooking the atrium would suggest asking for a view of the outside or it feels claustrophobic Breakfast was ok had much better though   Beds were very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drink prices and the associated restaurant  Huge king size bed air conditioned room great shower Lovely roof top bar albeit a little pricey and very pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel was so handy to get too Staff were friendly and helpful Rooms are so nice They modern and clean with gorgeous views The sky lounge is lovely with stunning view of London Really enjoyed staying here

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were amazing Could not do enough for us and made us feel like royalty which we certainly aren t The only staff I found not so good was the barman in the sky lounge who made me feel a bit like we shouldn t be there That said though everyone else we encountered were wonderful and made this treat for us truly a wonderful experience Would definitely choose this hotel or a hotel in the same chain when visiting London again which I am next year with my daughter to come and see Hamilton

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We checked in early in the morning so we could leave our overnight bags for the day but on our return at the end of the day when tired we had to stand in a queue for half an hour with all those checking in for the first time who like us earlier were completing forms by hand what is that about in this computer age when bookings are made online Also it would have been nice if we were told how to make the lift work throughout our stay we came across people stuck going up and down in the lift because they couldn t make it stop at the floor they wanted   Biggest plus was the air conditioning which worked very well Bed and pillows comfortable Breakfast enjoyable Nice touch was the cookie given on checking in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Coffee was terrible Room was small and in need of modernisation seemed cheap   Easy location to many tubes and walkable to Thames and other places of interest Comparable price to airbnb in the area Good breakfast cafe not hotel breakfast room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast had plenty on offer but cooked options not very hot and just ok quality   Brilliant room upgrade we were staying as part of a joint birthday celebration and this made our stay extra special Staff friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The location was perfect for sightseeing Tower of London Tower Bridge the Thames St Katherines dock the Gherkin and was 2 minutes from the Tower Hill tube station There are numerous restaurants around the area The Hotel staff were very pleasant and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It was the evening of the terror attacks and were unable to travel back to the hotel because all of central London was in lockdown we called the hotel to ask for assistance and was basically told to get on with it on our own eventually we got back some four hours after the concert had finished to be jumped on by two security staff asking what are you doing When explaining that we re staying here they asked for proof which we duly provided So much for pulling together this didn t happen in Manchester the week previous when terror struck there   Welcome cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We enjoyed our stay but we were a bit disappointed when we found out everyone was given a cookie on check in which we didn t get given  The rooftop bar was great and the views from there were amazing and the rooms were very clean and nicely made up Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: SkyLounge could be a more spaces outside and the Music a Little lower loud  Your breakfast buffe was excellent and had every and more to offer Liked your SkyLounge as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room facilities were fantastic And the sky lounge bar was unbelievable amazing views and tasty cocktails The gift voucher receieved when requesting no cleaners was also a really good idea if only staying for a couple of nights The location was brilliant literally round the corner from Tower Hill tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No faults  The breakfast was excellent with a wide range of options The Queen room was spacious and would be suitable for a couple or single The Sky bar was also superb and had excellent views of Tower bridge and other key landmarks See pictures Really close to local landmarks and not far from Tower Hill tube station which has links to all over London Great base for business or pleasure Really enjoyed my stay I have been before and I would go again without hesitation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed could be bigger and we would have preferred two blankets instead of a big one Breakfast is a bit overpriced but still good   The room was quite big with enough space for all our stuff Good hairdryer many mirrors It is located very close to metro service Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location 2 minute walk from Tower of London sky bar fantastic views and really comfortable to relax Staff made my mum s 70 birthday really special thankyou

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The bed was very comfortable and the staff were excellent The sky lounge at the property was fantastic The staff gave us complimentary drinks as it was a birthday celebration

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Fitness room is small not well equipped no view Breakfast is expensive Reading light is too bright  Kompetenter Concierce Apple screen A variety of teas in room Nice toiletries

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lift floor selection key card situation is ridiculous It causes everybody problems Please upgrade this to something better like contactless   Great business hotel Clean professional and fantastic location Breakfast is good but no great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not a huge fan of pre cooked breakfast ordinary Cooked to order specialities scrambled egg and smoked salmon for example better   comfortable room good temperature control good location staff friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough staff on reception desk in the morning around 09 00 hrs when there were lots of people checking out which caused considerable delays  The staff at breakfast were very friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Window looked into the rear if another building  Lovely room everthing you need for our stay very good air conditioning selection of food was great Nice helpful staff Nice touch with the free cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Cost for room size shocking noisy air con in rooms Exec lounge is a waste of time breakfast was cold and no range of foods   The sky lounge but highly over priced

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I wasn t sure why I had a hold put on my card for the mini bar in the room Why not add that to the bill when you check out Happy to take money straight from me but takes over 5 days to give my money back when I never use a mini bar Following the attack in London our friends were told to evacuate the hotel no regard for the safety of the none guests I wasn t happy knowing they were walking home and past where the incident was When you hear hotels giving free beds to people and cabs free fairs yet here people were told to leave   Staff were very friendly and helpful Breakfast was good too Rooms well equip and bed were comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast was cold The pillow in the room was not very comfy The Apple TV looks good but the volume was rubbish couldn t hear very well and was on 100   The room was lovely clean and bathroom nice Staff were very pleasant and helpful Sky lounge is lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Pillows were poor quality The bed kept moving as it s wheels were still placed and not locked The buzzer for the parking was not working  Underground parking was safe

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It is really strange that they blocked 75 per each night on my credit card and the amount is still blocked after more than 3 weeks   The breakfast is really excellent The room was spacious well eqipped iron ironing board hair dryer Apple TV functioning as a computer as well keyboard mouse towels are extremely soft Quick checkout Kind staff at reception desk especially on arrival Close to underground station beautiful historical surrounding

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I stayed with sister who uses a wheelchair as she has limited mobility We had booked a standard room however when we arrived the check in staff offered us the option of an adapted room at no extra cost We didn t take them up on this offer only because it wasn t necessary the room we had booked was very spacious I was able to manage with the chair and the shower in the room was easily accessible for my sister During our stay we ate at the hotel restaurant as it was only a short distance we didn t take the wheelchair however a member of staff saw that my sister struggled walking and came over and advised that they had a wheelchair we could use if needed The friendliness of the staff and the assistance they provided from check in to check out was brilliant above and beyond any expectations They even took the time to show me the best routes to places on the tube etc that I would manage with the wheelchair

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It is part of a large hotel chain so if looking for something along the boutique hotel line there are better choices   Great location and easy access to public transport The Natural Kitchen restaurant part of the hotel was superb with fresh tasty and innovative food We could not fault the service of staff who were attentive and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Gorgeous rooms and good value for the price we paid Lovely breakfast good quality fresh ingredients with loads of choice and very friendly accommodating staff Nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room wasn t as big as expected but very comfy and clean   Lovely staff Great service when needed Great fridge in the room for keeping our champagne

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only gripe was at breakfast good quality coffee but served not hot enough when asked for coffee to be changed it still came back not hot enough   Quality and choice of breakfast Staff very helpful Cleanliness Location of Hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: At breakfast I didn t like the look of the scrambled egg so I didn t try it I would have preferred freshly cooked eggs rather than from the buffet but apart from that I did really enjoy the breakfast   Really liked the bedroom design and the particularly the shower room The bedroom could have been slightly bigger but had everything we needed The sky bar was very enjoyable The restaurant was good It might be good to have a dining option rather than just one restaurant for dinner The reception staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I didn t like the 75 put on the credit card at checkin for credit in the hotel even though you get it back at the end I d prefer if this was not the case I ve stayed in over a hundred hotels and have never had this happen I m all for efficiency but this suggests a trust issue towards customers   Loved the location two minute walk from tube Very clean comfortable rooms great air conditioning 28 degrees when we were there and excellent shower Sky bar very nice in the evening Complementary cookie a nice touch We did not eat at all in the hotel so can t comment Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast room too small for the number of guests Having to queue even at times which were said to be the least busy   Great location and really good food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed had wheels on it and moved every time you tried to sit on it   The bed was really comfortable and there were a good selection of tea coffee available in the room The location was good there was a good range of pubs bars and restaurants within a 5 minute walking distance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: TV was a computer monitor small and poor sound You have to insert the key card in a slot in the lift to get to the floors with the rooms In the first hour I had 3 different keys as they kept failing in the lift   Shower was good Bed excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The view wasn t very good as we kind of faced a brink wall  the location was fantasic room an ok size the bed was comfortable liked that the room came with a hairdryer iron and ironing board A safe and a fridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Convenient location for the our weekend break close to tourist attractions with plenty of restaurants within walking distance All staff very friendly and helpful Warm cookies on arrival was a welcome addition

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Double charged for room Queen room was not queen Curtains would not fully pull over House keeping kept intruding without knocking while do not disturb sign was up Was told the payment did not go through and was then told we were double charged Rooms were sub standard Lifts had a mind of their own No stairs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Extremely poor organisation of busy hotel Very poor access to room only four lifts for over 1000 guests all guests complaining about lifts not responding well to usage 15 minute queue for breaksfast  Clean comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t find the staff overly keen to help and the view from the room wasn t great   Close to the tower of London and rooftop terrace was nice Found checking in and parking mildly stressful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I did not like being approach by two women who were not guests at the hotel on the elevator at night You can guess what they suggested Seems very low class and low security for this type of hotel to allow such easy access   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast not included Our room was upgraded and didn t seem any better than a standard room Glad I didn t pay for the upgrade as I would have been very disappointed   Location was good rooms clean but small Rooftop bar was also lovely of an evening

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very corporate staff could not operate outside the box Went into meltdown over me having a debit card and not a credit card and had to call the manager to charge me the room up front Get over it guys I booked via booking com so you had my details Made to feel like I was about to rob the place Thanks  Great central location for tower bridge bank and surrounding areas

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough lifts for amount of customers Wasnt told how to check out   Good breakfast choices Quiet Location was good and tube station not far away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing not to like slight confusion about having a paper delivered to the room in the morning but immediately resolved so no issues there   I booked for the O2 and to be close to the West End via Tube or River Taxi so it met this criteria Great breakfast and friendly staff Booked well in advance and got a good deal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Loved the warm cookies as checking in The sky lounge is lovely too with great views over the city The room was clean and comfortable The staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No USB charger ports next to the bed I had to charge my phone in the back of a iMac which is on the otherside of the room There is also no Bath which for 319 00 was disappointing  Good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing I didn t like  The cookie when you first arrived and the staff were very friendly when we checked in the man serving kept the surprise I had for my Fianc quiet and didn t mention it in front of her

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The inhouse breakfast buffet was extensive and delicious The restaurant attached to the Hotel was fantastic and the sky bar a great place to have a cocktail Very close to multiple transport options Tube DLR and ferries why I chose it in first place

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks a bit overpriced in sky lounge so found our selfs doing a lot of drinking off premises otherwise delighted with everything else  Breakfast and location spot on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wi Fi service is no good Room card is no functional Electrical concent is different type and no service anything It is smell from floor and room carpet Long queue for the breakfast   Hotel is closed in Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Key didn t work half empty bottles was still in the fridge staff don t explain everything when you check in i ve seen so many people struggle to use the lift at the breakfast some hot foods were cold and agin staff could of do better job there   Close to underground view from the skylounge view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Adding 25 onto the bill incase you order room service It was later deducted but was unexpected Being charged 1 99 for service in the sky lounge after waiting at the bar for 10 mins while staff ignored us   Great breakfast Sky lounge is a nice concept Friendly and helpful staff in reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I asked for something personal to be left in our room for his birthday manager contacted me via email to confirm but this never happened which was a shame considering we were staying in the best room of the whole entire hotel   Sky lounge and access to executive lounge We also stayed in the suite which was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Issue about which card I used to reserve room Embarrassing misleading and unnecessary Also Booking com failed to clearly state that breakfast was NOT included  Location and overall

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Re the vouchers for 5 that are available if you forego housekeeping A good idea in principle BUT the hotel needs to make it more clear as to when and where these vouchers can be used The voucher says that it can be used in the Sky bar as well as 7 lounge area where breakfast is also served However it transpires that the vouchers can not be used against the cost of breakfast in the 7 Lounge The voucher should say this   Sky bar Size of rooms Reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: waiting to book in at reception to many people waiting but not due to the efficiency of the staff they worked as quick as possible  Great breakfast serving staff brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were exceptionally welcoming and courteous Room was very comfortable and clean Hotel was very well placed for our our plans including sight seeing tube station places to eat not withstanding the hotel s own food places and within walking distance of where we wanted to be Very little noise Storage of luggage even after checking out was handled very well The cookie on arrival was lovely but not good if you are allergic to nuts

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Hotel bar prices were a bit steep even for London  The bed was really large and the room was well appointed with robes hospitality tray and ironing board

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were really helpful and friendly I would definately come to this hotel and recomend to others we enjoyed everything about our stay especially the sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
