Full_Review: Rooms may have a bit too much furniture in as floor space is a bit limited in the exec double rooms but manageable Exec lounge on ground floor is a bit naff and had a better experience in the sky lounge despite having to pay for the wine no reason why you could not run the free drinks thing in the lounge using your hotel key card   Great location and superb sky lounge Great breakfast on offer Quiet room and a comfy bed and good wifi for work stuff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Hotel carpark was very difficult to get into and my husband curbed his alloy wheels on his very new car I tried to cancel my booking for 2 rooms 5 minutes after making it I was told that I would still have to pay as it was less than 24 hours before we were due to arrive So they would only charge for one room I said we would still honour the booking and go after all I was still charged for the cancellation although it was eventually sorted out They said as a good will gesture they wouldn t charge me for the cancellation When I hadn t cancelled after all this was more than a little annoying Especially after ruining the alloy wheels in the car park   Rooms comfortable and clean Beds comfortable wifi good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I thought the actual bedroom would of been a bit more luxurious looking This was for my husbands 40th birthday and to be honest I have stayed in premier inns that have looked more impressive but it was absolutely spotless   The breakfast was amazing as was the cookie on arrival Very polite staff easy and quick check in The bathroom was lovely and clean The bar on the roof was lovely with amazing views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were very friendly and helpful Quick check out is a good thing too The restaurant adjoining is really good too The room was serviced every day which was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Handed out cookies with nuts in Not brilliant as my family member had a nut allergy   Bed was very comfortable Staff on the desk were very helpful The facilities in the room were amazing We were very pleased with the size of the room too The location was perfect for our trip

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was supposed to be 59 off but I don t believe that to be true due to how plain and basic it was We paid 150 with the discount but didn t end up sleeping there as it was such a depressing feeling room We came home by cab as our house has a nicer feel And it was my birthday treat we had a nice meal at gaucho and came home   The sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 3 oclock check in would be better earlier and a earlier check out as bags are being stored for you so no need for room after 10 00 on check out day  Love the fact that even though check in wasn t until 3 we managed to check in early Also baggage storage was great so we could explore without carrying heavy bags around

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not as nice as other Hiltons I have stayed in room very small and basic but I think for the price and location this is to be expected in London Also paid for a King Room but was 2 single beds pushed together which was poor   Breakfast was nice high quality of food Good location close to Tower Hill Station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast was very poor Stone cold all had to be sent back Scrambled egg I m sure was powder the mushrooms were tinned not fresh Disappointed   Excellent location loved the sky lounge Expensive put worth every penny as a real treat experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Tv was a bit small and sound couldn t be turned up very loud so was hard to hear when in bed   Bed was big and comfortable Room was very large and had everything we needed Staff were very helpful and checkin was excellent We got a freshly baked cookie on arrival which was a really nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: View from Standard room was of building next door But if paid more would have had better view I presume   Booked a standard queen room here as had to be at London City Airport in the morning Relatively basic and compact but clean Good size room for London city centre Close to DLR and underground I asked for a quiet room when booking and this was accommodated well Staff on reception were helpful and pleasant Breakfast at 8 30 on a Saturday was busy but I was served quickly and with a smile

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having to queue for breakfast was a bit of a pain But staff were very apologetic also the lifts were a bit of a drag seemed to take ages to arrive a correct level  Great choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bathroom was basic lacking a good supply of toiletries and small Price of the room exspensive even for London Coffee facilities basic no machine 1 small bottle of water and an empty fridge   The room was comfortable good facilities comfy bed and a suitable office desk space and computer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They had no record of my booking with Booking com just as well I had my print out V v expensive 420 for a tiny room a bit like a premier in Booking com didnt say breakfast was included and neither did check in Only found out on check out Wouldnt stay again   Bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Service I requested earlier check in which didnt happen and I d traveled 10 hours with no sleep to get to the hotel   The overall appearance of the hotel was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I had an incident 608 08 05 17 This caused me great shock and some upset this also caused an inconvenience upon celebrating the 40th birthday of my partner The pillows could be better   Cleanliness

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Asked the hotel to make an exception on reserving a parking space due to the value and required quick access to items in the vehicle to be given the standard response about first come first served then when we arrived they told us ah it s fine to just park your car here no problem shame we d already made alternative arrangements The bar staff seemed a little disinterested to say the least   The location of the hotel is great right next to tower bridge near enough right in the city Great place to explore from Not a lot of bars etc right next to it but that s not what I was there for on this trip Check in was quick and easy and the gentleman at reception was extremely polite and helpful Nice and clean and comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: cold buffet breakfast eggs beans all luke warm I also asked for de caf tea bags twice but none appeared and 2 wine glasses Staff member came up to the room with tea bags but not de caf and no wine glasses I went to reception after phoning twice and got my own tea bags and wine glasses I also expected more in the king suite we were in The bath was small and the room not as luxurious as portrayed on the web site disappointed and would not pay for a suite again as feel no better than a double room  location for the tower of london tower bridge and the walk to the Tate Modern is excellent Staff are friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was great breakfast very good only complaint it states that the room is soundproof yet we could hear the Girls in the next room talking kept us awake for quite a while also you could hear people walking past talking

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t like that the room we stayed in had a adjoining door to another room And we didn t get a cookie on arrival   The hotel was lovely and very modern enjoyed the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Internet is free for one day then costs By channels are minimal and the coffee and tea making facilities in the room are poor   Great location good sized room and lovely bed Everything was clean and felt new and stylish

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Welcomed with a warm chocolate cookie the experience was top class I had a great time at this hotel and visited lots locally with lots of history surrounding this property it s in the prime location for exploring The staff at the hotel were willing to assist and always on hand I requested extra pillows and they were in my room in a flash I couldn t have been happier with this property and would rate it highly in all aspects when I checked out they were even then still more than happy to hold my luggage whilst I explored my last day in the city when I returned to collect my luggage there was no problem at all everybody was smiling and happy to assist

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast wasn t great thought there was room for improvement the serving tools was all mixed up and the bacon wasn t really fit for purpose   Yes the hotel was great I really enjoyed my stay parking was excellent the only downside was the breakfast thought things had been around longer than they should have been i e bacon it was a shame but it wouldn t stop me from staying again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Leaving the bags was quite a hectic process perhaps everything is a big close to main reception which makes it slightly confusing as people queuing for reception and leaving luggage When we checked in the second time and the room was ready we were greeted by a different receptionist who said that as my husband was 70 a room next to the lift had been allocated The implication was due to his age rather than it was an amazing room This was disappointing   The location of the hotel is ideal easy access to everywhere Breakfast was very busy but staff did a great job to run an efficient service Food was very good Room was comfortable I had a planned a big surprise party on the river and informed the hotel When we checked in and left our bags we were greeted by a very pleasant receptionist who was excited about my husband s birthday and implied that they were going to allocate the best room they could We went off rather excited about the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The check in is a 15 00 3 p m which is a very weird time and in most situation not convenient at all At least you can still leave your bags at the front desk   We had a room on the 10th floor The room was clearly recently renovated so everything felt new It was very clean and I rarely say this There s what you need bed small desk a chair without all the unnecessary things like a bed cover that you don t what to do with The breakfast was quite nice The hotel is 2min from Tower Hill station so it s very convenient The classic welcome cookie is very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I did not like the lift system it was a very long wait for your lift to come to your Level  The staff where very helpful on the reception desk The location was great and the Apple computer set up and Tv was a great touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were completely inefficient complete lack of communication in fact I would go as far as to say complete disregard for communication prior to visit during visit and after visit Made promises they did not keep   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Waited 20 mins to check in which after a long journey was disappointing Prices of the drinks especially in the rooftop bar were ridiculous  The hotel was immaculate Great location Choice of bars were great and the rooftop bar terrace was excellent but very expensive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was very small for the price   The location of the hotel to historical sites in London It is also two blocks from the underground which helps connect travelers to the rest of the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I asked for some extras to be out in the room as it was for my boyfriends birthday but when we went to the room nothing I had asked for was there I was very disappointed as I was assured it would be in the room  Daniel on reception was fantastic We went for my boyfriends birthday and he made it extra special the shower was amazing And so was the pillows The fridge In the room was a nice touch too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lifts not enough for the amount of people using them The system of call has to be improved One morning we had to wait 15 minutes to get to the ground floor from the second floor   Kindness of the staff Very confortable bed Good wi fi Skylounge view top Hall very cool

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The 4 lifts at peak times had large queues and stairs not next to the lifts Lift system not sensible at all Have to put card in slot in lift to access bedroom levels then press button Even then it didn t always take you to the level you needed we were on level 10 we ended up going back down again despite pressing the button lift was often full but stopped at every level going down And sometimes up Frustrating You can request not to have housekeeping and then you get a voucher for the bar Great idea but they still came in and changed the whole bed and did the housekeeping then knocked on the door for an unknown reason the day of departure rather early Strange Also changed the bar of soap each day Why What a waste Keep it there   Very comfortable bed and nice room The executive lounge facilities were fantastic strong coffee or tasty hot chocolate and food snacks Glad I chose this option and well worth it Was also be able to grab a take away coffee before heading out the door too Staff very friendly and helpful and welcome cookie the best I have tasted warm too Very clean hotel and good layout with lots of space to sit Would come back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The fact that the breakfast was not in the price   Didn t have breakfast cost in with the room Expensive to buy if you just want a light breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: the hotel is in a great location to one of the major attractions in London and Tower Hill underground is only a 100 yards from the hotel the staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge and the city bar was nice Rooms was very well equipt All appliances in the room was a good quality as apposed what you usually get Onsite parking is a pro but not always guaranteed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The food in the restaurant probably one off On the whole satisfactory   We liked the accommodation the breakfast was good Didn t like the food in the resturant the chicken dish was overcooked and my wife find it very hard to chew The manager offered another alternative dish free of charge My fish n chips was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were excellent full marks to their customer service training Loved the location just a few minutes walk from the Tower of London Great views from the Sky Bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lengthy check in due to receptionist taking phone calls while serving me Very loud air con Empty minibar   Apple television with internet access was a very nice touch Very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in and out was very laboured with lengthy queues each time and members of Hilton Honours being taken out of queues and prioritised Perhaps they should have a separate check in desk to make them feel special and the majority of the other guests wanted Lifts were also poor and the use of cards for bedroom floors made matters worse With many stairwells between floors the extra security measure appears unnecessary One lift of four was out of action both days to make matters worse   Great location within very short walk of underground stations Breakfast was excellent and rooms spacious and well equipped

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel took 50 out of my account without informing me why It was apparently for admin fee that was refundable but I haven t received it  The hotel took 50 out of my account without informing me why It was apparently for admin fee that was refundable but I haven t received it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was very busy staff were slow If it s a bank holiday make sure more staff are working Check in queue was also long Not much variety for vegetarians   Location was perfect Nice and comfortable bed Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Excellent place in alone on opposite Tower Bridge The hotel was brilliant breakfast was really good but busy the staff cold not do enough for you and the position was fabulous for the tube as th Circle line was 100 metres away and took you everywhere 3 day a Oyster pass the way to go for the tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Friendly staff location very handy for Tower Hill Tube DLR Line plenty of places to eat drink near by Excellent London Marathon Hotel early breakfast route passes the Tower Of London Tower Bridge two minutes from Hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Horrendous bar prices   Just excellent customer service all through great breakfast food quality very good front desk very helpful loved the warm cookies on arrival just a great experience We have stayed here once before some years ago enjoyed it then its still very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t have connecting rooms ready so we had a long wait while they sorted it and then we ended up in a small room while the kids got a suite   Helpful staff nice welcome with freshly baked cookies good breakfast selection well located

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Pillows were not good for me apparently you can ask for others but I didn t know that until check out   Nice touches like having a computer in the room although this doubled as the TV and the screen was a little small good sized room and nice toiletries not the usual cheap tat Quiet at night Also the breakfast was excellent and we were given a cookie on arrival slightly random but nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Computer screen is a little small to use as a TV shower heat was temperamental Drinks at the SkyLounge bar are extraordinarily expensive   V large and comfy bed friendly staff who offer quick and professional service No TV but an iMac in each room which has TV enabled as well as the limited use of the computer if you need it Air con was very effective 5 bar voucher if you refuse turn down service Free cookies at the reception desk SkyLounge bar is beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: air conditioning wasnt up to the task of cooling the big room iMac doesnt have an HDMI port so cant use streaming services   free wifi nice bar on the 12th floor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms small and very long walk to lifts The sky bar was fabulous   Staff was very helpful especially when checking in Concierge was great wurst recently mmendations and directions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Expensive parking rate   Very friendly staff and clean atmosphere The Sky Lounge is a convenient place to have a relaxing evening in a stylish surrounding

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The rooms are too small and bathrooms are really tiny   The sky lounge is wonderful Night View of Tower Bridge is amazing from sky lounge Staff is really friendly We spent most of our evening time at sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They never mentioned how to use the lift with my key card so it took several goes to work it out The Mac Book instead of a TV doesn t really work it is very far away from the bed and the screen is small my speakers weren t working and when I tried to use it as a computer it said that the wireless keyboard and mouse weren t connected despite the keyboard and mouse not being wireless and being connected so I gave up and used my laptop but the wifi was very good   The receptionist that checked me in was very welcoming and we ended up having quite a lengthy chat which was lovely The room was really nice The bed was very big with lots a fluffy pillows I slept like a baby I loved all the choice of teas how all the soaps etc are provided in the bathroom and the ironing board iron and shoe polish cloth came in very useful The bathroom was very clean and spacious but the toilet doesn t flush very well The breakfast had lots of choice the fresh fruit was really nice The hotel is 2 min walk from Tower Hill station and right by the Tower of London my meeting was in Westminster so the tube journey was about 15min They let me leave overnight bag in their cloakroom from 9am 6pm after I checked out which I was grateful for

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only two faults for me in the bedrooms there didn t seem to be any extraction from the bathroom which meant smells pervaded everywhere The second was the breakfast the tea and the hot food was lukewarm at best and cold at worse   The biscuits on arrival were great the staff were really friendly perfect location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I am allergic to lavender and they have lavender in all of their soaps etc so I had to use my face wash to wash my hands When I asked if they had any alternative the response was No That s it Not even a Sorry we ve left poison in every possible toilet   The bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Roof top bar would have preferred a more relaxing experience to enjoy the view not banging music  Great location next to Tower of London quieter than other areas I ve stayed in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: the staff were extremely helpful we had an issue with the shower access and they immediately found us a new room that fit our needs will definitely use this hotel chain again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff very unhelpful found staff to be abrupt Concierge wasn t helpful at all 30 to park car then struggle with luggage no offer of assistance 4 rating is laughable never again   Clean tidy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The rooms I would compare to a premier in other than the mac computer the beds was terrible there was no comfort in it what so ever me and my partner hardly slept and left by 8am the next morning we was going to stay up London for the day but had to go home as we had no sleep   The sky lounge bar was a really good asset

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The scrambled eggs were soggy The seating was really tight for breakfast and the volume of people that come I think its understaffed during busy time Calling for guest service help before checking in was impossible to get ahold of them because they are so busy so some tours I was unable to do because I didnt know who to get information from due to hotel guest services to busy  breakfast was good Staff was polite enjoyed the welcome cookie

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Views from the bedroom were pretty ordinary poor but that didn t matter to us   The staff were very friendly and helpful The location was superb just 3 minutes from the tube It s a great central London location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing All good   The cookie on arrival was delicious The rooms were absolutely spotless I felt like I was the first person to ever use the shower So clean everywhere The location was perfect Staff were all so helpful friendly smiley

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They couldn t cope with breakfast dining room was too small to accommodate the guests the waiting time was very long Any more than 2 guests and they had a meltdown   Sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: air conditioning was quite noisy housekeeping banged on the door at 8 15 am There was a ong wait for the lifts every time I used them and lots of people coming and going past midnight visiting the Sky Lounge   The location right by the Tower of London is ideal for business and leisure I was able to enjoy the view from Tower Bridge while walking to my meetings Very handy for tube and buses south bank restaurants etc Delighted to find an ironing board and iron in the room as well as a free bottle of water

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We supposedly had a deluxe queen room and it was nice but to be honest it was no bigger or any better than your average travel lodge withthe exception of a few handy toiletries   As you walk in the lobby is very impressive and you immediately think you are going to have an amazing stay The staff are welcoming but at the end of the day for us it was the room that counted and it was disappointing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only tiny criticism was that the music in the Skylounge was rather too loud for a venue where people were primarily conversing rather than dancing The fantastic view over the Tower of London and Tower Bridge meant that i didnt really mind the music though   Staff were amazing the standard of service was very high nothing was too much trouble Breakfast was excellent as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was very very poor for the price Cheap furnishings no TV A computer monitor that had limited channels I understand after staying there it was a business hotel but the quality of the room was 3 star at the very best very disappointed and as it was a holiday week we had no choices or I would have refused to accept the room Extremely disappointed I have stayed in Doubletree and Hilton this was not even Motel 6 room wise Everything else was acceptable restaurant for breakfast was okay   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Disappointed to pay 125 for a very late booking and to be given room designed for clients with mobility issues This would never be an issue if advised at time of booking but gave a feeling that filling a room was more important than client experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms were clean staff all very helpful The hotel sky bar is excellent but pricey but what do you expect in London All rooms have an Apple Mac in them which is handy for making plans in the city and checking the maps for your trip

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: we had to ask for our room to be cleaned the next day It was done quite fast when asked however after a full day site seeing and coming back aprox 4pm I would have thought it should have been cleaned by this time lifts were a nightmare There was four lifts two broke during our weekend stay They were very unpredictable you would be waiting a while and then multiple time would go past you Many people trying to squeeze into a lift as they had been waiting so long Still really enjoyed our stay just a few things that could have been improved   I liked how it was so close to the tube lots of places to eat and tower bridge Room on arrival was clean was given complimentary drinks as it was our wedding anniversary and had great views from the roof top bar Cookie on arrival was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: View from room adjacent building below scaffolding Price of drinks include service charge No toilet paper in bathroom crumbs of food on chair   Great location Roof terrace with great views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Big issue was that we were given key cards to an occupied room We walked in and were shocked to find open bags and that definitely affected our stay What if someone walks into our room at any time Also the bed was small   Excellent location good staff modern fit out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Indecent haste to clear our breakfast table when we had not finished our meal but had gone back to buffet for something more to eat This happened on each day We returned to the table and had to reorder beverages and cutlery We found this rather annoying as we could not relax because the breakfast was otherwise excellent We felt the pricing was rather steep for tourists with no company to pick up the expenses tab We would love to stay there more often but could not afford to do so   Staff excellent and very attentive Reception welcoming and efficient Our room was just about perfect for our needs and very comfortable Location ideal for a tourist due to the proximity to the Tower of London The views from rooftop bar superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Long queue to check in no bath no staircase wait for lift all the time the view out of my window  I liked the bar on the top floor I like my Mac in the room and its sound system

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Confusion with payment when leaving money was paid at time of checking in but staff were saying he would charge our card again when checking out You have to pay an extra 25 a night just incase you use room service this should be completely optional and they don t serve pints of beer in any of there bars just all bottles which is quiet annoying especially when you like a pint   The skybar was excellent great views of London at night and by day location excellent just next to tube station and close to Towerhill plenty of bars and restaurants close by

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only gripe is there were no rooms with city views Minor however   Perfect location able to get anywhere in London in no time at all Rooms were comfortable and immaculately clean Skylounge was stunning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had a party of 20 booked in to the SkyLounge for lunch and it was really really disappointing The staff were lovely but totally overstretched The food was disappointing Caesar salad a romaine lettuce sliced in half and sprinkled with a hard boiled egg and some dried up chicken Long long wait for drinks which arrived in fits and starts We had booked in advance and therefore the size of the party was known before we arrived I do feel that if a restaurant can t cope with a large party size they should say so   Rooms and room facilities were just what we expected although one of the rooms was an internal room and very hot Reception staff were lovely and very helpful Location and views are good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Everything was top notch   Lovely staff Crisp white sheets on a comfy bed and everything we needed in the bathroom loved the Crabtree Evelyn toiletries Breakfast was very good lots of choice hot cooked food too and no soggy toast in sight Delicious croissants and pastries and an excellent bread selection too To top it all the view over London from the Sky lounge is fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was spotlessly clean and the bed was super comfy The rooftop bar was amazing you got a great view of London The staff were very friendly and helpful Loved the warm cookie you got on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No complaints  Spacious comfortable room with temperature controls Small refrigerator in room very welcome for storing drinks Easy access to tube and around the corner from Tower Bridge and Tower of London Amazing breakfast with loads of choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Would like a little more tea coffee etc in the room Having to use room key for the lift was a little irritating   The welcome cookie was delicious The room was clean and comfortable Location was perfect for sightseeing trip The rooftop bar was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Waiting times at check in were too long We were asked to the counter but the receptionist ran away and asked us to wait Guests that were behind us in line were then served before us by other receptionist   The warm chocolate cookies at check in were great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Sky bar was quite expensive however we happily drank in there most of the weekend  Rooms were perfect for what we needed Sky bar is lovely and amazing views of the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lifts were a bit of a pain to operate and the volume on the i mac wasn t very loud in our room but other than that a brilliant hotel   Brilliant friendly staff food excellent and a nice quiet hotel and comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 1 member of bar staff at skylounge arrogant and rude The guy that shakes the cocktails loved himself and let our experience down unfortunately  Everybody was amazing made us feel so welcome Sky lounge bar views spectacular Food amazing worth every penny Location perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Huge queues for breakfast Fortunately we got up early 7 30 hotel did warn in advance but did feel a little rushed as you could see the huge queues waiting On a Sunday there is the option of skipping breakfast and paying 10 to have brunch in the sky lounge which includes mimosas Which I think if I went again I would do instead   Fantastic location clean friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No food or room service after 11pm No view hard to find even sat nav failed to get us there and we hopped into taxi   Breakfast great Staff nice very efficient Rooms clean neat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Pillows were rubbish Avoid breakfast in the executive lounge not much choice food wasn t that warm slow turnover Eat breakfast in the main restaurant yes it s busier but much better  Great hotel stayed on many occasions Fantastic bar great rooms modern clean feel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No comments on this one as everything was perfect   Absolutely helpful and very friendly staff from the reception area to restaurant Spotless rooms and perfect location Made our stay very enjoyable bearing in mind it was both our birthdays An amazing experience like we haven t had in a while The building is very beautiful and the sky lounge is stunning But Definitely the staff adds up to an already magical stay Thanks for everything

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: N A  Having an iMac in the room was nice as we were able to check our emails and watch our YouTube playlists as well as having access to the regular tv channels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: check in and check out far too slow  Lovely hotel in an excellent location Bed really comfortable great night sleep Breakfast excellent huge choice and great for kids

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms were spacious and comfortable staff were attentive and the breakfast was amazing Couldn t fault it everything was great Location was good too as 2 min walk from the tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was far too hot and the air conditioning wasn t very good We upgraded to a queen room but couldnt tell much difference from the standard room   Love the location and the roof top bat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was awful Very poor quality and limited selection for the money The size of the restaurant is far too small for the volume of guests resulting in very long queues and waiting time just to get in When you do get a table you are practically sat on your neighbours lap By all means stay here but book room only and eat at one of the many quality restaurants in the vicinity   Nice warm cookie on check in was an unexpected treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Like a lot of London hotels now seems to be geared more towards lone business travellers than couples families Only small niggles such as volume on the computer TV didn t work not bath etc Everything was very compact no sense of space   The room was very clean staff were very polite and helpful and the breakfast was excellent Hotel is in an excellent location right by the tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Despite the security provided by card key access to guest floors via the lift elevator a person with intent can easily piggy back a ride or use accessible staircases Not good bearing in mind the recent tragic events in London   The pro activeness of staff in their immediate recognition that Saturday morning breakfast was becoming really busy and opened a second breakfast facility without hesitation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check out took a wile Someone and used our room number to pay for their drinks on the rooftop bar and we has to stand was ages with the receptionist checked threw all the recipts to make sure we hadnt signed it Its ridiculous that someone can even get away with doing that bar staff should be more careful Also they hold money on your bank card even tho i was paying cash and it can take 15 days to go back into your bank account   The roof top bar during the day when it was quiter less potentious people durying the day Large comfy beds Free cookies Very close to tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Ideally placed hotel to visit Tower Bridge and the Tower of London Lots of restaurants around Our room didn t have the view but up on 12th floor in the bar the views were brilliant A lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Smoking on the roof top bar there should be a non smoking zone for those who do not wish to smoke   Very conscientious staff and even an iMac in your room to help you plan your trip Hotel is located 1 minute walk away from Tower Hill tube station so easily accessible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The location was absolutely perfect for what we needed however for a tourist there to see the sights I would not recommend it Brilliant if you are on a Business trip Just beware that on weekends the area surrounding it is extremely quiet and some shops are not open at all It is very close to the tube station however it is a bit of a trek if heading to Oxford Street Leicester Square as the tube line it is on does not go there directly   We loved the free cookies on arrival The rooms are very modern minimal and clean It was less than 5 minutes walk from Tower Hill train station and the Tower of London The staff were very friendly and accommodating The hotel had a lovely swanky feel to it and the views from the Skylounge were lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I didn t like the 12 5 service charge When I buy two royal mojitos costing 26 and then have to pay 12 5 on top of that is just scandalous I don t like tipping and not because I m tight it s just that I believe you should pay your staff a fair amount and not make them work harder for tips to make their wages better Just my opinion   I loved the views from the sky bar It made our stay that little bit more special as it was romantic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lovely hotel great location beside the underground Love the warm cookie on arrival as we were hungry breakfast was ok My partner had a fry which he said wasn t great I had the porridge which was terrible But loved the fresh fruit and pastries The bar on level 12 is beautiful with great views but didn t enjoy it as it took us 25mins to get a drink and it was not that busy We had to watch the barmen show off for an unnecessarily long period of time while they made cocktails Would not go back to the bar again as a result of this

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Would have preferred more of a wine selection in the Executive Lounge Maybe some rose Also no ice machine on 9th floor  Ideal for me as get train to Fenchurch Street station Not far from underground so easy to get anywhere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was very small for the price and it was very warm to warm to sleep   We were allowed access to our room early We had complimentary drinks due to a request not being carried out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only downside was bag misplaced for a few moments due to being separated from other luggage and view from hotel looked out to a scaffolding where buildings outside could see right into room  The bed was really comfy and staff was really professional Amazing views from sky bar well worth price of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Excellent service as we were upgraded to the executive room Got free access to the executive lounge and breakfast The staff on reception made the stay exceptional for my partners 30th

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was an extensive amount of breakfast items available however the staff didn t appear to be able to keep up with the demand on the hot breakfast buffet This meant that we had to wait 10 minutes to get any eggs to go with our English Breakfast by which time the rest of the items were cold   Check in and check out process and the general customer service experience was great They clearly train their staff to a very high standard

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge nice views but definitely overpriced poor cocktails   friendly and helpful staff clean and comfortable rooms and definitely the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing really   Breakfast was amazing The widest selection of food I have ever come across in a hotel and of the best quality too The rooms were so clean it was like everything was brand new and had never been used The location was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Allergens not listed on items available at the breakfast buffet so unless I asked someone which isn t easy at a busy breakfast I couldn t eat all of the food   Good clean facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bar staff in the sky lounge are rude no thank yous no eye contact threw my change on the counter payed for a late check out only too be woken up at 9am by maids banging doors in the corridor When I asked the lady too stop banging doors she looked at me didn t apologise and walked straight into another room For the price we paid for this hotel the service was very poor and will not be staying in another double tree Hilton again and will be sure too pass on this info too friends and family

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not really anything to complain about perhaps the operation off the room card security on the lifts could be more intuitive   Very comfortable fresh modern hotel convenient to public transport Great breakfast Faultless wifi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our room was overlooking the middle of the hotel which was a slight shame   The breakfast was absolutely wonderful Could not have asked for a better meal The beds you sink into they are so comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was nothing about the hotel I didn t like   We liked the options available to us at the hotel the terrace bar the restaurant Unfortunately the restaurant was closed when we got back from the theatre on our first night and nowhere else near the Tower was open either

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Good location excellent breakfast and friendly staff husbands birthday and were given a free upgrade and drinks voucher Would definitely recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough night life near by   Large rooms for London and breakfast was great so better to get it included Easy transport underground nearby Quieter area near London Bridge Walking to Shard and the Walkie Talkie Some shops near by

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location of room Next to gym and overlooking pub opposite Very noisy in early hours of morning Plus early morning alarm from the fitness freaks in gym

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Your Executive the same size of travel ladge double room your executive should upgrade window was dirty   Sky lounge view was lovely The breakfast was 10 out of 10 thanks to the front line staffs that go the extra mile for us to make it possible for i and my families because we all vegetarians

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough staff on to deal with checks in and check outs Also soon afterwards my credit card was compromised after its last use at the hotel   location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Would be great if the hotel offered a spa as well  The roof top bar was a great experience and all the staff were very friendly would have no hesitation in coming back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The elevators are VERY slow and two of the four were inoperable during our stay There were very long queues to get to the rooms Prices seemed high for the quality of the room   12 th floor lounge is nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was too small bathroom even smaller Room service menu was poor and didn t have what we wanted available Apple TV was small too quiet and hard to use   The hotel will hold your bags for you if you have a later train home than checkout

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It wasn t worth spending more and upgrading the room essentially the room was no better than premier inn and only a shower very business trip rather than romantic break I questioned whether we had been booked into the right room We d previously stayed in a standard room which was bigger and better   Great location friendly staff good room service options

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lift system was very confusing to begin with  The relaxed way you can get breakfast without queuing at the restaurant we had bacon rolls and coffee out by reception in comfy chairs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The Lifts Oh goodness The lifts were a nightmare 2 out of 4 were working It was an absolute pig to go up and down In the end took the escape stairs only to find out you need a key card to get out of the stairwell Met people in the stairwell who couldn t get out Eventually piggy backed a staff member and got out through the kitchen Advised a manager who was mortified Not the best experience Oh and if there s a Party going on in the Sky Lounge a warning would be good as we had planned for a quiet cocktail after a long evening only to be greeted by loud music and drunken women Gave up   The staff were professional and friendly They behaved like a team Henk checked us in and he had excellent customer service skills Well done Henk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: had a very small room which is not what I was expecting due to the cost of the hotel  The breakfast is never good in that hotel and only stay there due to the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 2 out of 4 lifts out of order for 2 days long queues to use lifts No signage for stairs As in business area many shops restaurants bars shut all day Saturday Sunday   Nice hotel excellent Sky bar Good location for sightseeing Tower Bridge Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 2 out of the 4 lifts were broken and we were waiting up to 20 minutes on a lift that wasn t packed full   The welcome service was excellent Upon arrival we were greeted with a choice of soft drinks and a cookie Overall 11 10 for cleanliness

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Elevators needed to be repaired maintenanced a lot quicker due to high level volume of people at hotel   The hotel is located just minutes from the Tower of London and Tower Bridge which can also be seen from the 12th floor Sky Bar It is a nice clean and comfortable property Rooms are decent sizes and very comfortable The Reception Manager Charis Athanasopoulos was such a pleasure He was so helpful and patient with all of our transportation and tour questions Very knowledgeable about London and the surrounding area Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lifts There were 4 lifts but only ever 2 working and always spent ages waiting for it to stop at our floor floor 7 it seemed to skip us all the time so ended up travelling on every floor just to get in it The key cards were very temperamental which was a pain as you need these for the lift to work   Perfect location only a 3 minute walk to Tower Hill underground Hotel was very clean and rooms to a good standard plenty of shops bars and restaurants close by Sky lounge has amazing views but rather pricey but then that could be as we are from Cornwall and not used to the prices 2 drinks set me back 25

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There were 4 elevators in the hotel but still you had to wait a very long time And many times the elevator was too crowded so you had to wait for the next one It would also work better if the hotel would have a separate elevator to the skylounge for non hotel guests   Location of the hotel is perfect Near the DLR and Underground station but not on the noisy side of the street The room was quite big and clean Nice bathroom Each day you get one complimentary bottle of water per person The skylounge is very nice with a very nice view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 50 of the lifts were faulty which ultimately lead to long delays waiting to access them Since we were on the 7th floor this was less than ideal   The Staff were really friendly and helpful The location is ideal for accessing London quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We paid for a queen room and ended up with a room no bigger than a double room We expected a little more from the room for the price We didn t receive a very good welcome from staff upon check in   The hotel is in a perfect location the sky lounge bar is amazing overlooking the Tower of London and tower bridge whilst enjoying a cocktail is what London is all about

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast was cold 2 lifts out of order Being on the second floor meant that the lift was always full by the time it reached us Stairs not clearly sign posted and not the best to carry heavy cases down Not an issue if your happy to wait 20 30 mins for space in a lift or in no hurry   The cookie on arrival was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The tea milk and toiletries were not replenished for our second night stay very disappointing Corner of bedroom floor had not been hoovered properly there were Remenants from the previous guests 2 lifts out of order on a busy weekend was not good waited an age for a lift only to find it was full several times over   Pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The Lifts 2 were out of order which led to massive queues constantly the bedroom card to gain level access was useless led to many frustrating moments which did spoil the stay   Breakfast fantastic selection of choices all well displayed and replenished quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No staircase for guests to use when 2 out of the 4 lifts weren t working We waited for 20 minutes before we could get in one and even then we had to go up before we could go to the ground floor   Very welcoming on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There are only 4 lifts which is fine but each day 2 3 of them were out of service which meant a que at the lifts at each of the floors   Location is super rooms lovely staff are extremely helpful breakfast was very tasty too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The employees manning the front desk on the day I checked in Feb 17 could learn customer service skills from the restaurant staff I waited an hour and 15 minutes before a staff member asked me what I was waiting for hint I had a suitcase Then I was given a room I did not reserve I got a full size bed not the queen size bed As I waited IN FRONT OF THE RESERVATION DESK a staff member had cookies and bottled water to guests waiting to be checked in EXCEPT FOR ME I got the glare stare   The breakfast was DELICIOUS There was something for EVERY TASTE The hostesses were polite and if something wasn t right they made sure to correct it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There were only two lifts working through out our stay Very long waits which was really annoying   Loved the hotel and the sky bar what views just amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Did not like them adding service charges to drinks as the drink was very expensive The lifts were out of order and it was an absolute nightmare with so many people in the hotel Bar staff on skylounge were very unsociable and bar was manic at times At arrival we were advised a 25 per night deposit was being taken but would be refunded back to our bank if everything was fine Never have I experienced this in a hotel   Hotel in a great location clean and spacious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The wait for the lifts was ridiculous Lots of people were complaining about this In the end we used the stairs as we wasted 15 minutes the day before just trying to get from the 4th floor to the City Cafe   Location staff room Sky lounge in particular

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location and lovely hotel Good value for money in London and such a central location Plenty of bars and restaurants close by and easy access to the London underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No swimming pool first world problems People travelling to Liverpool Street Station would be quicker using the Circle Line from Tower Hill rather than walking to Aldgate  Warm cookie on arrival Very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lifts were very slow in coming some out of order and if on lower floors to full to enter   The hotel was great great location easy accessible public transport

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing could be better  Lovely breakfast Restaurant clean Excellent staff The sky bar is well worth a visit better than any bar in London the views are so good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was no stairs to any floor except a fire escape and while we were there 2 of the 4 lifts were broken so it took us a long time to get to and from our room   The beds were so comfy breakfast was amazing and the staff were very friendly We have had an amazing stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 2 lifts not working after waiting 15 mins I had no choice but to walk up 9 flights of stairs heavily pregnant Then again on the way down with all our luggage unexcepteable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Two lifts not working made getting to and from our room a bit tricky 15 minutes to get to breakfast one morning Executive lounge is a bit tired Some savoury nibbles during the day would be welcome   Where the hotel is with its views is a huge plus Atmosphere in the Skylounge is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was small and felt like the inside of a fridge The paintwork was shabby and the carpets stained View was of a derelict building TV was small and volume wouldn t go above a whisper Air conditioning unit was too noisy to use Disappointing and not value for money   Great location just 2 mins from tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lifts are very slow and the key system caused confusion and only 2 of the four lifts were working which slowed the whole process   We had an executive room which was perfect and the use of the executive lounge which made the experience all the better

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We did not like the lifts You always need to use the card before pressing the button Lift were always full so people should be squeezing to get the card inserted Lift were stopping in each floor so to get to or from 8 floor you should spend 10 minutes in the hot and airless lift   We liked the room and bed was comfy Very good breakfast with a selection of natural juice Staff was very friendly and helpfull

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was dissapointed the lifts didnt work properly all weekend and we had to wait in a massive line each time we wished to leave the room or travel to the room we where on the 8th floor and ended up carrying all our cases down the stairs when leaving the hotel after waiting for a lift for over 15 minutes Reported this to the staff at checkout and she wasnt very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only snag was on arrival Confusion on requesting ID for my 7 year old son as when booking online they asked for guest so I also put his name on the booking After travelling so far hadn t expected to be asked for ID for my son and to be told I may not be able to book in without it Don t take long to sort out though  The whole experience was great for me and my son So close to the Tower of London The room was modern and well laid out loved the Apple TV and room service Ooh and the bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Stunning view from the looftop bar Room is clean and modern Liked that there is a Mac in the room whah makes easyinternet access Lady in the reception is kind and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The drinks in the Sky Lounge were expensive though we felt welcomed to simply walk through and enjoy the great views  Good variety of food and drink for breakfast Comfortable surroundings and great views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 2 lifts were broken not easy to use stairs as they are only for escapes Took 15 to 20 minutes to go down and up 3 floors Bed uncomfortable and pillows very soft   Breakfast was good and a lot of choice although it was quite busy Check in was great and staff were nice View from bar is amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel location was great next to the tube station Modern clean and today hotel rooms with a comfy bed Great views from the rooftop bar would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The roof top bar is expensive but there are plenty of alternate bars around this area   Lovely buffet breakfast with plenty of choice and everything was nice and hot Room was clean very comfortable and large

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Toast should be at table Key card in lifts unnecessary   The breakfast was good but it was diy so couldn t get hot breakfast same time as hot toast No brown bread and toaster was not toasting well but good otherwise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Fantastic breakfast with made to order omelettes poached eggs Staff very friendly in all areas of hotel Rooms have a fridge to store drinks there is a tesco metro below Tower bridge Sky bar has fab views but drinks are pricey 5 mins walk from Tower hill underground Tower gateway for DLR Will def stay here again if price is right

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Everything was perfect no complaints  Slept like a baby excellent staff amazing views location was perfect overall great hotel for a little get away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing couldn t fault it  Everything was amazing friendly staff the access to the executive lounge with complimentary drinks and nibbles was such a bonus The roof top bar was amazing with views of the city The rooms were great with everything you need and nice comfy beds Location was brilliant just 2 minutes from the Tower of London and London bridge lovely area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff forgot to leave the complimentary birthday card for my husband in the room and the birthday plate with a chocolate message that we had been in email contact about The moment was lost which was a disappointment for him and me   Location was excellent and sky bar was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was comfortable however it was too small The shower didn t stay on one temperature   The location was excellent and the staff was super helpfull

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The customer service at reception was excellent plus we were given two vouchers for a glass of Prosecco on the beautiful rooftop Sky bar which in fairness we didn t know existed until we arrived This was a lovely surprise the views from up there were amazing we got some fantastic photos with Tower Bridge in the background I would love to return here

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Excellent breakfast with an amazing choice Modern decor large comfy bed and great location Super clean and great bathroom facilities The warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room small Bathroom smallest room ive ever seen Price of drink on 12th floor was just ridiculous Problem with key cards had to be changed twice Took a 50 25 for each night fee from my bank which still hasn t been returned YET   Great location Staff friendly Very clean Breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The milk in the room for morning tea was horrible Not having the stairs next to the lift to get to floor 2 We never did find them   The staff were so friendly and helpful Loved the drink and warm cookie on arrival Easy secure bag leave facility breakfast was amazing and check out the lively bar on floor 12

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Fabulous hotel Spotlessly clean Great location Only a short bus ride to the west end Very quiet Very friendly and helpful staff Excellent buffet breakfast It was a delight to stay in made extra special by the little extras Great views from Sky bar at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Car park is very small 30 places so book in advance Noisey air con even when turned off Hotel room overlooked a scruffy building site but weren t in room much   Clean hotel Very helpful on Reception Good price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room service I put the bath mat on the floor and expected it not be removed until our departure or at least another left in its place However it was removed so I had to use a towel as a bathmat Also the morning before we left we were down to our last bit of toilet roll and although we had another days stay another wasn t provided We ended up using tissue too late to call down to room service we thought I usually leave a tip for the chambermaid no matter how short a stay however on this occasion I felt the service unworthy so didn t   The breakfast was excellent The staff were great The roof top terrace bar was a great feature too if a little expensive Amazing views and wonderful cocktails try the Lavender Fields Forever at 12 My friend enjoyed a coffee with Baileys again at 12 The bill for the two with added vat etc was 27 Okay for the views we thought and did it all again the following night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Well when you book a Queen Room you expect a queen bed which is bigger than a double but a double is all we got Breakfast per person a bit expensive and a little too expensive for a bottle of beer in the Rooftop Bar although it was very nice bit SKY HIGH PRICES IN A SKY HIGH BAR don t get me wrong I loved the hotel but a little too expensive for little things I had a good stay and would love to stay again   Great Rooftop Bar friendly staff and a lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge bar was a great bonus to have amazing view to look out on whilst having a cocktail Big spacious rooms comfy bed would use again Oh and the cookies on arrival were super tasty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I paid in advance yet had to give a credit card which I don t have All very uneccesary especially given the mini bar was empty   Nothing worth mentioning It was quite bland throughout and no usp

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was small but as we were only staying for 1 night it was fine   The breakfast had a wide range of choice Room was clean and the staff were friendly Amazing warm cookie on arrival which was lovely as we arrived on a very cold day

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The kettle in the room Very cheap quality did not boil properly   Loved the atmosphere Bonus of free cookies on arrival Excellent location extremely helpful staff A very busy hotel that maintained a personal service rooms very quiet no disturbance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: there was building work taking place immediately next to our room It started about 9 a m and finished about 5 p m   A very good hotel for access to the underground and tourist areas

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Queue to check in on a busy Friday afternoon but staff were on hand to offer refreshments whilst waiting Didn t have breakfast but I noticed queues on two of the days I stayed  Great location good night s sleep in a comfortable bed excellent shower Sky Lounge on 12th floor was impressive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Queues for checking and breakfast pretty long at popular times Would have liked chance for afternoon tea or evening meal in the hotel  Staff friendly and helpful Room was very well presented Great views of the river Loved 5 vouchers for not having room valeted Great range of satellite and cable programmes including Sky sports

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks in the rooftop bar very expensive No TV in the bedroom but an Apple Mac instead This could be used for TV but the screen was too small and dark and the volume would not go high enough Also it proved difficult to work out how to use it and turn it off Air con was too noisy so turned it off and opened window Some street noise overnight   Nice welcome with a cookie Very stylish hotel Complimentary water in room Would certainly stay again despite the downsides see cons

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast very poor impossible to obtain a full English as trays always empty very slow to replenish No instructions in rooms regard air conditioning or TVs asked but no response from staff Would not accept debit card if you want to place items on room account Hotel needs to look at the small items which make your stay more enjoyable   The location near to Tower of London and underground also good bus routes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: You could have informed me at the booking stage that the privately owned or run kitchen would be closed for restaurant type meals Having to leave the hotel to eat well Queuing half way down the hall to even get into the breakfast room and offered a seat in a draughty entrance hall Bath towels not changed for the Saturday night   I liked the fact that on the Saturday morning after waiting over 30 minutes the poached eggs were eventually served But they were not as hot as they could have been Oh and I also liked the fact that the pleasant girls serving eventually found some cornflakes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff attentive but could smile more Without wishing to offend some staff could and should have a better command of English as often we were asked to repeat ourselves or couldn t hear understand what was being said in reply  Good location impressive lounge bar and comfy room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The service from the staff was poor no booking for breakfast on the system even though paid for in advance room service not available to non members the views from the extremely small room was of all the rest of the rooms so had to keep the curtains closed at all times the executive lounge was basically a room downstairs that had a door and a TV not exactly what you would call a lounge Really disappointed with double tree and won t be using their hotels again   The location is excellent close to the river and the Tower of London parking whilst expensive is safe and secure if not a little limited

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bathroom was tiny with no bath in and the shower hose had split in a few places so the pressure of the water wasn t great   The rooms were comfortable but there wasn t a lot of wardrobe space probably the smallest I ve ever had in a hotel The rooftop bar is great with stunning view of Tower Bridge and the Tower of London We stayed in February and they had the outside terrace open with heaters on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was very busy Room rather small   Location good near to Tower Hill tube Room was very clean credit to the housekeeping Baggage storage excellent member of staff especially helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was on the small side and was expecting a bath as it was a more luxury room however only had a shower  Lovely sky bar restaurant breakfast and lounge area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lack of instructions on how to use television in room Cooked breakfast items all cold could not eat it   Clean hotel with friendly staff Good location and scrummy cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lovely clean hotel comfortable bed Room was on the small side would have like to have more info on the hotel breakfast times restaurant food etc Overall definitely book again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I went to the sky bar and found some sort of fruit pip in my drink which wasn t very nice and also no main light in bedroom   The breakfast was nice and the staff were good too Also great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Could have an AUX or Bluetooth device for music as the entertainment computer only took CDs It s 2017 so cds where out of the question Other than that everything was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Free wifi should last for the duration of the stay   Fantastic location less than a three minute walk from Tower Hill Underground station The sky lounge bar on floor 12 offered excellent views of Tower Bridge and the Tower of London Room was extremely comfortable good bed and pillows fabulous shower and reasonably spacious Hotel was quiet at night and four lifts ensure that nobody is waiting too long to go up or down Very good breakfast included in our room rate although it is 21 50 each if it s not included All in all an excellent spot and I would definitely use it again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The air conditioning in our room didn t work properly after complaining there was no apology or attempt to make up for the matter  The hotel is in an ideal location we enjoyed our stay very much

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We prefer a firm mattress but we found the mattress too hard  Very good breakfast and great location only 2 min walk to Tower Hill underground station be sure to visit the sky lounge the view is amazing all the staff were extremely polite and helpful would certainly stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks a bit pricey in the Sky Lounge   Very helpful front desk and concierge staff Comfortable bed Good sized room with a view of the gherkin Loved the Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent short stay of 4 days at this hotel which was in an excellent location close to a lot of the sights nearby restaraunts and pubs Very modern hotel rooms were very well presented and quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast buffet choice was excellent but all the hot food was only luke warm on all three mornings The heating in the room wouldn t warm up and had to ask for electric heater as too cold   The warm biscuits on arrival were the best I have had Nice staff Sky bar excellent with lovely views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Price of drink in hotel bar which was extremely expensive even for London Shocking cashing in on the traveller I have travelled for 40 years and never felt so ripped off   Staff in restaurant was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: horribe bed room smelt of smoke heating didnt work proply tv wasnt tuned in proply and was woken up abruptly by cleaner on check out day including breaking our security chain to room  wouldnt recommend to anyone this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room we got was a bit basic and considering I asked for a higher room the 4th floor didn t seem high and I couldn t appreciate the views Also the volume on the tv wouldn t work Only worked when using the internet The pictures also were a bit misleading  The staff were very attentive and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower door was a little small for a big guy and the single bed a little on the small side  I thought the whole staff from reception to room service bar and restaurant were a credit to the hotel very pleasant and very smiley

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a member of staff on the reception that didn t have a clue what she was doing but problem solved by Lan in the end  Bed was really comfortable me and my girlfriend both had a really relaxing time at the hotel added bonus of the sky lounge on the 12th floor Lan on the reception desk was very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Fruit at breakfast would have been better as a fruit salad rather than whole pieces Pillows were very squishy so there was a lack of support for an existing shoulder problem which reoccurred as a result   Everything else about the room etc was great Thank you for making our anniversary a special occasion

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My wife tried to book in whilst I waited to enter car park she was unable to do so as booking was in my name very annoying and 1st time ever at any hotel this has happened in a hotel in any country we have stayed at around the world Breakfast very average   Sky lounge had good views and pleasant atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
