Full_Review: No view in room and felt a need to keep curtains closed as people in skylounge bar could see into room Corridor was extremely cold  Beds very comfortable has it was a really cold weekend the heat was great in the room Lovely touch cookies on arrival Everyone of the staff polite extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No faults found  Everything from cleanliness staff efficiency food standards selection decor hotel situation was first class and i would appreciate any forth coming deals to return to this fabulous hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We found the air conditioning somewhat noisy and we turned it off overnight for that reason Unfortunately the local tube stops were closed due to engineering work not the hotel s fault so we had to do more walking than we planned Next time I will check with TfL beforehand   Prompt check in and conscierge service with suggestions for local places to visit The rooftop bar is a must for cocktails with a view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The roof top bar was underwhelming and a bit cold The views were brilliant and I would have stayed longer had it been a bit warmer Air con did not need to be on   The staff were so friendly and helpful The woman who checked us in had trainee on her badge but she was so lovely and competent its time for her to graduate The breakfast was lovely and the location amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in was terrible Arrived at 1455 and could get a room at check in was at 1500 and no rooms were free Hilton members ch does in behind me and got a room straight away When I went back at 1500 I got a room but had to go through ID process again Then you get offered a Cookie or peice of Fruit in a cold calculated procedured way   Great location Sky bar was very nice and great service too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The long que to check in breakfast time got very busy and the scrambled egg was like goo The bed was ok but the quilt was flat and just kept waking me up from trying to move it around to get comfy I woke up every couple of hours   A Scottish lady member of staff I m not sure of her name but she was so pleasant and helpful The hot cookies when we checked in were to die for I loved where it was located like a 5min walk from tower bridge and Tower of London All in all a great weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We booked room service that didn t show rooms are relatively small and get cluttered really quickly  Staff really friendly upgrade brilliant a confusion with room service but overall a lovely stay Complimentary wine and drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Dirty marks on duvet cover towels and dirty tissues left near lifts Huge Building site outside   Fantastic breakfast bed comfortable modern foyer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room is not as large as expected but it was very comfortable  The bed and pillows are so soft The shower is perfect As all the rooms as an IMAC Tv I was able to pick up emails quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: that I had to go home   Hot chocolate cookie on arrival when I returned after a lovely night out they gave me another 2 yummy The Sky Garden Bar amazing great breakfast wonderful service cant wait to come back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   This hotel was amazing starting from the very warm welcome at the reception desk offering chockolate cookies for the arriving guests We celebrated my boyfriend s birthday they completed my request by providing cookies in the room with a nice postcard Since one of our family member got sick they provided extra blanket for free of charge furthermore we got extra as hotel flipflops The breakfast was amazing they provided excellent hospitality and unforgettable nice and delicious food in the morning We also ordered a hot soup in the late evening it was not a problem for us they serviced a good hot soup for the sick family member The music the the dining room was very nice as well The bathroom was super clean and the bed was comfortable for us since it was not soft for our body We could set properly the room temperature as well As for the location it was in a good place as well close to the underground I would like to thank you for everybody for your kindness and attention you provided during our stay you did a great job well done and thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: would have preferred the right to choose the room I have booked rather than it being allocated which so often are the least attractive rooms in the hotel location wise as our room was looking out onto block of accommodation short distance away   skybar on the roof of the hotel general layout of the hotel and the bedroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel was very easy to find and has a very good location Close to the underground The staff was friendly and check in and check out was quick and easy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They don t trust you as a customer They do an additional pre allocation on your card except for the cost of the room   Don t miss their sky bar The views are excellent both during the night and the day Breakfast is very nice but also expensive All rooms also seems to have a computer at least our and some friends had

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Thought some of the staff were very helpful but overall checking in was slow and too many people arriving with not enough staff on duty at reception desk Found a slight language problem telephoning the hotel re a request before my stay Their English was not up to standard as they could not understand my simple request

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Price of the car parking but it was in the congestion zone so I guess only to be expected   Excellent very well run hotel friendly helpful staff and great location superb sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 25 additional charge on check in for any extras we may of added I would have rather paid on a pay as you go basis  Very comfortable room and great facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The robes in the bathroom were dirty The bathroom smelt like drains at various times of the day We didn t use robes so didn t complain at the time   The room was fine location was fantastic for sight seeing I had a birthday package and they gave us vouchers for the sky lounge which is amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some of the staff were difficult to understand when we upgraded they told us it would only be 80 for 2 nights however when we looked at the invoice later we had got charged double 160 so assumed it was 80 pp instead of per room which we weren t happy about As we felt like we had been misled It wasn t until we checked out that the staff who served us noticed and gave us a refund And then we got told as part of the upgrade that there would be free alcohol drinks in the executive room 7 11 pm however when we got there there was only soft drinks we asked at reception and they said it was only half 5 half 8 so we were also misinformed about this too so felt like we had missed out on some of the upgrade benefits   The location and view were fab we upgraded to an executive room and had a really good view of the tower bridge also breakfast included which was nice and access to the executive room where you got complementary snacks and drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Unbelievably my husband arrived before me and was unable to check in as the booking was in my name He gave them my mobile number and they still did not want to let him check in even when he offered to pay again so they could reimburse later as he needed to get ready for our night out and I would only be going to the hotel much later He had to call a a manager Very unimpressed as never had this problem at other hotels Then 9am there was knocking on the door only for staff to use their key for entry We we re only staying the one night so no need for staff to be entering the room Won t stay again   Great location and bed was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We ate in the Natural Kitchen restaurant which was attached to the hotel We had our meal which was good paid with cash and as we are from Edinburgh we paid with Bank Of Scotland notes This his were the problem started the waitress looked at the notes and said please wait I ll check if we accepted these notes very annoying We then spoke to the hotel receptionist who was shocked and apologised   Hotel staff were friendly and professional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Can t think of anything we didn t like   The disabled parking space was reserved for us as requested The accessible room was comfortable with tea coffee making facilities Wet room facilities were good Great breakfast and very good service in the cafe All staff in the Hotel were helpful and courteous Tower of London on the doorstep What s not to like

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having to queue for breakfast for 20 minutes every day for 3 days Asking about a peanut allergy and being told best avoid the bread wall Really vague and unhelpful No policy in place All the food you wanted was not there not replenished quickly enough Bread cornflakes scrambled eggs orange juice bacon butter glasses and bowls Sink chipped they should note it in the room as when I mentioned it to reception later that evening they questioned a delay in reporting it I shouldn t have to report it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was v busy I felt they could have extended into the empty room next door but they did warn us it would be busy  Great facilities very good value and just what we needed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It s just a small problem seems there is a noise in the bathroom caused by the water pipe We just ignor it because we are too tired just noise can not bother us at all I am sure the staff will help us solve the problem if we report to them   Great location very easy access to tube district line and circle line Tower Hill station Very helpful and nice people in this hotel the room is clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Loved everything Would stay again Convienient location next to tube restaurants within walking distance good breakfast good area Cookie upon arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The value for money was poor I had very high expectations as I have stayed in a good few places I booked this hotel cause of its name the review and the price this hotel was just over a 1000 pounds for 3 nights and the dicount that they were giving I thought I was in for a treat as I have never payed this amount before so yes my expectations were high to relise I was in a box room with no bath and basic it s the most I have ever payed and the smallest room I have ever had and had to ask for a room with a bath the next time I stay went for breakfast there was no bread no juice no mushrooms there was something every morning so for 30 pounds every morning for breakfast yes I was hoping for more like I said the staff were great they seemed to be apologising a hundred times to peoplr they can only do there best but this was not peak time so I can just imagine how that would of turned out  The train station was right there so not far to walk staff friendly clean had tea coffee facilities hairdryer iron bath robes drinking water room service kept toping up the goods we used definitely good for business people not for romantic get away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Restaurant was closed for duration of stay Breakfast spot acted as fill in but very amateur service Not the best Not best location for solo female traveller   Comfortable room which was good since I became quite seriously sick and had to stay in and sleep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: shower screen off the rail draw broken in room layout bad 1 small window and dark over looking well nothing I have found this hotel has gone down hill in the last few years I have stayed a number of times and always get double charged so have started to pay by cash the room booked was 450 per night and after staying in other hotel found this to be very poor for value the room had 1 small window and very dark found the sky lounge staff could do with being more attentive and listen to its customers concerns and not just brush them off  Location excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It was not made clear that you had to book to go up to the sky Lounge Bar for midnight on 31st which was one of the reasons we booked A large area of the Sky Lounge is outside   Very good location close to Tower Hill tube and great views from Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I paid for executive and that s not what I got checked in at 2 o clock when into the executive lounge and all there stood was a big jar of nuts to eat all afternoon until 6 o clock all they brought out was two plates of chicken wings and some bread and canap s nothing at all for children and very limited alcohol cheap white wine and red wine and beer not what I expected on new years Eve at the hilton I should of got a standard room for half the price  Rooms was clean beds was comfortable nice looking smart modern hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Apple TV Too small and volume too low  Lovely bed and bathroom very lively staff on arrival and a hot cookie is always nice My daughter was so happy and excited to see the tree Overall a great stay would come back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: TV computer did not work could not get any channels all said they were not available Asked for a liqueur coffee one evening was told they couldn t make me one

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Value for money 319 for a room witch when I booked said included breakfast when getting there they said it did not then tried to charge 21 50 per person also the whole point we went was for the roof top bar for new year witch they closed the outside at 11 55 giving us no reason why and also meant they was far to many people in the bar you couldn t move or see anything out the windows with myself being pregnant I was very concerned as people where pushing and banging into me very disappointed  The location was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms were very very cold even with the heating on restaurant closed at 9 30 and no food except cheese selection from room service rooftop bar closed at 1 30 on New Year s Eve   Good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lifts were quite slow to arrive and awkward to use as card did not always work Executive lounge use was part of the deal but over subscribed and very busy   New Year s Eve stay so was very busy staff still had time to deal with enquirys New refurbished room was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Could have done with two comfortable chairs to sit in around the table   The bed was very comfortable and the shower was fantastic The cleanliness was superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We booked deluxe rooms but didn t get the extras listed on their website for deluxe rooms   Hotel was good very very busy but it was new year Staff efficient polite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They advertise a cookie on arrival the start of many extras however we were not offered a cookie This year I had decided to pay more for an executive king with lounge access however I was disappointed The room description mentions a coffee machine but there wasn t one and breakfast in the executive lounge was very limited so we went to the main dining room Fresh milk in the room fridge would be nice rather than the little plastic pots of long life   The staff are friendly and helpful We asked for a different type of pillow and we received them within 5 minutes The bed was so comfortable and breakfast was delicious The location of the hotel was great for getting to and from new year firework display

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We booked this room as it was our First new years eve together and we wanted something special We were so very dissapointed that we were told we had to queue to get into the sky scraper bar for 12 midnight to see in new year we ended up spending it sitting outside the hotel in a bench Very dissapointed when we were told that anyone could go into the skyscraper bar not just hotel guests never Again very expensive and felt we should have been advised when checking in about rooftop bar limited numbers We could of then made other arrangements for 12 to see in the new year

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The rooms were really disappointing we booked a suite and got a normal room with double bed the suites are normal size rooms with a big television the hotel advised there would be I pod docks there was none and top of the range toiletries wich also none very overpriced for what you get would never stay in the double tree Hilton again would use other hotels And would not recommend to anyone very dissapointing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: This hotel enjoys an excellent location just a few minutes walk from Tower Hill tube station The Tower of London Tower Bridge and Borough Market are all just a short walk away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Hotel does not have dining facility e g breakfast to handle the number of rooms guests at the hotel So if staying at the hotel and having breakfast there then expect 30 60 min wait to get into to the breakfast room I complained about this to the the staff and they openly confirmed that they did not have big enough dining facility and guest should expect a long wait So something the hotel are aware of and not trying to correct So the business model of this hotel is to sell rooms but not provide required facilities for dining There are many hotels in same area with lower or same price range so no point of staying at this hotel Room were ok but naked and with little wardrobe facility   OK location but there are so many other hotels in the area so no point of staying at this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On arrival our assigned room smelled of smoke It took 45 minutes two phonecalls and a trip to reception to get moved to another room The staff were not good at communicating what they were doing to resolve this nor did anyone ask us after we moved if everything was then satisfactory   Location to tower hill tube station was very convenient Breakfast had a wide variety of foods and even though it was very busy they were constantly being monitored and replenished by staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was disorganised and we had to queue every morning Building works going on beside hotel which backed on to our room and the noisy early in the morning Unpleasant smell in the corridors   location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Initial swipe of payment card was not cancelled after payment was taken at checkout This meant my bank account was short by 428 and I had to spend over an hour in the bank sorting it out   Good overall service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: TV volume wasn t loud enough even at Max volume Waiting times to check in Room space  Good quality shower and bathroom Excellent view from Sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Food ran out at breakfast What was left was cold and inedible Long queue for breakfast Very poor service in SkyLounge Long wait for check out   View from Skylounge Check in very welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some employees at the reception desk are cold and rude Some minor stains are visible on the quilt and on the bed sheet   Location is ok 17 mins to Victoria 30 mins to St pancras and 30 mins to canary wharf The service is rapid with quality most of the employees are polite and helpful Fast check in and check out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Buffet breakfast was only reasonable plenty of choice but plates were cold and buffet breakfast was lukewarm   Location security efficiency of staff comfort of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The pillows on the bed were to soft to what I usually prefer there wasn t much selection on alcohol in the executive lounge I don t drink beer or wine and that was all there was to offer the room was lovely but it seemed a bit average for the money I paid for There was no view from the room but there was nothing anyone could do about that because of the area  I loved the overall hotel the area the staff breakfast and the executive lounge the views from certain point in the hotel and the staff were very helpful and friendly and there was a personal touch to check in with a cookie the rooms were clean and the rooms also included a big tv and a mini fridge I enjoyed the heating controls also It was a special surprise for my partner which made a massive change to where we normally stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff members were all very helpful and the room itself was excellent I have previously stayed at the Westminster Doubletree by Hilton and was not disappointed by this one It is also very close to some decent restaurants and the Tower Hill tube station is less than 5 minutes away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only criticism is if I was being very picky was the 9 for 2 small bottles of water as we retired to our room This is a rip off but did not spoil our stay   An excellent hotel with very friendly staff an ideal location and fantastic roof top bar Wonderful breakfast with friendly helpful staff who were way better than the average found in London hotels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bed sheet was dirty Tea stains over bathroom floor Mentioned the above on check out and the staff didn t seem that interested despite claiming that if we re not we re not happy they ll make it right Our previous visits have been much better but we ll be looking for somewhere else for our next trip to London  Good location Cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The fact I went for breakfast at 10 15am and after I d had some cereal there were no sausages or fried eggs Waited for 15 minutes to see if more would be brought out Then when they weren t at 10 40 I asked someone and was told that the kitchen was closed and that I could have a fried egg and sausages but it would take 15 minutes to produce Ridiculous and not what I d expect from a hotel such as this   Rooms very clean and tidy Beds very comfortable The skylounge is a must for a drink

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Just oneed thing really we d ordered the express breakfast as we were leaving early but it wasn t ready for us and we had to go without it   Great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Receptionist was efficient but unfriendly Lifts were awful couldn t get them to accept our card and that s after we realised we needed to use it Notice not obvious enough especially to foreigners Where were the stairs which we would have preferred to use Everything at breakfast seemed to run out and we didn t expect to queue at a Hilton We couldn t switch air con off but it didn t stop us sleeping   Bed very comfortable Room spacious and practical TV computer very good A safe was provided plus hairdryer Heating very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There wasn t much to fault I would say the only thing that wasn t for me was the feather pillows but I could of changed them if needed so not really a major issue   The roof top bar is in a perfect location to look out onto londons best sites the staff at the Hilton and the breakfast was spectacular I recommend this highly especial for young couples We will definitely be returning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The rooms and lodging floors were clean and functional nothing to complain about but much too Spartan They were almost dorm like in their appearance This brought down my overall perception of the hotel   The vestibule lobby and public areas were first rate The staff was excellent and made the experience at the hotel worth the value I paid for the added breakfast and it did not disappoint At 15 lbs per person it wasn t cheap but it was a good value and worth the price I was glad my wife and I got down for breakfast early because the line that had formed by the time we finished our breakfast was very long I was only in London for a day because of problems at Heathrow However the location of the hotel is right near the Tower Bridge and allowed me a chance to salvage something out of a miserable experience by allowing me to take in a few sights in my limited time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There are not enough elevators for such a large hotel prepare to wait for a free elevator Compared to the Angel Islington Doubletree the room seemed smaller but for London standards it s still a good size  Good location next to Tower Hill Station frequent service into central London Easy access from London City Airport to Tower Gateway Station by DLR Sky Lounge bar is a must visit Friendly staff and good breakfast Fair price

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 21 50 for breakfast is way overpriced no parking available even after other guests checked out didn t have us on list for breakfast so had to stand there while they checked embarrassing Was told on checkout room price had increased after I had paid so had to stand there and argue the fact with reception more embarrassment in total cost over 430 for 4 people for 1 night   Sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Poor wi fi connection in room and not much better in lobby There were a lot of very noisy young children who were running around first floor lobby unchecked for a lot of Sunday afternoon   Reception and concierge team excellent We were looking after a tiered wedding cake delivered ahead of our arrival with their prior agreement They helped us look after it and deliver it safely to the wedding reception venue

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lack of standard in room amenities like shower cap toothbrush vanity set slippers etc etc Not value for money  The staff Is extremely friendly and service is excellent Check in and check out was smooth and speedy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The location was a bit out if the way for us as we spent most if the time in theatre district and oxford street Also don t get mixed up with the other double tree as we did We booked and stayed at tower bridge double tree but initially arrived at London Bridge double tree We had quite a trek with a suitcase after the staff advised we could walk to the tower bridge hotel   Comfy bed warm room Didn t really use the facilities of the hotel as we were out and about all the time and back late to hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was the usual scrum at these big hotels serving buffets Tea was weak and tasteless Coffee poor A stressful experience poor and expensive at a whopping 21 Nowhere near as good as you would have at home   The cookies on arrival are a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The check in service was extremely slow and despite having requested foam pillows in advance the pillows in the room were still feather which I am allergic to It took hours to get them replaced and I had to queue again at check in to remind them   The room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Day before arrival we had the option of cancelling booking and I asked via email rather than cancel and rebooking Could I switch to new offer I saw which included breakfast After an email trail between hotel and booking com It didn t happen and I finished up paying for breakfast on top of cost which was disappointing albeit it was a lovely breakfast but I left feeling cheated  View from 12th floor sky lounge was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was really comfortable and the room was very spacious  A larger bottle of shampoo conditioner and shower gel would be good only really enough for 1 shower each

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast we didn t take We carried electric adapter with us otherwise impossible to charge mobile phone No electric outlet in the bathroom   Central location close to Tower and City of London Nice welcome wich warm chocolate cookie at 2 h in the night Clean Tee and coffee facilities in the room nice and necessary I Mac system computer TV nice Helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room especially walls were filthy I informed stuff about that but they did nothing I expected more from Hilton Hotel Price was too high for standard like this I do not recommend   Good localization and varied breakfast English and continental

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast waiting staff My wife allowed her tea to go cold so asked for a replacement using English Breakfast tea The girl brought her EB tea but decaffeinated so further request for standard EB tea Girl then had to go away for 5 mins to find some EB isn t unusual surely Organisation of breakfast buffet was sensible but crockery was hidden away where it wasn t easy to see Toasting machine far away from hot buffet BUT no plates by toaster Cereal dishes were only at the far end of the cereal area so half of the diners approached from the wrong end and couldn t see them   View from the Sky Lounge seeing Tower Bridge the Shard brilliantly Wonderful outside area too with even better views Hotel is about 300 metres from Tower Hill Underground station Couldn t be better

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The cost of the parking GBP30 p day Main restaurant on Ground Floor stop serving food at 10pm and for central London this should be a bit later we obviously had an experience of arriving slightly after 10pm and missing out   Bed comfortable restaurants and bar were good cafe staff friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We ordered a cooked breakfast one morning and it took over an hour to arrive luckily we weren t in a rush and when it did arrive the food wasn t that great it definitely wasn t worth the money   The location was really convenient the hotel itself and the rooftop bar was beautiful and I ve never seen a view like it The hotel was always clean and the bed so comfy The cookie and complimentary drink on arrival was also a lovely touch Loved it would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing It was perfect for what we needed   The hotel was exceptionally clean and felt very modern and inviting The reception area is lovely The breakfast was absolutely delicious and the service was impeccable from the moment we arrived Warm cookies on check in was a lovely touch as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff treated people very differently dependent on look Told us we hadn t paid for breakfast when we had And couldn t find our baggage after checking it in   Breakfast was lovely proximity from underground station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We were charged 620 by mistake as a deposit for incidental damage and was told 50 would be taken Could not sleep as there was a strange clicking sound coming from the hall in our room of a night which sounded like a key being inserted into the door Staff did not seem to know what they were doing   Breakfast was lovely and in a perfect location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lifts Having to use the room key was hit and miss at best And it wasn t brilliant when you didn t need the room key   The bed was very comfy Hotel was well located for the tube and touristy things

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: N A  o Helpful staff on reception and housekeeping o Bedroom was clean and comfortable o No noisy road traffic o Iron and ironing board in wardrobe o Good ensuite facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bath robe caused my wife to have a serious allergic reaction and she spent a very rough night wondering if she would need to go to A E for treatment The customer care line could only advise me that I could get a taxi to the local hospital in 5 10 minutes if I needed to and didn t seem to be interested otherwise  The room was standard had everything needed nice bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: for a medium to high price range I would not expect for the sinks to be broken the double bed to be two singles zipped togeater aswell as the douvet that s not to say it was not good quaility just expected better I also guess there was a staff shortage on the roof terrace bar   Very nice location and staff really helpful and friendly Tower Hill tube a minutes walks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff where not very helpfull We had booked things to do on the night and missed them because they couldn t get us checked in had to wait ages no apologies or nothing to help our wait   The room was nice comfy and tidy but overall didn t enjoy my stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was chaos at the reception desk at all times It was the worst check in and check out I have ever had at any hotel The staff was friendly and efficient but there was no clear guidance on who to help next so the guest were frustrated The gentleman waiting behind us during check in even got rather nasty about it We avoided the reception whenever possible because of it I suggest someone relook at the efficiency of the current process   Very clean and staff was very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything from checking in the receptionist was lovely obliging and we checked in early This was very helpful as we have travelled a long way Thankyou to all the reception staff Checking out was equally good Our stay was amazing thankyou to everyone at Double Tree Hilton Tower Bridge for all your help and support

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The prices of the cocktails in the sky lounge 26 for two The queue at breakfast was ridiculous and food not very hot and price of a taxi from the station was 27 50   The staff were very professional Hotel very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: To be honest I would have preferred firmer pillows in some hotels Iv stayed there is usually one in the wardrobe I didn t ask though either as it was only 1 nights stay  The reception area was beautiful Lots of comfy sofas x also the staff waiting on at breakfast are the friendliest we have encountered in London and we ve stayed at quite a few places

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location I thought I d booked Hyde park hotel through booking com as we wer going to winter wonderland and shopping I didn t realise until I checked booking confirmation on the day Bed was very hard and room was cold even with heating on Ordered food using room service and it was cold and not up to standard it was returned without eating   Lovely clean hotel and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel wasn t very warm we got an upgrade to an executive room after a disagreement the only difference between the rooms really was a larger television Included with the upgrade was access to the executive lounge where we had breakfast which was not as good as the standard breakfast was nearly cold   The bed was really comfy so we had a really good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The view from the room and the sky lounge bar are brilliant rooms were very comfortable nice big tv and there was a train station 2 minutes walk away that will get you anywhere you need to go in the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Although the room was non smoking it had obviously been smoked in as it stunk of stale cigarettes There was a service charge re the sky lounge which I missed when I checked out although only small it annoyed me   Excellent breakfast but pricey The sky lounge is a brilliant place to enjoy the extensive and impressive vista and is lively at the weekends

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Doubletree has to take a bit better care of the maintenance of the rooms In our room the cover cap of the shower valve fell off and the hook for the towels in the bathroom fell off as well And also the carpets are really not clean any longer   Staff is very friendly and flexible As our room was very smelly another visitor smoked in it some days ago they transferred us without any problems to another room Location is great for the Tower Tower Bridge area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Was surprised to have to queue to get into breakfast The food was cold and not replenished quick enough for demand Such a shame   Lovely hotel great location Love the SKYLounge on 12th floor Staff very helpful attentative Rooms comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We arrived around 1pm I do realise the rooms are not ready until 3pm and that wasn t a problem but a member of staff who booked us in actuality said without my asking if we would like to wait in the lobby they would make us a priority I took that to mean the room would be a little early so we ordered some drinks and it got to 3pm and I went to the counter to ask if the room was ready and it wasn t I was told it wouldn t be long we waited until 20 minutes past 3 and still we weren t called it was my daughters 21st birthday and I had a meal booked on the other side of London so we had to leave and book our bags in as time was running late for our meal we also had to ring the restaurant to say we would be late as it took 45 minutes to get there I don t know what time the room was ready as I never got the said call I do feel it is unexceptable that a room is not ready at 3pm that I have paid for The room was very basic for the price breakfast was nice but expensive also   The beds are very comfortable the staff at breakfast time are very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was a big let down We were seated quite quickly which was good but the 1st day we arrived around 9am the coffee was cold that was put on the table and food was cold in the buffet also a lot of the food had run out and was not refilled On the 2nd day we arrived near the end of breakfast my thoughts would be that even arriving at that time there would still be food available this was not the case All the hot buffet was gone and luckily enough I had ordered eggs so my husband and I had to share my eggs and use the French stick as that was he only bread left It also took me three attempts to get tea and coffee Not what I would expect for the price we paid and the standard of the hotel Very disappointed  Loved the bed Pillows and duvet were fantastic We even when and bought our own when we got home

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: sky bar too expensive no draught beer in ground floor bar the hotel didnt really encourage you to stay and drink in the facility  breakfast hot cookies on arrival sky sports in rooms friendlieness of staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff was very good in the city cafe also booking in to the hotel we asked to change the room we had there was no problem at all we will book again at this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very small rooms Sky Bar had two parties booked both nights which meant we couldn t get a seat on either night Being charged 12 5 service charge when we had to stand at the bar was ridiculous It s your job to pay the staff not mine   Location was next door to the tube stop Sky bar had great views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bun fight to get breakfast The breakfast area was very poorly designed and laid out causing question to get food which had a knock on effect as people then had to cue for tables  The staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My parents called and asked for a tray of desserts saying we love you be brought up to me and my fianc s room and it was a beautiful tray with lovely desserts We really enjoyed the thought the staff put into it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The information was very limited about the hotel what s available bars etc most places give you that information in the rooms The lifts were terrible we were given no information about them upon leaving we had to take the fire exit after waiting 20 minutes we d had enough queuing for breakfast was not very good but when we did get breakfast it was good value for money  The hotel was lovely in a great location very clean comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not your fault but it s a bit of a pain when the circle district line as often happens is not running   Despite the hotel being exceptionally busy we still experienced a high level of service from very pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room service was bad ordered a coffee that was lukewarm then ordered chilly and jacket potato worse my partner had ever eaten half of the music channel on the tv never worked and we paid for late check out and 3 different people knocked our door and 1 lady try to come in our room and the full English breakfast was poor and the toiletries was half full good job we had our own  The lady on reception on check out was very helpful and the waiter that brought the breakfast to our room was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Just at breakfast sauces etc to go with hot food were positioned at the beginning when collecting your hot plate   Position was ideal for us tube bus taxi river boat Loved it we were literally 2 minutes walk from the Tower of London nicely tucked away Pleasant staff clean and comfy rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in time was 3 so we dropped off our bags as we were early had lunch next to the hotel and went back at 3 15 still not ready Staff apologised but didn t seem genuine Had to change rooms as we were given a double room and not a queen room   The breakfast was the best I ve had in a hotel Scrambled egg to die for Such a wide and good selection of foods to set you up for a day in London Room was clean with all the things you need for a weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No instructions to operate the sound on the tv nearby underground closed   Staff very helpful rooms clean comfortable excellent choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: breakfast queue was unbelievable at times didn t know in advance that there were closures on the local tube network at weekends   very clean room comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Handles on all drawers and wardrobe in the room were impossible to use Not offering nuts nibbles with cocktails we spent over 50 on champagne and were charged over 2 for an eggcup full of nuts and then they added 12 5 service charge on top of everything Long queues to check out TV very small and complicated to use   Excellent breakfast Comfortable bed Very good location Helpful reception staff Quiet at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The English of most members of staff is poor they didn t seem to understand a lot and were unable to answer the simplest of questions No information was given by check in staff no check out times we had to find out where breakfast was for ourselves DO NOT pay for the executive club lounge not worth an additional penny We ve stayed in various hotels worldwide with club access and this one doesn t offer any kind of service or comfort more like a cheap bar than a lounge it only offers a happy hour for two hours with excessively limited alcohol wine or beer tough if you drink neither and food which was rammed to the rafters probably because it s so tiny If you re looking for a luxurious relaxing break DO NOT stay here the revelling in the corridors at 2am and the stream of one night stands leaving the hotel at 7am is enough to put paid to that   Breakfast staff were helpful despite the vast queue to get in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: That we didn t stay for longer   The bed was so comfy Lots of room in the actual bedroom good facilities too safe fridge iron kettle the check in was easy check out a little longer but only because computers down so we had to pay by cash

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The tv was too small Bit strange that it was an iMac would rather have a proper TV and then can use my laptop If I require a computer   The breakfast nice windows more coffee when we asked

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I felt the bedroom was a little plain and bland Just lacked character   The location and facilities of the hotel were great The views from the rooftop bar were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Paid a lot of money for an executive room and it was extremely small not at all what I expected for 289 My partner and I tried to use the executive lounge but again it was extremely busy and a very small room so we couldn t sit down anywhere My stay in the Liverpool at the Hilton there was by far better value for money and it provided more of a selection of canapes and drinks available in the lounge Overall a very expensive night for a disappointing stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: See above  Great comfy bed the executive lounge wasn t executive On several occasions people were tailgating to gain access to the free food and drink The drink consisted of white wine and larger Unfortunately my wife went without as she doesn t drink either

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough choice of newspapers and other reading material  The cleanliness of the rooms and the efficiency they were ready every day As a lonely travelling woman felt very safe

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast at around 20 per head was very poor quality and had a value of no more than around 7  The room was excellent comfortable well equipped and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Poor service from the front desk things were not explained too well Was given a cookie upon check in which was half eaten   Bed was really comfy and room was kept to a high standard Enjoyed the sky lounge and the area of the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Leaving  The whole package really I always used Hilton hotels when I was working and they have not lost their edge I was at the Tower of London that evening so it was spot on for me This was my second stay at this hotel As Arnie says I will return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great hotel with a fantastic location minutes from the nearest tube station and a view that overlooks Tower Bridge The hotel reception area is nice and the staff were great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Had a king room but felt it was not big enough to b a king room and felt itbwas aimed at the buisness sector more than the leisure sector  The view from the sky lounge was fantastic and the staff were very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The executive breakfast area was poorly staffed and as a consequence was not a good experience  Great cookie on arrival clean and modern interior nice staff on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had room service for breakfast the breakfast was left in the room after the cleaner had been in Do I called to have MAKE IT RIGHT work for us at on our return to the hotel They said they would sort it out for us We then went to dinner and returned to our room at 11pm to find the breakfast still in our room the whole room smelt of breakfast I then called again to inform the doubletree team we then had to simply leave the breakfast items outside the room in corridor as we was going to sleep Such a shame because everything else was great Room 262 Darren Scott  The 12 floor bar was amazing service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I m only splitting hairs here as loved our stay The towels weren t that fresh  Great location right next to Tube station Very helpful staff we paid a bit extra for bigger room which was well worth the money 2nd time we ve stayed in Double Tree both excellent Love cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was dark and dingy we only had two lamps one of the others bulb had gone I could barely see whilst getting ready I had to do my hair and make up with the wardrobe open as there was a light inside of it which was brighter than anything else in the room We weren t very unhappy about this but when we tried to tell a member of staff we were hurried along due to there being a que the room was quite depressing and I was very disappointed The sound on the tv did not work We would have opened the curtains for more light but there were so many other rooms facing us that they would be able to see in to our room We usually stay at double tree hilton hotels and I booked the tower hill hotel due to the fact we had always had such good experiences with them I just felt like we were just another number at this hotel and wish we had of gone for somewhere else now   The cookies on arrival were good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 1 double queen bed is definitely not suitable for a family as advertised by booking com also the hotel wouldn t allow us all to stay in the room anyway Booking com did organise a complimentary pull up childrens bed for us as no family rooms were available Room service was delicious but language barriers meant we were over charged and had to negotiate 3 visits to our room by the waiter going back and for to his manager to agree that we didnt have to pay for their mistake That was frustrating after a long day with tired children   Very high standard hotel Free delicious cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were extra friendly the hotel itself was amazing and the breakfast was unreal Planning to go back at Christmas and cancelling our original hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast could be a bit cheaper   The drinks vouchers were a nice touch The hotel was clean and modern Great shower Massive bed Loved the sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The toaster in the morning was useless didn t toast the bread  The chocolate cookie at checkout was amazing The location is first rate Our room was large and well equipped The Sky Bar was fantastic if a tad overpriced In Scotland a glass of wine is never more expensive than a liqueur Lovely breakfast but a new toasting machine is required 8 people queuing for toast is not acceptable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The pillows was to soft and the toilet kept running after being used Not much of a view for a special birthday   Got two free glass of bubbly while waiting for our room to be ready And two free drinks as it was my mums birthday

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My girlfriends bag was taken by thieves in the reception area Hotel staff indicated it s not the first time this has happened They didn t seem to care really Very reluctant to have the police in the hotel Tried not to alert other guests   Very nice hotel in a good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel was busy but poorly organised and did not represent value for money We had arranged to park in the car park but the process was long winded and staff unhelpful such that we couldn t get in or out We had booked an extra bed for our daughter but this never arrived Staff were not forthcoming with either an apology or a solution   Staff were smiling and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Over crowded at breakfast Waited too long to be seated Would have been nice if there was a swimming pool But overall it was a pleasant stay  Location was very good Breakfast was great Amazing views from the roof bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A C unit made an intermittent buzz on top of normal hum Not good at 06 00 The subwoofer wire was faulty  Service was very good Sky bar was especially enjoyable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The cost of the breakfast seemed a little too expensive   The room was very clean very well equipped and really liked the Apple MAC with integrated TV

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Good location nice sky lounge bar however rooms are just ok It looks way better in the pictures Staff really nice especially a guy called Yuri very caring and made us feel special However wouldn t stay again   Good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The noise of the heating air con overriding the TV which seems to be very low volume difficult to hear even when the volume stated it was 100   The bed was comfortable but the pillows were divine I suffer with neck problems but had such a wonderful nights sleep so much so I would like to know what make they are so I can get some for home

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The carpet on the 8th floor could do with a clean its abit scuffed however it was no bother   We checked in with Tania she was really welcoming and very bubbly considering it was quite late at night i don t know how she managed to be so cheerful We were given a quick talk through of the hotel the exec lounge skye lounge etc The free cookies and free complimentary mini bar in the room was a nice touch I have to say Overall we enjoyed our stay and we will be back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Slow check in with few staff working at the reception desk Some of the staff behind the desk were having a discussion with each other and were unable to help guests so we had to wait quite a while which was an annoying start to our visit   Very comfortable bed Enjoyed view from the Sky Lounge on top floor although did not stop for a drink in the bar area as it was very noisy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room a bit cold even on heat setting We paid for executive upgrade to include Full English Breakfast c 21 each we felt this was misrepresented as in the executive lounge this was just toast bacon sausage and scrambled egg not worth it especially as some great eateries close by better and cheaper Sky lounge bar not really for guests unless you re 20 years old and like deafening music perhaps Friday night regulars   Just a one night stay and very clean and comfortable room service good ground floor bar a nice comfortable contemporary space

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It s in a business area so there wasn t much of a local neighborhood feel to the place   Modern professional feel adequate staff on duty multiple attractive gathering areas in the lobby assess to restaurants in and close to the hotel The room was small quiet and comfortable Convenient to public transportation business and tourist sites and shopping Deal pricing made this a good value for being in the Tower Hill area of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel was very clean in a great location We appreciated the warm cookie at check in as we were starving by the time we got there The staff were very friendly and we have no complaints

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Just wanted to say a big thank you to double three staff you were amazing We stayed for our two year anniversary and the hotel upgraded our room which is nice Very nice hotel and amazing location and hotel staff were amazing too Cant say nothing bad about this hotel we will definitely stay again in the future

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: N A  Everything was wonderful exceptional facilities wonderful service magnificent food The cherry on top assistance with a late late checkout for a late flight allowing use of the lounge A great stay in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Kettle sent sparks to the table and ground when be used which really scared us Besides the flushing button on toilet can not be used well Moreover wifi is not so good to be used   Very close to the underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: More selection on the room service menu which was slightly over priced   Two minute walk from Tower Hill station two minute walk from the Tower of London five minute walk from a wide range of restaurants The room was spacious very clean and had everything we required The breakfast was delicious with so much choice and all the staff in the city cafe were very attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast Eggs not readily available food just about warm and a very long queue waiting about 20 mins just to sit down  Had a lounge room which was excellent value bed really comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was very happy with the service which was received I told them we was celebrating our 2 year anniversary and they accommodated that with a fantastic welcome into our room with Swan shaped towels on the bed and a lovely letter to both of us I always stay in this hotel and love the smell of the body wash and the scent there I would love to have some of this if I can

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was very simple we got the invalid room There were some scaling in some parts of the bathroom which did not give an impression of cleanliness The pictures suggest wooden floors the room had carpet which could be an issue for asthmatic people the overall state of the carpet was good my spouse is asthmatic and it was a surprise for us as we only had a couple of nights we were not too picky on this detail The guest service agent had booked us a taxi he suggested us a taxi but booked a private car with a driver to London Heathrow Airport with a fixed price of 75 but once at Heathrow we got charged 83 not a nice surprise   Location is great Breakfast is good The staff is polite and discreet WiFi works once you get proper instructions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing excellent value for money   The hotel location was ideal for exploring the London Tower The Shard London Bridge and along the embankment and so close to the tube station Tower Hill The hotel room catered for our needs and much more the breakfast had so much choice also make a point of dining at the simply natural restaurant which is apart of the hotel and explore the sky lounge is was awesome Will book again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: All really good thank you  Loved the friendly staff the very clean and contemporary room the delicious selection of fresh fruit salad and cooked breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately Tower Bridge was closed during our stay which caused a massive traffic jam en route to the hotel from Heathrow costing 110 Pounds by taxi  No complaints at all about the hotel Friendly staff great facilities and great breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only Merlot on offer let s face it that is a woman s wine why no Shiraz   The happy hour was great the wine choice could have been better

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They didn t accept my request to decorate room for my boyfriends birthday I would have been willing to pay for decorations or brought them myself if I had known before hand  The rooftop bar was lovely and the rooms were very clean and tidy The location was perfect for visiting The Shard and the staff were very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms and bathrooms are very small according to American standards But clean and functional None of the rooms have a view All windows are covered with a business building right in front There isn t much around this particular neighborhood for tourists although the metro station right next door makes it easy to get around I had an issue and it was addressed and resolved quickly but there was some back and forth about how to satisfy make up for it I didn t like the back and forth But again staff hotel manager and guest services were very kind and friendly and took good care of us  Management staff and guest services are GREAT Probably one of the best I have ever seen and I ve stayed in many 4 star hotels Open buffet breakfast was satisfying with several good quality food choices Made to order omlets were also a big perk Hotel location is very conveniently next to a metro station Although many tourist sites are 20 30 min away the station being right next door is such a big perk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: This must as well be a student room or dorm Clean as it is a new building But bare poorly serviced and uninspiring And giving guests chocolate chip cookies at the reception and then asking about it on the feedback form That has to be the biggest hotel joke of the year   Clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Air con was loud we had to report it The cost of cocktails in the sky bar was high   The bed was so comfy we loved the Mac and the sky bar was fab Breakfast was great too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: breakfast the scrambled egg and bacon were both cold in the executive lounge the first morning we stayed and the main breakfast area the 2nd morning   Loved the warm cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Service charge in sky lounge not worth extra for view  Well thought out comfortable hotel in excellent location close to tube attractions Natural kitchen restaurant also excellent lovely food v good service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We stayed in a lovely room on the 4th floor Modern clean and very comfortable Check in was quick and easy and we were all given a delicious warm cookie on arrival Staff all very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was an open bottle of water in the room when I got there Also had to ask twice for hot water at breakfast   Fantastic location for what I needed Staff were friendly room was clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: we upgraded to en executive room and were told it had a lovely view but we looked straight into the rooms on Pepy s Street with workman in   Apart from the room everything was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was no access to any stairs and we found ourselves waiting around for lifts and even when they arrived we still sometimes got stuck going up and down as opposed to the desired floor we wanted   The location of the hotel and the friendly staff Also the cookie upon arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast was expensive we choose to go to Weatherspoons around the corner that was much more reasonably priced   The fresh cookies given when you check is a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel from the outside and the inside lobby was impressive however don t be fooled as the rooms themselves do not fit with the 4star rating and are clean but average which should be reflected in the price We have stayed in other 4star hotels in central London which are much nicer Marketed as a deluxe queen the room and bathroom were bland with bare white walls and beech coloured furniture and there was no ceiling or wall lighting just table lamps Bed was a normal double with cheap duvet and pillows so don t expect a deluxe queen size The Sky Lounge bar has great views over London but is pricey and when settling your bill the staff assume that you are automatically going to pay the 12 5 service charge even though you haven t been waited on at all Cocktails with service charge are around 13   The location was great with several bars and restaurants in the vicinity Situated within a few minutes walk of both Tower Hill underground station and Fenchurch Street rail station Staff were really helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Lovely touches such as a free cookie in the checking in queue Lovely breakfast and fantastic rooftop bar with beautiful views Nice friendly staff and comfy rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The view from the window in the HHonours floor was on the construction site   The bed was very comfortable and the breakfast was good except the mashed eggs had strange taste The welcome cookies are really tasty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Felt the TV at its maximum was too quiet and couldn t get any phone signal at all   The warm cookies given to us on arrival and simply everything

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The traditional breakfast in the executive lounge didnot have any mushrooms fried eggs beans fried tomotoe or hash browns The only availability was sausage bacon scrambled eggs and toast Although I mentioned it was our anniversary when I booked it would have been nice if at dinner we were given just a little akknowedgment ie a little sparkler with a piece of fruit dessert etc to say happy anniversary

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Was there at the weekend and a lot of restaurants and cafe were closed around the immediate area   Staff were great and efficient Q moved very well even when busy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We got a delux room turns out this is the same as a standard room but on the 8th floor no view from the room and cost extra Cost of a bottle of beer in the sky view bar was 2 more expensive than the lobby bar   Great location easy to get to and from the hotel via DLR and underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Everything perfect I will come back for sure   Great location amazing view from the sky lounge Breakfast was fantastic rich selection of everything Bed super comfortable Apple mac in each room Cookies as welcome at reception Great staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in was over half an hour and was told our room wasn t ready so had to request another room Room from the view was building construction Room was average for a Hilton On par with a Premier Inn You have to guess how to use the TV and room service Shower was horrific and sprayed everywhere You would have thought as a Hilton it would have lived up to its well known name   The best part of my stay was the cookie Sky lounge was lovely and the food was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Air conditioning was quite noisy  Well equipped room that covered all essentials including bottles of water and hot drinks with a comfy bed Loved the complimentary chocolate and walnut cookies on arrival to reception Good location for using the tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was very small and room temperature was either cold or hot I think ours wasn t working properly Drinks very expensive  Location was great and so was the cookie on check in Roof top bar was great also

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room had everything we needed but there were no luxurious touches to make it stand out in comparison to cheaper hotels and the d cor in the room was like a budget hotel Cocktails in the Skylounge were 12 15 There was no one serving in the cafe when we wanted a coffee   Our room was clean and comfortable The location was great right by the Tower London Bridge and Brasserie Blanc where we d booked a meal Breakfast was really great loads of choice and very tasty The Skylounge was relaxing and classy The heating in our room wasn t working but when we told reception they got it fixed quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very expensive breakfast option  Extremely friendly staff and a lovely feeling within the hotel Apple Mac in the room for internet radio and TV Free high speed wifi is a good touch too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price was very high for what it was the rooms were what I would find at a premier Inn unfortunately Although the staff were happy to help it definitely wasn t worth the money  The breakfast was lovely really good range of choice to suit everyone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel was a 2 min walk from Tower Hill Station Check in was swift staff were friendly Hotel room was basic but comfortable Bathrooms were clean and towels shower gels shampoo conditioner etc provided Sky Bar at the hotel was excellent Nice views from the rooftop

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Upon arrival to the rooftop bar with my girlfriend we were standing waiting for a drink for roughly 25 minutes To add to the sting somebody entered the bar and the staff attempted to serve them immediately after they finished the coctails that took them 25 minues to make I had to actually stop them request to be served myself I will add that the bar was more or less empty whilst this happened Staff non apologetic and rude upon me confronting them The money you pay as well is very steep when you consider the rooms are barely scraping average I assume the pricing is based on their location facilities like the rooftop bar   Fantastic location a beautiful rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were very rude and unhelpful The booking was in my partners name however I had the booking confirmation and also had pre paid on my own card which I also had with me yet I was not allowed to check in Then the reception staff undercharged me and were very rude about this to my partner even though it was their fault not impressed and wouldn t go back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Sky bar great  Breakfast menu amazing but dining room too small for size of hotel Disappointed waitress blamed customers attending at same time crammed into dining room like a school dinner expected more comfort considering top price paid

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bigger more luxurious room  Considering we spent nearly 200 for one night the room was very basic The room was small with a small double bed which wasn t comfortable and the duvet was very thin and not cosy at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On arrival we paid out bill in cash or tried to We found it difficult to pay with SCOTTISH STERLING This had to be verified by three people before finally being accepted If that wasn t bad enough we then ate in the restaurant on a different day and again had difficulties paying with SCOTTISH STERLING I would expect this from s two star hotel in the 1970 s not in a Hilton Hotel in 2016   The hotel was ok close to underground and plenty taxis available outside hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
