Full_Review: Tube wasn t running on this particular weekend which made for packed buses but luckily we like walking   Staff friendly and helpful Good location for seeing London Sky bar with great views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great service Really liked the warm cookie on arrival The room was nice with a very comfy bed Breakfast was great with a huge variety The lounge bar had a stunning view of London Would definitely stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Free cookies The bed was comfy Room clean Shame the room didnt have a good view but we were not there long enough so no biggy Staff friendly Secure parking Taxis outside Ideal location for tower of london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price of the Sky Lounge bar I understand the standard of the hotel but for a Malibu flavoured liqueur with coke and a corona it s understandable as to why my jaw dropped when I got told it would be 18 00 for the 2 drinks   FANTASTIC HOTEL Absolutely beautiful amazing breakfast and the staff couldn t have been nicer To top it off getting an I Mac in our room was a definite highlight

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was nothing to fault The only problem we had was the Central and District tube line was closed all weekend so transport needed rethinking   Our stay was excellent from the reception to checkout made all the better by very friendly staff Our room was much more spacious than we expected a walk in wet room type bathroom with fold down shower seat and grab rails most welcome as my husband is disabled The TV Mac was very useful for planning our excursions and finding out local landmarks The in room kettle and tea and coffee was really welcome as was the inclusion of a fridge to keep items cool a nice touch and most appreciated The check in warm chocolate cookie was a surprise and very tasty although I must confess that as it was warm the melted chocolate on my fingers found its way onto the bedspread I m sorry about that Breakfast was busy but seated very quickly by smiling helpful staff There was a wide section of fruit and cereal along with full English and toast croissants and rolls This full selection of tea coffee and juice was also available The complimentary magazines and newspapers was an added benefit I don t think I can write anything detrimental about our stay we have weekends away at least once a month a and staying here was one of the nicest and most memorable of the last five years We both had a wonderful relaxing time and I wish to thank all the staff we had contact with for that

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The tube was not working over the weekend so it caused us a lot of nuuscence and money using alternative modes of transport   Vacuity to tube station and attractions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Due to my nut allergy the biscuits on the tea tray in the room and the cookie all guests are offered at check in were not offered to me However neither was an alternative   Upgraded to Executive Room This was spotlessly clean as was the entire hotel with good views and very comfortable Access to the Executive Lounge made this very worthwhile with complimentary drinks in the evening and no queueing for breakfast in the morning Breakfast was perfect to set you up for a day touring London and catered for all your needs Had mentioned nut allergy when booking and Hotel took every possible step to ensure it wasn t an issue even with room change from upgrade Hotel was in the perfect part of London to explore the capital

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing It was a perfect weekend  Friendly welcoming staff at Reception complimentary drinks offered for my husbands 40th birthday in the amazing Sky Lounge Bar with its fantastic views of the city Perfect location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The air con was extremely noisy on it s original setting I fixed that with difficulty The bed although comfortable was unstable as it was on wheels and actually moved when you got up to go the bathroom   The hotel room was large and the bathroom well appointed Very nice breakfast well cooked poached eggs and lots of fresh fruit and small fresh croissants The rooftop bar was great fun and outstanding Lots of non residents used it as well to add to the fun

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a leak from the flat room into the lobby hallway but there were fixing it Things happen and it was raining Welcome to London  The staff at the desk were very friendly and extremely knowledgeable They explained the best places to visit and best way to get there They also warned about the black cabs and their unscrupulous practices Watch out for your cab fairs from the airport to the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The area for breakfast wasn t really big enough for the size of the hotel big queues each morning although they did move quickly   The location of this hotel is amazing the views from the roof top bar were out of this world Welcome cookie was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Maybe tell people during sign in about the need to use card in order to operate lifts Excellent idea for security just didn t know   Being able to store luggage under supervision from member of staff after signing out if leaving London later Excellent service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a lovely atmosphere in this hotel breakfast was really good warm cookies on arrival great location and a very helpful and friendly staff I would thoroughly recommend a stay here

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having to que for breakfast was not the best Air con in room was noisey   Very good location close to the tube The Tower and Tower Bridge Great choice available for Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was absolutely sure that your offer included breakfast and free cancellation I was surprised therefore to be told that breakfast wasn t included I obviously hadn t checked your confirmation sufficiently however I am convinced that I have been duped   Excellent choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  The room was lovely and spacious and spotless Car parking underground very good but why I decided to drive into central London I don t know

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: When we arrived our hand towel in our bathroom had a stain which looked like dry blood We told reception and asked them all to be replaced in case none of them were changed we received no apology at all and it took them almost half an hour to come and change them I was waiting in the queue to check in for about 30 40 minutes   The hotel in general was incredible the minute we walked in we both said wow The view from the Skylounge was breathtaking We also received a free warm cookie on arrival and I received a free orange juice while waiting in the queue to check in as I was waiting a while

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The fact I rang as I was lost and a member of staff said it was right in front of the Gerkin I was not happy  Just loved it one of the girls at reception was really good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: there really wasn t much not to like about this hotel Service a little slow on arrival and checking out but I am being picky   Excellent value for money great location great staff great breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Most staff are good just happen a staff in service counter is soso black face   Very good location just 200M from tube station Easy change to Piccadilly Line to airport via some stations just across the same platform Price is very reasonable for my stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: while the views were stunning the service at skyline bar was poor during peak times at night with not enough staff  location and value for money a great base to explore London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was expensive should already be included in all room deals   Great location Just around the corner from Tower of London walking distance of great restaurants

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bed mattress was uncomfortable Bedrooms and breakfast dinning area were to warm Bar and Lobby Coffee area service could have been a little better   location of hotel excellent sky lounge bar great restaurant served best steak and peppercorn sauce I ve had in a long time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No service for my room until after 3pm on the first day but a knock on the door by Housekeeping on the morning of check out at 9 15 am Double standards or what Enormous queue for breakfast on Sunday morning at 10 am   Very well appointed room Location is great for attractions nearby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Every thing it was excellent Lovely sky lounge Best hotel I ve been in Biggest breakfast Would recommend to anyone Just wish it was a bit cheaper A big thank you to all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A long strand of hair in the sink after the room had been cleaned We had issues with the i mac TV At one point we had the radio on at the same time as the TV Also the switch on the kettle was faulty I had to hold it down to boil the water However bit these faults were rectified promptly   The staff were superb Nothing was too much trouble and they were so anxious to please Also the view from the 12th floor was great Our room was excellent and the bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room we had didn t have a bath which is what we both like Also checking in wasn t all that good I queued twice first time fair enough we were early for checking in but an hour later I got told out room wasnt ready That s an hour and half after check in time   The close proximity to the tower of London also the staff were very polite Breakfast was lovely and had lots of choice couldn t fault it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The wait for breakfast was ridiculous and the dining room was very disorganised The staff were very friendly but it seemed there were not enough staff working for a busy weekend breakfast   Beautiful hotel and great location very clean The food was very nice too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booked the room based on photos shown Very creative photography Also in all my years travelling I have never had to wait in line for 25 mins for breakfast Organisation is very poor The location of the hotel is excellent but the very small queen size room inefficiency at breakfast leaves a lot to be desired Would not choose this hotel again or recommend it Expected so much more   The location is excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There could be better seating in the room The lighting was too dim in the room There were no power sockets by the beadhead  The skylounge was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booked a twin room but beds not separated before arrival and had to have guest services arrange No big deal but if you book a twin you expect a twin   Welcome cookie and lovely smell in reception Comfortable beds View from sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower door difficult to operate  Very comfortable bed well laid out room with good storage Excellent facility to leave luggage before after check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: For the money it was disappointing I expected a newer hotel It was outdated They did not pay attention to my notes I asked for a higher floor not near elevator Got a handicapped space near elevator on 5th floor   The terrace at the top It was near the boat launch and the tower bridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: One of the bar staff was a little rude We came back from breakfast to find that the cleaner was already in our room We hadn t even checked out   The roof top bar had the most amazing views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were a bit rushed and weren t as friendly and efficiently as I d expect 7 staff behind the desk and still only two groups of guests being dealt with I don t understand the 25 held when you check in There is nothing in the fridge and no food to consume If I d stolen anything from the Mac in the room it would be more than 25 Why not just a swipe of my card Price for two Gins was 19 I get it s London but have a word   Bed was tremendous Place was spotless Cookies were tasty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having to use the key cards for the lifts they did nt always work and the safe did nt work   Little touches like chilled water being available in the reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: One of the members of staff on check in was very rude to my friends We had requested an early check in but it was not available When we went back at the correct check in time we were made to wait as the room was not ready and in the end they moved my friends to a different room altogether We missed our dinner arrangements due to late check in rude staff member and change of rooms so lost about two hours of our day The rest of the staff were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bar was too busy for us Would have been nice if the other side of the bar was open purely for hotel stayers  Good location great links to the tube Good views from the bar upstairs Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location was far from central London approximately 8 tube stops   There were small issues with the room on both nights of our stay Once the staff were informed they were quick and accommodating to resolve them I would stay here again and I recommend the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The English breakfast wasn t as good as we expected but I m fussy with food but all other Food was great  The cookies on arrival were awesome check in and out was quick and simple Easy access to the tube and staff couldn t be more pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Small room tried charging full price when I had a discounted price Staff didnt believe me even when I showed them my booking com account with the price on it Extortionate drink prices   Not a lot

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was worst we have had in such a long time only option of eggs was scrambled which were sloppy and under cooked bacon sausages swimming in grease and beans were stone cold on both days we stayed we had a woman sitting next to us on her own in an overcoat shoving lots of food in her pockets on both days We wondered if she had walked in off the street We were meant to have an upgrafe but this didnt happen we were very dissapointed and wont go back to Hilton Sorry to say   Bed was comfy but room was exceptionally small

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not too keen on the door card having to be used to access lift but I assume it is an added security measure  The hotel was clean and well cared for Rooms were very comfortable with everything needed for a pleasant stay Choice at breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Looks like the hotel is being renovated the room was great but the corridors definately need updating   The location is fantastic so close to the Tower of London the Tube the Thames and the hop on hop off bus tours Even walking distance to St Paul s Cathedral

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I paid for bed and breakfast Although my room was very nice breakfast was a disaster We queued for ages which I can understand but the food was vile and inedible The melon I had was past its best and the scrambled eggs were cold and not cooked I will not pay for breakfast again at a Hilton after this wxperience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Was like gastapo trying to check in and out with the straight faced staff not people friendly atall Overrated prices on drinks at rooftop bar The fact I made a complaint to manager Pino Dispinseri about the towel I used and didn t realise it had blood stains and dirty brown stains on it until I dried myself YUK and nobody had the decency to get back to me about it speaks volumes of the way they care about their guests Our room card stopped working and my husband had to go through a security check to have it re swiped   Location Rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: too few staff in the breakfast room meant that were not able to keep up with clearing tables which left guests waiting to be seated  The breakfast staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The view from our room was of a railway bridge which is disappointing for a hotel of this star rating However whilst there was a queue for breakfast the actual food was of a good standard with an acceptable choice of food We visit London quite regularly and we have had better deals at other five star hotels Our experience is that we can get better accommodation for this money   The location near tower bridge was great However when we got to the room we were cold and could not get any heat out of the system In addition we were unable to increase the volume on the tv to a level when we did not have to sit right next to it to hear it However when we raised these issues with the staff they quickly came and adjusted the tv and brought us a heater and that was fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The wait to get in for breakfast but fair play the staff came round with fruit juice while you were waiting   Lovely breakfast order the poached egg s soft yum yum

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We would have liked the breakfast however it is very pricey and really should be included in the price of the stay instead we went to wetherspoons for our breakfast costing us only 10 00 pounds for the both of us rather than 42 00   The bed was comfortable and the hotel was noise free which gave me and my husband the best nights sleep in a hotel we have ever had The sky lounge Is amazing with fabulous views beautiful drinks along with a vibrant atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast room is far too small the lifts are very slow better options for dining would have been good   The checking supervisor helping checkin at 2pm on the Friday 9th Sept was fantastic sorry didn t get his name the other staff were always polite the diamond status benefits in the exec lounge were very good thanks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I would of thought that a Queens suite would off been a bit larger it felt like a standard room  Fantastic breakfast selection and the Sky bar was great although they closed off the veranda at 10 30 why

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Sky lounge thought it would be a quiet place to have a drink snack Unfortunately it was extremely noisy we could hear the noise from leaving lift full of hen parties So left and used lobby cafe Food not great in Natural restaurant attached to hotel should have used room service   Bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No issues Very polite young man when difficulty finding bags for leaving but great you kept them for us anyway on our last day   Great bed nice and firm Loved the sky lounge for cocktails and celebration with friends after Billy Joel concert Our room was ready even tho we arrived early hoping you could just store our bag

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Would have preferred a cheaper price but still good value for money  Location amazing staff so welcoming Welcome cookie the BEST cookie I ve ever had

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was no milk for my tea at the lobby bar   Bed was amazing Loved the Mac PCs made it easier to plan our route Staff were very friendly Room was spotless The shower was insanely good Awesome

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Although a very nice touch a welcome cookie For those of us who have a nut allergy and in this day and age plenty people do It would be nice to offer something without a nut content  The closeness to underground and attractions shopping

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Seemed unorganised at all times Had to join HH members for the 3rd time as unable to find previous registrations Asked for ID again after already checking in and having taken credit card details and storing our luggage Due to having to go back as room not ready when initially arriving   Comfortable bed Clean room Nice bathroom Good facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Need a bed sheet as well as duvet for comfort and cleanliness Most hotels don t provide one I ve never understood this Breakfast the scrambled egg was too moist it would have been easier to eat it with a spoon Overall breakfast was great   so convenient to all parts of London a stylish entrance and good size breakfast room polite staff on check in Loved the complimentary water in room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Cooked breakfast was not the best but the bakery was lovely   Clean chic comfortable hotel in a great location Despite the hotel being huge and very busy there was no noise in our room from other guests or outside

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Powerful room freshner that hits you at reception   Spacious and well provided public areas Very accesible location Chocolate cookies on arrival get you off to a good start

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I had to wait in a line for the attendant The cleaning lady came 3 times while i am in the room The liquid soap was stuck Would not pour out   I am a vegetarian I found things to eat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The Natural Kitchen Didn t enjoy the meal   Great location great facilities which included a personal safe Room was very clean tidy also comfy Very much enjoyed the sky lounge It was everything I expected more

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not for those on a tight budget   Fantastic location with excellent transport links Brilliant breakfasts Room facilities spot on Beautiful nighttime views of the river from the Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Quality of English breakfast was not up to scratch for this standard of hotel some items undercooked and restaurant too small for the numbers appreciate busy time but better to wait than get poorly cooked food  Location staff very attentive and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A couple of staff members walked into our room without knocking when we first arrived The rooms were very nice but basic   Great location Comfortable beds Lovely breakfast The sky bar and the food there was fantastic Stunning view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Great location for all popular sightseeing places comfy bed great shower super roof bar terrace great views Tower of London tower bridge the shard and gherkin breakfast plentiful and fantastic choice to set you up for the day had a superb weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only comment I would make was the breakfast area was far too busy in comparison to the other parts of the facility   Loved the spaciousness of the hotel Nothing was too much a very relaxing weekend The restaurant was truly amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was continually disturbed by the cleaners who didn t seem to understand that I was working away in my room and didn t need any house cleaning Some guests may appreciate having the beds made by someone else but it s not something I needed and after saying once that I didn t want it I would think they would have got the message and left me in peace This was the only downside to an excellent stay   The room was well kept nice bathroom and excellent shower The bed was particularly comfortable and having an iron in the room was of use

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Earth shattering bar prices Couldn t afford more than one drink which was a shame guess you are paying for the view  Great location immaculate rooms great breakfast friendly staff Great roof bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some of the pictures were misleading and gave the impression that you can see the Thames River from the hotel s rooms This was not really so The back entrance access is not very inviting To be fair there isn t anything extra special about the hotel for the price paid   The view from the 12th floor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room and bathroom are quite small but comfortable Watch your credit card for extra charge at their bar that you didn t make   Excellent location Make sure to check out the lounge on the last floor awesome views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only criticism I could make is that there were no tea coffee available in the room either for that late night after drinks or that early morning rush all though it s available in room service it s nice just to make your own   All of the hotel staff were so nice and a pleasure to talk to all with excellent knowledge and all to egar to please which made our stay even better than expected excellent location and would definitely stay again and would recommend to all my friends

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room we were staying in was a little disappointing as when we looked out of the window we could just see other peoples rooms I understand this is the lay out of the hotel   Very clean and tidy staff were welcoming and helpful Also LOVED the sky lounge bar Amazing view and all over a lovely bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: That breakfast isn t included in the rate of the room considering its 115 for a one night stay   Sky Lounge Bar was amazing Beautiful views of London on the sunny day we stayed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was there for conference and the air conditioning wasn t really working in the meeting rooms   The bedroom was perfect The staff nice Voucher if I decide not to have housekeeping was thoughtful extra incentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We actually found it rather difficult to find the hotel when we first arrived by tube Once we found it it was easy to go to the tube each day for our sightseeing   We found the staff very helpful especially when I needed help with connecting to the internet with our cell phone The hotel was very clean and restful and the room was kept very nice each day There were also some restaurants nearby and it was close to the tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only issue we had while staying was the TV was very quite you couldnt have the air con on and hear the TV comfortabley the Roof top bar looked lovely from the pictures however we didnt get to see it was we went to have a drink but waited 15 minuets to be served and when your about to spend thirty pounds on two drinks we didnt really expect to wait so long so we left   The hotel was in a brillant location and was extreamly easy to check in and park in the hotels car park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooftop bars southside one is taken over by non residents and drunks North side bar doesn t seem accessible this should be made residents only   Good front desk service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge roof top bar was really good although it had a disgusting smell when you first walk in very sicky   The rooms were very spacious and the bed was extremely large and comfy Breakfast was yummy Location was spot on right near tower hill underground station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: More tea bags and milk would be good for the tea making facilities  Everything staff lovely Helpful Clean really good facilities breakfast excellent and of course the sky lounge leaving our luggage after checking out excellent will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room preparation subpar Had to switch rooms three times One hadn t been thoroughly cleaned and checked another had a leaking fridge another had a leaking conditioner   Good location near Tower of London London Bridge historical sites

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had to queue for 20 minutes for breakfast They brought us all juices whilst we wait However I have never had to wait for breakfast in a hotel before so they struggled to accommodate for all of their guests at popular times We booked this hotel knowing that the Sky Lounge was part of it It was packed and we could not reserve a hotel beforehand either so we ended up standing   The rooms were very comfortable and spacious Modern en suite was nice Breakfast had a good selection of choice The Sky Lounge had beautiful views of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only one minor point The breakfast pots could have been cleared quicker When returning to our table after eating fresh fruit the dirty pots were still on the table when we bought out cooked breakfast back to the table the same happened again when we returned with out toast   Great prompt service at the reception on arrival and departure Knowledgeable staff member who recommended a restaurant close to the theatre which we were booked to see that day Good size clean and comfortable modern room Great roof top bar with fantastic views Excellent stay will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a mix up with room service breakfast on our last day but I found the hotel staff very quick to offer apologies and do their best to make up for the error   Service was excellent We discovered shortly after we arrived that my son was allergic to the down in the bedding A call to the front desk resulted in a quick resolution with housekeeping immediately replacing all the bedding The location is excellent as well So close to wonderful sites tourist activities and train and Tube stations that made navigating London a fun part of our stay I would stay at this property again with no hesitation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge was smelling like vomit for all night we couldn t even have a drink for more than 2 minutes The check out was 30 minutes excessive time And we ordered the queen room in the top of the hotel and they gave us the second floor   I loved the bed and the commodities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 1 I was given incorrect information about opening times for the sky Lounge was told 2am so when me and my partner turned up they closed the terrace within 5 mins of us being there This was a special treat for his 30th birthday and that was the reason I chose this location because the views were phenomenal absolutely pointless as we couldn t even take one picture 2 When I was given the wrong times I was also told that all restaurant were closed but we had access to room service great idea until the bill came up to 76 and the food was microwaved and cold on top of it I wasn t expecting a Michelin star dinner but something half decent I didn t even finish my streak as I got tired of chewing it and it turned so hard it s like I had a ball of plastic in my mouth My chips and steak were cold which is disgusting Finally I asked for the steaks to be medium rare and it couldn t have been further from what I asked for for that anount of money I would expect it to be fresh at least I mentioned this to the person I checked out with and he said thanks I ll pass it on to the kitchen What kind of service is that He couldn t even looked or sounded bothered by it at all It s very upsetting as we didn t feel valued at all 3 I called reception and asked a simple question but the operator ended up laughing at me as if I was asking him something pathetic There was so much sarcasm in his voice and it was simply rude I asked if the sky lounge would be playing any football on the morning we checked out he laughed and said no no no it s not that kind of a bar we most definitely won t be playing the football and he carried on laughing at me I was so shocked from his response and so disapointed that all I could say is ok thank you   1 Mickala at reception when we us 2 The bed was super comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Cocktails were quite expensive there wasn t a lot of option on the late night menu the scrambled egg at breakfast was awful  The pillows were amazing the room was very clean cosy view from the rooftop bar was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: not really a gripe but tried to go up to the sky lounge on the evening of our stay but could not find a seat or table as full of people from outside the hotel would be good if they reserved an area for hotel guests  everything from check in staff to breakfast servers

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   I liked the warm cookies on check in the beds were really comfy room climate control was great especially in the heatwave The hotel was in a great location very central to everything Room was really clean facilities were excellent Staff were really helpful and friendly thank you very much we had a great stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: For the money compared to the website photos the room was pretty basic  Location the fitness room were great Very clean room friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I wish the gym had been bigger and a sauna and a swimming pool would have been a big plus  The location the hotel is only 2min walk from the underground station you ve got plenty of bus routes in the area and you are minutes away from Tower Bridge and the River Thames

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very strange unpleasant smell at the sky bar We did feed this back at check out so hopefully no longer an issue  Good location happy with rooms and facilities would stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Need more staff at breakfast to clear away tables so that the queues to eat could be smaller  The whole experience we have stopped here before and that is why we came back Comfort of room Bed etc and especially the sky lounge with them views at night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We have stayed here before and everything is perfect Nothing is too much trouble Great location near the tube great for sightseeing too Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The beds were a little too hard and bathroom a teeny bit too small No vent for hot showers and mirrors steamed up quickly  The fold out mirror above the desk Perfect for make up and hair straightners The Mac computer tv was very useful and easy to use

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The Apple computer for a TV was trendy Worked fine once you figured how to control the volume from the keyboard   Breakfast was phenomenal Fresh fruit hot selections fresh and delicious Excellent for fueling up before going sight seeing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Be good to have a proper handle on the executive lounge door as guests kept leaving it open Breakfast was extremely disappointing My tea was lukewarm and undrinkable and all the hot food was also barely warm Strange that the toaster which appeared to be on a go slow was at the opposite end of the room to the hot buffet which added to the problem The juices could benefit from having ice in them The cereal and fruit area was nice though with a good selection to choose from   The hotel was extremely quiet and the bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didnt ask if we had a good stay Couldnt get wifi and tried to call careline but no answer came down at 6 30 for breakfast as the sign said 6 30 till 9 was the best time but didnt open until 7   Breakfast was really good The breakfast staff were fabulous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The glasses in the room were dirty The rooftop bar had a very unpleasant smell constantly and staff were extremely rude and not helpful or accommodating   Cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Hard to fault but being picky could have had more than 2 sugars left everyday so we could have 2 cups of tea   Lovely location 2 mins walk to Tower Hill underground station Warm cookie on arrival Comfortable clean rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No effort even though it was my birthday and was specified on booking Breakfast in room cancelled as was 40 mins late Poor selection of cooked food in exec lounge   Great bar Good breakfast selction in main restaurant great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The carpet in the room could of done with a clean and there was a burn mark on the desk   The rooftop bar was amazing little overpriced but views are fantastic very close to tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On arrival queued 20 minutes to be told that check in wasn t done at that desk Debit card swiped as cover for any extras Paid for drinks on room Friday night Saturday afternoon refused to charge to room as no credit very embarrassing Waited 30 minutes for drinks Later Saturday night accepted payment to room Letter then received to say we hadn t paid for drinks settled the bill Dirty pots left in room all weekend   Location was ideal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lift was a bit hard to fathom out But it was a very minor thing   The location was excellent near a tube and around the corner from the DLR It only took 30 mins from the airport The room was so comfortable and the staff were very helpful Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Long queues for the breakfasts in the morning but on a note we came down around the most popular time as well   We celebrated our 5th Anniversary and the Reservations and Guest Service made a brilliant job in getting the little extra for us Even helped out to get a hand written card in the room as a surprise Nice job by the kitchen staff with presentation of a selection of fruit and pastries Over all great hotel great location and great staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Operating the lift was not straight forward Dinner was good but the salad was wilted and discoloured chips not very good   The hotel was clean and comfortable Location was great for places we wanted to visit

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast was overpriced We decided not to include it to our booking and was glad as the queue seemed long for most of the morning   The sky bar was lovely and a great way to end our evening We were offered an upgrade on arrival along with complimentary warm cookies and the parking was simple

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Difficult to get to 1st nite of stay air conditioning unit wasn t working so made the nite a very difficult sleep Second nite after requesting engineer to fix the air conditioning My room had a water leak and had to move rooms midnight of our last night No concerns from the staff no help for bags to be assisted in moving rooms No complimentary offers Had to complain to stand in supervisor who seemed unhelpful till I said I know the CEO of Hilton hotels Overall hotel stay was not the best The hotel itself was pleasant but the service given was not good at all and left a bad taste in our mouths   Pleasant at start and location was fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Obviously the location means prices are sky high because they can be 14 for a glass of wine for example Also we left our bags while we went out In return 6 20 Friday 19th August 2916 the man on Guest Services was on the phone Fair enough but he didn t acknowledge us or indeed the large queue that was forming behind He totally ignored us all not even getting a passing colleague over to take care of the now huffing and puffing queue As a result the last part of our holiday was incredibly stressful as we had to rush for a train we d budgeted an hours time to catch and were left with 30 Thanks Hilton and thankyou whoever you are useless guest services man   Great location and very attractive hotel and facilities Be sure to visit the 12th floor bar with great views over the Thames Another nice touch is they give you 5 for the bar if you don t use room service they claim this is for the environment but as we all know it actually saves them a fortune on staff and cleaning PLUS it helps the world as collateral Also if they can t sort out a problem you ll get further vouchers for the bars etc My good side says this is a nice way to keep customers happy my cynical side have you spotted I have one It s tragic says it keeps punters on site where they can keep spending lovely money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wish it had a bath instead of a shower as after 4 days working and being on your feet all the time it would have been a bonus   Bed was comfy Rooms were cleaned to perfection Everything you needed in the room for a business trip Tea and coffee and an iron if needed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was so basic and and very disappointing the view was aesthetically horrendous It was for a birthday surprise and I requested a nice spacious room with a good view nope needless to say we got a box room with a view of brick walls and vent ducts   Location breakfast in house bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a BBQ outside the back and only had 6 customers all day because no signs was put out and as my boyfriend had one he couldn t rate the quality high enough Advertise events more   Bed is so comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Sofa bed wasn t made up no bedding in the room Sofa bed had crumbs and TV remote in terrible experience at roof top bar service was shocking I never got my meal and my husbands bread was mouldy as we were only in London 1day this was were we chose to eat so I had nothing to eat as we didn t have time to then go anywhere else A couple next to us left and never got their drinks We were not charged and received a few free drink and teddies for the kids They re nearly 7 and 8 so weren t impressed with them There wasn t enough toilet roll in the room when I asked a lady who worked there in the hallway she couldn t understand English It s a lovely hotel and was really happy when we first arrived but wouldn t stay at a hilton again We had a bad experience in Manchester a few yrs ago and said never again but as this was a Doubletree thought it would be better   Cookies on arrival lovely family room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had to move rooms because the air vent was really loud and couldn t be turned off TV didn t work on all channels   Location Handy for the tube Nice and central

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms were tired Breakfast was very cramped was difficult to get in out of table The shower was tiny slippery Check in was a lengthy process Felt it was expensive for a room that wasn t particularly plush   The Sky Lounge The bed pillows were extremely comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room service food I refused to pay for the room service as the quality of food wasn t up to standard and the receptionist refunded Wifi was included but no details provided   The breakfast was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: For me and my partner the bed was very firm and made our night sleep quite uncomfortable and sleepless However everybody has their own level of comfort   Staff were very welcoming Location is excellent Positioned almost instantly in front of the tower Bridge making the sky lounge roof terrace bar even better with such amazing views across London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet was very busy no matter what time we went down and we always had to wait However the staff there were excellent seating people keeping the buffet topped up Good selection for breakfast with delicious muffins   Everything Great location roof top bar Spotlessly clean well organised

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: position of the bed too close to the wall would prefer king size bed attitude of receptionist when we queried our bill  the reception area is pleasant and a nice place to sit Loved the Skylounge being able to park the car

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: What spoiled our experience slight y was when are room key did not work and we were met with demands for identification and were then marched to a room where a very polite but slightly embarrassed young man had to show us in and obtain I d before we could access are room paid for in advance with are poccessions belongings and money We did complain it was more to do with who was managing the reception rather than the staff who were all very courteous overall We were given tickets for drinks as an apology I understand security is needed however it was quite embarrassing at the time As we considered the key not working was not our fault however was instructed we had left the key to close to our mobile devices But don t want this to turn in to a complaint as we enjoyed are stay great location and very clean rooms Overall the staff were very kind   On arrival we were checked in by two very polite and friendly ladies We were given the option of a upgrade which was for a reasonable price We were given cookies and free drinks for the sky line bar The hotel is beautiful and the sky line bar fantastic with fabulous views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in took about 30 mins because the hilton hadn t allocated rooms for the wedding party 5 booked total I paid fir the rooms in full 1600 and a security deposit 300 not mentioned beforehand btw 1 week after check out I noticed 1900 leave my account I called my bank thinking it could be fraud after the honeymoon period They claimed it was the hilton with pre authorisation I called the hilton who claimed that itnis standard protocol to charge 1900 on the day and then preauthorise an additional 1900 7 days later they held onto this for a further 7 days The hilton claimed it would take 7 10 days to return to my acocunt due to barclays making an error which barckays refused entirely I have not had my security deposit returned to me at this stage i stayed 9th to 11th july I will never book with this hotel chain again Additionally mini bar was empty When i requested it was filled it fell in deaf ears The breakfast was busy and had a que to get into the restaurant Overall I found the whole wedding experience was ruined because of the hotel They simply don t care and fail to understand that taking money such a large sum can have real life impact on a person   Rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On arrival the member of staff tried to continuously sell us extras Breakfast is way too overpriced when there s a Wetherspoons around the corner which does it got 4 59 I didn t have the hotel breakfast There always seemed to be a queue for the breakfast too Sky Lounge prices were extortionate 27 for two drinks   Warm cookie on arrival yummy Atrium smelt really nice Really clean and tidy Great views from the rooftop bar Very quiet didn t hear a thing from our room on the 6th floor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We arrived around 10 30 on the Saturday morning and did the check in At the time of booking I requested quiet adjoining rooms we were travelling with my father in law The check in person booked us in 2 adjoining rooms We spent the day in London and only came back around 21 30 When we got to our rooms they weren l side by side at all 650 and 669 We were so tired that we decided not to ask to change room and leave things as they were Then at around 22 00 we started to hear very loud music We were in a supposedly quiet room on the inside of the hotel with a view on the Atrium and not on the street I called guest services once explaining the situation I was told that it probably was one of the neighboors I told her that it was loud and echoing and I was wondering if maybe it came from the cafe on the 12th floor we were on the 6th The person not particularly nice told me that she was going to check She called 5 minutes later to tell me that there was a private party in the cafe on the 12th floor and that they would ask them to be a little quieter It was indeed quieter for about 5 minutes than started again really loud I called again and another person told me that in about 10 minutes it would quieten down it was about 10 20 then We went to bed but didn t fall asleep before midnight as the music carried on loudly until that time I mentionned this to the person who did our check out the next morning and basically she said that if we want a quieter room we shouldn t take a room on the upper floors I feel like the staff didn t really care about that noise business I would also like to add that I am an Hilton Honors member but that booking was made using Bookings com so they didn t know We came to stay here in December as Honors members and they were al lot nicer then This is not normal they shouldn t be nicer to some guests and not others   Very nice breakfast nice location and brand new hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Guest lift badly explained with a faded sign that was hard to read select floor THEN insert room card into an unmarked slot Room AC out of order off switch did not work   Very polite and efficient staff and good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London

Full_Review: No pina colada or purple rain classic cocktails on menu in sky lounge   Friendly staff amazing cookie on arrival clean environment use of executive lounge following our upgrade

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The long queues at the reception desk average of 15 minutes wait Rooms were not ready when we arrived at 17 30 Check in from 15 00 although we had previously checked in and left our bags Once in our rooms felt the need to upgrade our rooms from Queen to King as not as expected Had to queue for 20 minutes for a breakfast table and to wait 5 10 minutes for the buffet trays to be replenished Not ideal if your on a time schedule With a few exceptions Marcus the staff were unfriendly and unhelpful   Ideal location for London tourists Comfortable Great views from the roof terrace

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We arrived at our room to find a Z bed made up this had not been requested there was only 2 of us also the room was not big enough for a Z bed it restricted access to the window wardrobe and other facilities This was removed when we asked I had requested a quiet room yet we were put in a room just below the Sky Lounge you could hear the constant opening and closing of sliding doors and moving furniture as you can imagine this went on well into the night We paid for access to the executive lounge yet on 2 occasions on a 3 night stay we were unable to use the facilities 1st time the lounge was closed for floor maintenance and the 2nd time the Coffee machine was out of order and the cleaner was vacuuming surly this could have been done when the lounge closed   Nice modern hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was lovely but needed bigger serving bowls for the hot food at peak times  Location was excellent hotel room nice and modern comfortable bed and small by perfectly formed bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Great location a few minutes walk from tube station and the Sky Garden Friendly check in and swift pleasant service Lovely breakfast good selection and very nice muffins

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No issues to report although check in could have been a bit quicker It was busy but more reception staff would have cleared queues quicker   Excellent location close to points of interest around Tower Bridge and transport links Hotel well designed Staff very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was very warm and the air con system was very loud the choice was either a hot room or a lack of sleep due to the noise of the air con  Comfy bed and pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast poor lukewarm and kept on running out of items Air con faulty in our room Newspaper didn t arrive and tea and coffee supplies not refilled  Location good sized room Sky bar and staff very helpful The Sky bar is a terrific location This is a good hotel spoilt by lack of attention to detail

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I could smell smoke in my room from time to time and in the corridor and the lifts I mentioned this to the team on reception and they were apologetic Gave me a voucher for 2 free drinks in the bar Ok but would of expected at least a discounted stay   Compact rooms Great sky bar nice reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I found the pillows on the bed too soft I didn t check to see if I could have had a firmer one as it was only for one night   We stayed at this hotel for the location we could work to the tube station to get directly into the West End The rooms are comfortable with good facilities we also had room service which wasn t too expensive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No decent restaurant for evening meal everywhere closed on Sunday night queuing to check in for fifteen minutes  Guest relations team extremely helpful very comfortable bedroom quiet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had a queen room and were expecting a larger bed and more windows in the room as only had one narrow one   Staff were friendly cookie on arrival a nice touch location great breakfast and rooftop bar amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Close to tube station Soundproof rooms Sky bar had great views of Tower Bridge and the skyline Well equipped room Free wifi Modern clean bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booked two rooms as a group booking and were given ones with an interconnecting door which was lovely Incredibly comfortable beds and excellent facilities in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Executive Room was very small for what you pay for so god only knows what a double room was like Lifts were an issue for many guests   Very nice hotel in a great location Very good breakfast and excellent Executive Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing Only stayed for 2 nights but no complaints   Location is excellent Rooms were comfortable and quiet at night The views from the Sky bar are amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booking com stated the rate included breakfast but when we got there it did not Staff wanted 21 50 each for breakfast So went to wetherspoons 4 49 each Feel misled by booking com but hotel and staff were great  Large glass windows made it very airy Roof top bar was great Views were lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were extra friendly when we arrived got our room straight away which we didn t think would be possible and also a delicious cookie Amazing sky bar lovely room would recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Sometimes the room key card system used for the lift doesn t work properly and the lift gets confused   We have stayed in this hotel for a few years now and it just seems to keep getting better If you hit it on a day when its prices are sub 200 I would say you d be hard pressed to find better value in London The rooms are a bit small unless you opt for an upgrade but they are well equipped and quiet The layout of the breakfast area has been significantly improved by someone recently and whoever they are they deserve to be congratulated The staff are always superb especially our old friend Abdul on breakfast service who has a smile that would light up any room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Receiving incorrect information from the reception desk regarding food being served at the Sky Lounge Also I had a disabled guest as part of my party for whom I booked a disabled access room He told me that the room didn t have the best facilities and also it was too far away from the lift for someone with his disability He is on crutches I am able bodied and had a room which was only 20 feet from the lift but with no disability access   We loved the Sky Lounge in particular The location was very good too for exploring The Hotel was very modern and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Beds very hard Very plain lacking pictures colour especially in corridors Lifts were a bit temperamental at times lots of people took several goes to reach floor Roof top bar open to public very noisy at night the alternative bar in Foyer was slow and the cocktails were awful don t bother   The location and views from roof terrace were great Very friendly staff warm welcome and breakfast staff especially friendly and helpful Excellent breakfast selection Very Quiet Very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I do not think there was anything that could have been better   The staff very friendly helpful The roof top bar great cookies lovely Perfect location Beds very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We made a booking for two double rooms online We checked in at different times First room was very basic Queen guest room and we were offered an upgrade for 50 pppn which we declined Second room was very nice King executive room but it was given to us automatically for no extra cost Why the double standards   The welcome cookie was a nice touch and there were ice machines on a number of floors You got a 5 voucher if you requested no housekeeping the next day In addition the Sky Terrace offers fantastic views and the hotel s location is within short walking distance of the City many tourist attractions and the Tower Hill tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It s a little far away from the main attractions so take into consideration the location if you wish to stay here   Room was lovely and the bed was so comfortable The staff were very welcoming and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was expensive It was included in a package with other amenities we weren t interested in   The location was perfect for us because it was close to the docklands train to the conference site and close to the subway to travel to plays etc comfortable modern hotel and the warm chocolate chip cookie at check in was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast room was very busy and tabels close together wich made it very unrelaxing and hasseled  Location was great quiet and comfortable room although very small was ok as we didn t spend much time in it Breakfast was good with lots of choices

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Price was quite high for the room parking was limited and I actually picked up a parking ticket after staff telling me parking was suspended due to the machines not working   Service was good comfortable stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some rooms location too far from the lift lobby Lifts were busy at peak hours especially evening when people were going up to the skylounge bar  Good location less than five minutes walking distance from Tower Hill station Nearby pubs Quiet area at night Gd service However check the location of your room as the room we got is very far from the lift lobby so was a hassle especially when moving luggage TV is using a Mac computer zcreen so ome may like it some may not It was simple to operate for us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Checking in was over complicated if you are English and you reside in England why do you have to prove it to a receptionist who obviously wasn t English And the bar bill said the gratuity was discretionary when it obviously wasn t

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room quite hot even with aircon on 30 a day car parking fee No tea coffee facilities in the room  Good size room bed comfy modern room decor such as TV etc complimentary water and toiletries

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I booked this hotel for a birthday present for 2 nights and its wasn t cheap For the price I paid the quality and standard of the room was not good While the room had an apple desktop this was the only thing fancy about the room Double bed was tiny small window with no view basic bathroom and decor in the room and no birthday card on arrival for my partner as promised by the hotel The drink prices in the sky rooftop bar were very expensive and overpriced   The location was great next to tube station and a fresh warm cookie on arrival Staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was small No USB port other than I unplugged the mouse on the Mac Tv keyboard They did have 2 old modem jacks Who still uses those Tiny shower stall   Service and staff were pleasant and professional Buffet breakfast was good Bed was fluffy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: upon arrival we were checked into a room that had none of the sockets working only lights and sink in bathroom completely jammed blocked it took a few attempts to find a member of staff who felt responsible for our complaints but eventually we were given another room higher standard and 2 free drink vouchers besides on both mornings we found an enormous queue for breakfast not at the actual buffet but on the door all the way through the lobby to the elevators we had to wait 25 min just to get into the breakfast area there were plenty of unoccuppied tables that just haven t been cleared yet as the restaurant was obviously way under staffed Even if the hotel had been fully booked this is just unacceptable Some people must have waited up to 45 min Just ridiculous Breakfast itself was decent but hard to enjoy after such a long waiting time   Central location only a few steps to tower and tower bridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location is really good It is closed to the underground station Service is also perfect We arrived a little early but staffs also helped us check in Excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was really bad Old dirty carpet bathroom door wouldn t stay open you needed to put sth in front of the door if you didn t want to be kept in the bathroom The shower head and hose were fastened which was a very unpleasant experience for showering the hair All over the room experience was very poor   The location is great the Sky Bar superb the entrance area really nice Alex the concierge was really helpful nice and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in took a really long time we queued for over 1 2 hour Our twin beds were separated but with only about 6 inches between the beds   Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Arrived early thinking I would need to leave my bags in the luggage room and come back later Instead greeted with a warm cookie and it was no problem to check in early

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Service charge at 12 5 was a bit much but maybe that s expected in a high class hotel like this Didn t spoil our stay  Amazing hotel Staff very helpful and friendly You just have to go to the skylounge The views are incredible overlooking London with a cocktail or glass of bubbles ect Loved London and the hotels location was perfect for everything we had planned

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bar staff at the sky lounge Tall black lady asked by her manager to serve me three times until eventually I got served and even then no smile Rude Everyone else great   Access to the exec lounge that came with the suite was a nice bonus Room itself tower suite was amazing Accommodation staff so very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A complimentary warm chocolate cookie on arrival was just the first part of such a wonderful and thoughtful weekend With gorgeous rooms excellent facilities and an army of staff that were smiley full of care and very attentive we will definitely be staying at Double Tree again No doubt about it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Brilliant service from housekeeping I left a toilet bag with expensive skincare products which they very kindly posted back to me received 36 hours after notifying them on Sunday night

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wish it was cheaper so we could afford to stay there more often   Staff were friendly Lots of places to sit in the lobby where there s also a cafe Sky lounge was beautiful Location is a minutes walk from Tower Hill tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately your picture of the queen room and the size of the actually room are very different It s very Much smaller and in turn we had to pay an extra 50 to get a decent room  The staff were very helpful and attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Air conditioning was a little noisy   Friendly staff very helpful and in an excellent location for visiting attractions Visit to Skyline bar is a must for tourists

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I cannot think of anything that disappointed me   It can be quite daunting being on your own but the staff were very helpful and friendly The hotel has a really nice atmosphere unlike some I have stayed at in London My room was very comfortable and clean Check in was very quick and you are presented with a cookie on arrival which is a nice touch The hotel is ideally located for tourist attractions and the main line station and underground is a few moments away Next time I have to go up to London I will definitely stay in this hotel again and I have recommended it to my son when he visits London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: we paid 199 for a tiny room when we double checked prices night before it had gone down to 139 and hotel wouldn t change price of the room or even upgrade us even though we knew hotel wasn t full some of the staff were quite rude I am on crutches and one bar staff member pushed past me Stayed at Doubletrees before and had much better rooms for far less price than this was and that was at Xmas time bit of a rip off really   the rooftop bar was very good good selection of drinks and good atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: They have a very silly and very annoying thing that you have to carry the paper wallet as well as key to charge to your room even though this is less secure for the customer as it makes it easier for crooks to pick up your details and get to your room This is because the restaurant is NOT Hilton s and they don t understand they could do a better deal so as not to upset customers   Breakfast great room great staff great overall very nice but very pricey hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I thought that the price of breakfast was quite extortionate just as a heads up Natural Kitchen do a beautiful breakfast for quite a bit less money A member of house keeping entered our room at one point with very little warning however she was polite and apologised for the intrusion   The public areas of the hotel were beautifully kept really quite breathtaking Absolutely loved the fresh cookie on arrival I d had a long journey and that made me smile I was disappointed that I didn t get chance to see The Rooftop bar but I m sure it was super special Our room was comfortable and clean The fact that the tube station was minutes if not seconds away was wonderful Really handy and after a late night at the theatre it was very convenient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Second key never worked even after being reloaded  Location excellent within walking distance of two stations and one of London top attractions Staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was not impressed by the room size very small Or the size of the Shampoo and conditioner   Location Sky lounge was stunning a great place to visit at night Cookies a nice welcome treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A couple of poor issues first having been out all day seeing the sights to get back to the room for a freshen up and rest found the room hadn t been serviced Chased housekeeping who seemed surprised we wanted it done Skylounge terrace is open til midnight yet you couldn t but a drink at the outside bar which closed at 11 30 meaning the bar inside was 4 deep Finally paying for a supposed upgrade an extra 50 on checking what I had booked it wasn t an upgrade may officially complain about the last point Overall good location but many small things need sorting out for the money you pay   Staff were helpful although clearly not enough of them to cope with the volumes of guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff rude stole money out my account No tourist spots help Dismissed even when asked for bars open in and around london in am   Room small but comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very noisy air conditioner did ask for a view so was abit disappointed we were on the 5 floor would have like a higher floor  Very good selection in the breakfast Room clean very good shower great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: In the reception work many people but there is a mess whom to turn to They booked money when check in on credit card and when we decided we better pay immediately there was still double reservation on the card even when we already returned from the trip They did not release it When we arrived the room was not ready and they did not notice when it was ready even we agreed so in the reception They do not let to enter the Sky bar even with older children from 18 00 in the evening what is that There are very modern Mac screens in the rooms as TV as well but no manual how to use the remote   We liked its modern and new The breakfast was superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The attitude of staff in lounge bar Was told we would have to vacate our table at 7pm this was at 6 55pm as it was reserved There were no notices to advice us of this I think we were picked out to move as there were only 2 of us   Great location very clean comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel does NOT have the views specified within the description The rooms are small and bed was not comfy The hotel is not worth the money paid at all and there are several other hotels in the area that are cheaper Not impressed especially as this is a Hilton chain   The location was the only positive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Another great stay at a Hilton hotel staff extremely friendly and attentive very comfortable bed in a lovely clean room Would definitely recommend the Double Trees by Hilton and we will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Window would not latch properly poor first nights sleep due to outside noise FIxed with a paper wedge after no joy at reception great second night  Excellent modern hotel with a fantastic breakfast spotless room and a great atmosphere in the sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Was a surprise birthday present for my hubby Room not ready for 45 mins When had access to room stunk of smoke so had to get moved then caused a rush to get ready for his party   Bed was very comfortable had everything in the room we needed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Had to wait a full hour for room to be ready Already a late check in of 3pm no room until 4pm Extremely disappointing Customer service gave the excuse of it s a Saturday we are busy not what I expect from the Hilton chain   Lovely hotel easy access to the theatre district

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel room was clean and bright and the bed was very comfortable The welcome by the reception staff was great made a little bit more special when given a cookie to welcome us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: More cookies D  The hotel the cookies the breakfasts the room the rooftop bar the friendly staff the location the marathon extras the post checkout bag storage

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The way breakfast was handled was awful huge queues staff kept removing half filled dishes to replenish making it worse instead of bringing food out to top it up Clearly peak times need more staff for the money we spend surely a few more hours could be spent as the ones in were working SO hard or have an extra room to deal with an overspill This is not rocket science   Location and overall hotel experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 12 12 service charge for a cocktail seemed a bit steep Building works going on next door caused a bit of noise  Early check in warm cookies on arrival bed was very comfortable views from Sky bar were immense secure car park friendly staff location was perfect for my trip Would highly recommend and would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: lifts didn t work mac in the room didn t work staff weren t overly polite not worth the money paid  breakfast being included in the price good choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
