Full_Review: Would have loved a bath but that is all   Excellent staff good accommodation and most wonderful breakfast Location was perfect for the London marathon both for running and spectating The sky lounge bar was very very cool Will go back next year marathon weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately we had faulty air conditioning The staff were very helpful when we pointed it out   The hotel is well situated and has the air of luxury The staff were pleasant and helpful The sky bar was beautiful but a little pricey Breakfast is really good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: More information could have been given about how the lifts operate when checking in   Had a king room and although the room was quite basic the bed was very comfortable All the staff were very nice and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My room was a little smaller than expected for a queen room the pillows were a little to soft for my liking But not a massive issue   Ideal location as it just a 5 minute walk from Tower Hill tube station The hotel was clean fresh on entering The staff were friendly very accommodating I throughly enjoyed my stay would use again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: didn t have much time to use everything   all worked as advertised I have been there ten times or so 200yds from tower hill tube great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Although the hotel is in close proximity to the river Thames the Tower of London the London Bridge the more London riverside development and the Tower Hill underground station the view of these London landmarks are obscured by the adjacent buildings The card access system to the lifts and the rooms rarely worked and had to be replaced quite often The latter was time consuming and ate into our holiday time The breakfast was very ordinary   The staff were responsive to the difficulties experienced by us during our stay there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I would have liked to have been offered a glass of sparkly at arrival   Loved the double tree Would definitely stay again I loved the complimentary cookie at check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: To be honest it is pretending to be posh when its just a glorified premier inn Very expensive in the bar Go to Wetherspoons for a drink and save   Location is good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Smoking area outside front entrance Not great walking through on way out   The executive lounge was a plus relaxed atmosphere not stuffy Views were great from our floor 10 and from sky lounge Our hotel of choice for when we are staying in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Slow check in check out You don t get Hilton points if you book via Booking com  Great hotel in an excellent location Sky Bar worth a visit as is the ground floor bars

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Took ages to get checked in TV in room had no sound and despite a call to the care line in the 15 hrs I was there no one came to sort it Light bulbs but working in the standard lamp For 169 a night I d expect these basics to be checked and if not at least followed up quickly   Very quiet despite being a busy hotel and central location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Tv was on mute and as it was an Apple could not find out how to turn sound back on   Bed great as were the pillows Great to be able to turn air con off and open a window at night for fresh air

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing really   It was great staying Staff room condition everything was good Hotel was located just 3 min away from subway station and also close to tower bridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The TV in the room is terrible nothing to watch and app does not work on Mac Also Room Service got every order wrong and had to return up to 3 times sometimes to get it right Due to construction all over the area we could not find the hotel as all the roads leading to it were closed And scrambled eggs at breakfast are horrible   Free Executive Lounge with certain room types with free tapas wine coffee and drinks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Every staff member from check into check out was excellent except one miserable and rude waitress in the sky bar   Brilliant location we turned up early and staff were very accomodating and helpful The sky bar is incredible for views but a little pricey even for london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The a c would not shut down in our room it was complicated and time consuming to get moved The hotel I think would have already known about the problem but I suspect hope that many people just put up with it Breakfast was only OK not the usual standard from Hilton I would say

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Would have preferred a bath but shower was great   Incredibly helpful staff at all levels first class breakfast service with a smile decent size rooms for London and stunning rooftop lounge bar Amazing hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: warm cookies on arrival was a really pleasant treat The room was clean the bed very comfy the roof top bar was spectacular breakfast was really nice although very busy the staff managed to keep control and seat everyone reasonably quickly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: TV picture quality Could not believe that having such great big TVs in centre of London that there was no HD channels so picture quality really poor Had been watching US Masters in evening and wasn t good to view   The room had a fantastic view bed really comfy and overall layout of room very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our TV turned itself off and we struggled to get it on it was too hi tech for its own good  Really enjoyed this hotel and will stay again for sure great access to everywhere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Honestly for the price we paid on a weekday this was a great location and exceptional value We did suggest that they could consider putting mats down in the showers as my partner and I both nearly slipped and we are still relatively young and agile That such a small thing stood out really just highlights the fact that everything else about the design of the room and the experience overall was really impressive   The hotel is well equipped The computer air con and fridge in the most basic room on site restaurant and rooftop bar were particular pluses This really added value The location is great and for the price we just thought why travel further to central London when we don t need to We had concerns about noise but there was no such issue whatsoever What really stood out for us was the incredible service from the staff The service from Hilton was just exceptional throughout From a request for my partner s birthday before arrival to the warm greeting at check in to the cleaners greeting us in the corridors and even a chance exchange with a chef in the elevator Every single person we encountered in the employ of the hotel was so motivated attentive and warm I think this really reflects on the individuals and also the training and priorities of the company We were so impressed and will definitely consider Doubletree and Hilton for future stays

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The sky lounge was very exspensive I guess you can t really argue with it though because it s London but 19 98 for 2 drinks is steep Unless your filthy rich   The location was great Very close to a tube station which was a bonus The breakfast was incredible and 100 worth the money Beds were very comfy and the rooms were clean staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower head not fitted properly so water sprayed everywhere Not the Hotel s fault but had trouble finding the car park entrance because of all the roadworks going on around the hotel   Apple iMac in room which doubled up as TV Free wifi Sky Lounge with views over city fabulous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Front desk services not as good as they could be our room was not ready and we were told we would receive a text message or phone call when it was ready this never happened Also on check out the printer would not work so they offered to e mail the receipt to us this has still not been received safety catch on bedroom door broken bedside clock not working correctly alarm kept going off in the middle of the night and key card was hit and miss as to whether it would work the lift all little things but they add up   Breakfast was good on the first day but cold on second

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I did not like the first room I was given it had a nasty stain on the carpet it was closely overlooked by windows from the building opposite and the air conditioning was very noisy   Most of all the attitude of the staff They were without exception friendly and helpful In particular I would like to mention Bea and Yuri as very exceptional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Unfortunately there wasn t a bath would have loved to have been able to soak my feet after a day of trekking around London But the shower was delightful all the same Noisy air con system didn t need it on during my stay but can t imagine being able to sleep with it on during the summer   Location was excellent 2 minutes walk from Tower Hill tube station and just across the road from Tower Bridge and the Tower of London Very clean room Great ambience in the hotel and fabulous Skylounge bar Also in a nice quiet area so easy to sleep at night without any disturbance from traffic outside etc Friendly and welcoming staff who were always polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No tooth paste brush in the room even though we stayed at executive room   Good breakfast nice service and friendly staffs A little far away from soho and shopping area but close to many other sightseeing attractions such as tower bridge tower of london and shorditch area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: noisy air con in the room which you couldnt turn off Volume of people at breakfast made it more of a process than an enjoyable experience too many people in one room   lovely rooftop bar Good service Great location Good breakfast choice and well replenished

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Concierge showed us where we were on the map when we asked for one But give no advice on anything nor did he point out anything of interest nearby We figured it out through the trial and error and got great tips from local tour guides on bus and boat trips that would have been nice to get at the desk on check in And it was quite quiet at the time Otherwise the staff were very helpful   It s a great hotel Quiet rooms Dark at night Great views Easy access to everywhere in London The Natural Kitchen is amazing Great Brunch and Dinner options The cherry blossom trees outside the glass walls are a lovely touch I proposed after our meal there on Saturday night It was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t have much of a view we was facing inside didn t have a huge coffee and tea supply in room had to go ask for more  The breakfast muffins are really nice and the cookie when you check in are really nice the iMacs in the room are a good touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Personally I was expecting a king sized bed and it was a double It was also a tiny bit too firm for me although my husband was very comfortable The bedding was up to the usual high standard and as everything else was actually better than perfect and I can be difficult to please I would not let this stop me from staying again   Check in was great we got an upgrade so we had a free cooked breakfast a wonderful room with a fab view of both Tower Bridge and the Tower of London and the most enormous TV Lots of large fluffy towels already in the room etc The free breakfast was very good the service couldn t have been bettered we were made to feel like VIP s The staff had the most fabulous can do attitude

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Air conditioning heating very noisy so choice of lack of sleep due to room temperature or lack of sleep due to noise   Clean comfy room with good facilities Exceptionally helpful and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Even switched off the fan air con was quite loud through the night In fairness I didn t ask if anything could be done as I didn t notice until I was already trying to sleep so there could have been an easy fix   Great location warm cookie on check in was a nice touch Good selection at breakfast Comfortable room with good facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We were told our room wouldn t be ready until 3 30 pm We were offered a superior room which was ready at an extra 60 which we agreed to We didn t think the room was very superior and we were given a 30 reduction on the 60   staff very helpful hotel and room very clean breakfast good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our room was quiet small for a queen size compared to other queen size rooms we ve stayed in The shower head was broken which made showering a challenge   Great location and views from the Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bar prices were way over the top and booked a queen room which had a view of a run down building from our room which was not pretty   The location ideal for trains and buses and the staff were very good at making you welcome and helping with your needs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We paid to be upgraded to an executive room which was clearly not an executive room It was extremely small and only had 1 of each toiletry Air con was extremely noisy and woke us up   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were amazing it was me and my gas first trip together and couldn t have chosen a better hotel We would definitely recommend this hotel to everyone

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No complaints   Staff were exceptional very polite and helpful Natural Kitchen restaurant which is part of the hotel was terrific Good value excellent service and fine food Roof top Bar expensive but very relaxed and a nice place to finish the evening

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was great however for a vegetarian fairly poor as there was no cooked option as they only had one type of egg scrambled which wasn t too appetising   The location was excellent within a minute from Tower Hill station The sky lounge was also amazing hosting great views with a range of cocktails maybe a little pricey but worth it for a treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The pillows were rubbish they disappear as soon as you touch them Both myself and my husband woke with a stiff neck We told reception who sent up addional pillows which was an improvement Breakfast was hectic and not that great   The room and bathroom facilities were excellent Very clean The location was perfect for sight seeing and was a 2 minute walk from the tube station Even though it s in the heart of London you couldn t hear any outside noise once in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was possibly the most comfortable bed we have ever slept in in the quietest room An undisturbed sleep is just what you need after touring London all day Sound proofing was perfect as were the views from the rooftop bar as we drank Mojito s Staff were very friendly and keen to please

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location is fab Staff all helpful and friendly Rooms are large and airy We ve stayed many times and will continue to do so The views are also spectacular

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Can t be helped but there are no views from rooms there was a strong drain smell in the bathroom when we arrived gradually diminished  Very comfortable bed stunning view from sky bar polite staff fantastic location for central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Friendly reception and a lady at the Concierge was extremely helpful in the evening of my check up day She was on high heel but took the effort to bring my 2 luggages down by stairs from 1st floor However there was 1 male staff who was on morning shift at the Concierge on my check out day He did not smile and asked me to bring the luggages up to 1st floor Well it is probably the norm he could have been more helpful The differences in services created different impressions and experiences Thanks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower can get very hot   Beautiful newly refurbished property Sky lounge views and bar excellent Natural Kitchen for meals next door and warm cookies to die for at check in or in our case each time we came in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our room was located on 4th floor but the smell from our bathroom was appalling to say the least seriously bad hotel sent cleaner up to spray and put bleach or something in toilet n cleaned shower which masked over smell for about 30mins I actually felt so sick from it They said they d move us to another room but unfortunately they were fully booked   Location was perfect and views from sky lounge bar were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a delay in checking in Breakfast was expensive The Skybar didn t serve draught beer   Staff were friendly and helpful the room was comfortable and the hotel is in a good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room not available at check in went back on 2 occasions still not ready Requested a bed in our room for a child in advance I was told this had not been requested I then had to show my booking as proof Bed finally put in the room staff not very helpful did not advise breakfast times where breakfast was held Not a good experience with Hilton have used numerous times in the past always had very good service However not on this occasion which was a real shame as it put a dampener on our weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Pillows too soft Faff with key cards in lift   Quality and extensive choice at breakfast Friendly helpful staff Excellent location Value for money Quiet Stylish rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 1 Long queues at breakfast 2 Big emphasis on organic tea coffee Normal tea please Usual not enough milk At least three sachets reqd for the average cuppa 3 Spent fifteen mins in lift Pressed ground went up then down with others then back up again Getting to ground floor a real problem 4 Ice bucket useless for a bottle of champagne Too small 5 Two safes 6 Apple products computer Just not user friendly 7 Sewing kit and related boxes of nonsense 8 Squirty body lotion went everywhere Bar of soap 9 Hair products shampoo conditioner great if you re thinning upstairs Not enough 10 Square sink renowned for collecting grime Looked grubby after day one I do enough cleaning at home 11 Way to many folding pamphlets of information Counted at least twenty All that was missing was one telling you how to use toilet paper Joke   What a comfortable well situated well staffed hotel with good sized rooms and excellent cleaning staff Fabulous place to stay but let down by a lift reminiscent of waiting for a bus that won t let you off annoying paraphernalia and organic this and that nonsense which seemed at odds with each other Let s have organic tea while we wonder at the number of trees cut down to produce leaflets of jibber jabber

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bed was not the best but it was only for one night small shower room   Great in room facilities clean glasses water ice bucket fridge iron safe TV Apple but couldn t get the sound up to actually hear it Friendly staff warm welcome and great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Honestly have no negative thoughts   Everything about our trip was great from start to finish booked through booking com and got a fantastic deal Staff were all friendly and helpful Requests I had made were all met and the comfort facilities and breakfast standards were outstanding Thank you for the wonderful stay and I ll be sure to recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in was chaotic rooms weren t available even though we explained out tight schedule and requested an earlier check in We were asked to come back at 3pm but at 3 15 our rooms still not available we were once more asked if we could come back later they would phone us when rooms ready After our protests a manager managed to locate another available room this was good but unfortunately it was 3 floors away from the other Bar staff were quite unhelpful rude almost when we asked what beers were available One doesn t expect to have the fridge doors flung open and contents pointed at as a response to a simple question   Break fast was good the staff were attentive and helpful Friendly efficient staff when we left our luggage for safe keeping on Sunday after check out Hotel has a very good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing everything was great   Everything about the hotel was spectacular all the staff were really helpful and they offered a lot of great customer service for a four star hotel The bedroom views were excellent and all the facilities were up to standard

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: it was quite expensive in the sky lounge bar but again it is something you would expect from a 4 star hotel and stunning views of London the location seemed brilliant via the tube i did look for food places around tower hill however there wasn t any and we had to walk down to st katherines dock so we had a various choice but limited choice of eating places but other than that a perfect stay   the staff were extra helpful in our stay Daphne was also exceptionally helpful and would definitely give credits to her helping us with our luxurious stay and helped us with our queries they also arranged for rose petals to be sprinkled on the bed upon request and was absolutely perfect The room was exceptionally quiet and was sound proof to most of the outside it was peaceful and we wasn t disturbed we was completely blown back by the views from the outside balcony bar leading onto the sky lounge bar the views were absolutely beautiful the room was exceptionally clean was such a good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Skylounge prices were astronomical just when we thought we d avoided London prices we got stung in our own hotel   Very attentive staff no problem too big or small

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was a little on the small side but to be fair this is evident from photographs so was not a surprise  Staff friendly Location good Housekeeping services were very impressive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: was more expensive than i thought for 3 rooms after the 25 service charge considering i booked nearly 1 year before but brilliant location would go again try and get a better deal next time excellent staff   bed was great and comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price was at the top of the range for the area and it was not obvious that the hotel was better than the competition   The hotel met the four star rating and the location was excellent for my needs The staff generally made an effort to be friendly and useful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bed was a bit hard and the lifts were a bit of trouble   Clean and up to date rooms Hotel catered well to our special requests for our wedding anniversary

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No fridge or tea coffee making facilities in room Tv screen was small was fixed to the desk which was too far from the bed making watching tv difficult Room service too expensive  The bed was comfy room was nicely laid out Cool decor Liked the Apple TV computer set up Ice machine in hall was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast tasted like it had been made ages ago Was a bit dry although when I requested for the eggs to be cooked properly they followed through with my request so made it a bit better   Everything The bed was so comfortable the Apple Mac system was extra helpful Was able to log in to YouTube and do my workout in the mornings Loved the power of the shower Everything was ace

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Tiny complaint The lifts are temperamental   The rooms especially the bathroom were very clean very comfy beds and pillows and an excellent breakfast The rooftop bar was great too super London skyline views and a good atmosphere We were there on a Saturday evening

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Be prepared to queue to book in it s such a big hotel and not enough staff to deal with the amount of people booking in If your booking as a package with breakfast don t bother The queue was far too long The breakfast area is very small and isn t big enough for the amount of people staying at the hotel   The hotel is very close to the tube station The rooms are spacious clean and the bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My wife cutting herself on a chipped mirror and a chipped glass Breakfast cutlery and coffee being cleared whilst we waited for breakfast buffet All clearly just one of those things and swiftly dealt with  Staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff seemed to look down on you as if you weren t good enough to stay there the bed sheets had marks on them when we came in looked like blood and the shower was leaking wished I went down the road to a premier inn would have had a better welcome and better room for half the price Also the pictures didn t match up to the room no nice views just others rooms The key cards also stopped working which meant we could get into our room and there was an additional fee of 25 which wasn t mentioned when booking still waiting to get it back   location was close to the tube and comfy bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The long corridors are awful tasteless and bland The queue for breakfast was dreadful Had we of waited we would of been stood there waiting at least 40 minutes with no apology I ordered some tea around 1am when I got in and asked for some biscuits but got told I can have tea but no biscuits No big deal but it s little things like that which would put me off returning   Good location nice sky terrace bar though the outside closed at 12 even though the bar was still busy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I had too return 2 cocktails whilst in Sky Bar as the Alcohol was minimal to say the least which was remarkable considering I watched the bar tender make them in front of me he grunted when picked up on it at 12 plus VAT I expect booze in them When checking out the receptionist laughed in disbelief   Rooms compact but had all what you would need

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had to queue for about 20 minutes for breakfast the next day definitely don t expect that in a 4 star hotel The breakfast room was a little chaotic too and the service wasn t overly great Not the best Hilton I ve ever stayed at seemed disorganised at times Better places to stay in London for a similar price   location was awesome breakfast was tasty with lots of choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Apple TV was odd to use   Breakfast was excellent in terms of quality variety and quantity Midday check out was good Sky sports in room at no extra cost

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: when I booked I had advised that this was my husbands 50th birthday but the room in which was chosen for him was alful we were over looked by the workman we asked to move and that was not much better but we could not be bothered to ask again as we were only staying 1 night all in all I am not sure I would stay again  Hotel was was clean and tidy but had stayed at the apex hotel 2weeks prior for less cost and was far more superior to the double tree

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price is steep but you get what you pay for The sky lounge was not the place to go for a peaceful drink in the evening   Fantastic location close to the tube Brilliant breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It was an area I ve never visited before there was nothing I didn t like  Location is most suitable for sight seeing having London Bridge and Tower of London plus boat trips Easy access to tube stations for other locations

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: My husband booked a trip to London for my 30th birthday We had a great time only downside was the location of the hotel there was not a lot of eating places around unless of course you want a pret a manger

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I have to say we were very disappointed with the breakfast served Yes there was a varied choice available more so than other hotels I thought but the bacon was dry and tough the scrambled eggs were very runny and the pancakes were quite rubbery I asked for a pot of tea and I was brought a selection of tea bags and a pot of not boiling water to make my own The breakfast was the only let down of our entire stay   The pillows were AMAZING I so need to get myself some for home So comfortable The one thing about my trip into London was looking forward to sleeping in the hotel bed The staff were exceptionally accommodating too and nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   The room was spic and span as always The breakfast was great a huge variety to choose from with staff always on hand to assist with your questions and queries

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Rooms small a chair and coffee table added to lack of room to move about in the room The lift operation confused so many people Very expensive stay during the week OK if the company is paying   Location to all you need was excellent Reception staff were very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was very expensive the staff could have been more friendly As a young couple we are often wrongly misjudged  Room was clean and functional had everything you needed and the complimentary water and cookies were lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Cant complain about any think  The check in lady was fanstactic and lovely help with parking wished we had room on other side of hotel just for the veiw but over all really happy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room is small if you are from the states We did have one bad staff experience  Clean hotel On site food is excellent especially Natural Kitchen Over all very helpful staff Customer service team was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Maintenance service is very poor 3 nights two changes of room for the same reason air conditioning incredibly noisy What I think is very serious it is that there was no maintenance service from 6 pm on a Saturday in a hotel of 600 rooms   The staff specially Ana Mar a reception Very attentive and friendly always offering his help to me and my family

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Fabulous hotel Excellent professional but friendly service Wonderful roof top terrace Best breakfast I ve had in a hotel for a long time I loved the relaxed atmosphere at this hotel Will definitely return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: room size hotel information in the room next to nothing no writig paper orpen airbuble noice from the ventiltion minibar empty tv programs very limited no information about restaurant services available menu etc   bed exelent brekfast exelent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The lifts were a real headache there s 4 of them but only one seems to work at a time trying to fit every call from each floor in at once left us stopping at the wrong floors nearly every time we got in them regardless of us inserting our key card and selecting our floor correctly  Room was good and bed was comfy breakfast was great be early to avoid the queue Staff were all very helpful with directions and info Taxis available from right outside as is Tower Hill tube so getting about locally or into the city on foot by train or taxi is a breeze Mainline railways are a 12 15 taxi ride away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: it would have been a nice touch if the staff had put something in our room for my wife on arrival since it was our anniversary i did mention this at the time of booking but there was no acknowledgement   we love the location and the skybar this was our 3rd stay as a couple and we chose this again because it was our 20th wedding anniversary

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location and views particularly from the Sky Lounge The room was a good size and had everything you need for a short stay Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Being told breakfast wasn t in my room rate so didn t have breakfast which I paid for dirty sink in bathroom air conditioning was nosiey last guest food order left in room  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Noise from AC unit when off it had some motor still running so just left it on Trek from Lift to room just saying I m not expecting a new elevator to be built Breakfast was not included and I would not pay the OTT price for a fry or pastries Head out to Pret or all bar one even Wetherspoons if you re really scraping the barrel   Location stones throw from Tower Hill and on Circle District Line Great access to Tower Bridge and the Tower of London Great choice of food outside with St Katerines Dock close by Sky Bar was nice way to round off the night with a beer and cocktail or two Check out Bodeans near by too US style bbq pit attention at check in manager saw us standing slightly confused in front of a mile wide desk and lots of staff looking very busy Redirected us within seconds of arriving Noise from staff access rooms service rooms was a little off putting we were room opposite so bound to be activity Weekends make the surrounds very quiet which I enjoyed If you want hustle and bustle then a train or two will have you in Oxford street in 20 mins Defo will be back at a good rate with breakie included and a room closer to the lifts above floor 6 for a good view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was very good the service was a little poor Did ask for a city veiw but didn t get one but it didn t spoil are stay   The hotel was brilliant really enjoy it all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The service at breakfast could have been a little better I sat with empty cereal bowl and glass for most of breakfast while eating my cooked breakfast   The reception staff were very welcoming and helpful The atmosphere of the hotel was very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks a little expensive in the sky lounge but it is London   Amazing hotel will definitely stay again very clean polite staff easy to find very quiet area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Great location loved the Cookie on arrival very quirky staff extremely polite helpful Room well equipped with Apple Macs Sky lounge is an added bonus and has lovely cocktails Plenty of variety for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We were initially cold in the room Took a long time to get warm Television maximum volume was set too low for older people without the sharpest of hearing plus we couldn t hear the TV at all with the central heating on fan   Loved location public rooms the welcome and the breakfast was perfect Will definitely stay there again We always like to stay in a Hilton by Doubletree where possible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The light in our room did not work upon arrival The view was quite poor when we booked we did request a city view but instead had the construction of the Four Seasons hotel opposite not ideal to have builders looking into our room from across the street so had to have the curtains closed for the most part They also offer some yummy complimentary cookies however my boyfriend is Vegan and the cookies contain milk eggs so he was unable to enjoy his one   David was lovely He checked us into the hotel and gave us a nice introduction of what to expect during our stay It was in a very good location to where we had dinner booked that night close to Tower Hill tube station The sky bar was good however perhaps not as high up as some might expect The room was very clean The bed was exceptionally comfortable Lots of amenities in the room Overall a lovely hotel and a comfortable stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bathroom was a bit cramped  Breakfast was ok got a table fairly quickly buffet food is never as good as proper food but as I say ok Location was good right in the City easy access to the places I needed to get to to work Nice people on reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Hotel was great its best feature is the skylounge with great cocktails and views of London especially the Tower of London The bed by the way was the best we have ever slept in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Found the design of the executive room slightly odd tv was designed to be low in sound no good if you have hearing difficulties And the position of the bed closest to the wall wss difficult to get round the bed and also too small a space if a guest was on the large side

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff gave the impression that they were only interested in getting as many people in and out as quickly as possible rather than taking the time to ensure individual guests needs were met despite the Hilton literature dotted around the hotel promoting the opposite Other than that a pleasant stay   The room was clean tidy and organised Presentation cleanliness and ambiance of the lobby and groundfloor facilities was very nice We weren t due to check in until 15 00 but our room was ready by 13 30

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lifts were slow and air conditioning was a bit noisy  Room very clean we didn t have any food but ended up in the kitchen by mistake and it was very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No TV or background music in the executive lounge leaving for a very somber unenjoyable atmosphere Door handle on the room was Broken and unsecure No meat options in the cooked breakfast selection at the Executive lounge only cooked option was Scrambled egg Not what I expect when paying extra for executive benefits   Second stay at this hotel fantastic location facility s and staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact the speakers on the iMac were so quiet so was difficult to watch TV and we asked for an omelette and it took to long to come   I loved the way the rooms were laid out and as soon as you enter the lobby you are welcomed It was very cozy and a warm environment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bedroom was a little small No view at all I did request high floor with a view But did not get either  Very good choice at breakfast Nice and bright reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was a leak in the shower and actually I found the room bland and boring the air con was a saviour but the noise drives me insane and the Mac as a telly is a bit meh   the location was incredible and the staff amazing Breakfast was pretty good too PANCAKES

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Price felt a bit steep but it was Valentine s weekend Sky bar also expensive I felt  Checked in at 10am even though it said 3pm on booking held luggage when we checked out friendly and helped us out with tourist advice and travel Free cookies are big bonus and amazing Sky bar has the best views ever

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Concierge need informing on the parking regulations outside of their hotel I was told I would be ok to park my car outside of the hotel until 8am but unfortunately I came to my car before 8am and was issued with a parking ticket Breakfast in the city cafe was very expensive and two light switches in the bedroom were faulty   Excellent location and cleanliness

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: That I had to leave lol there was nothing I didn t like  I have to be honest I loved everything about this hotel from the minute we arrived until we left All the staff were very attentive to any request we had The room was lovely the hotel was very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff We were told during check in that the car park was full The website specifically states parking wouldn t be an issue Yet this was the case and we were asked to park up in the coach carpark a few roads away damper on the day Although late check out was requested and approved for 2pm a staff member decides to knock on the door at 12 30 to ask when we are checking out as there was no record of a late check out on the system Very rude and disappointing We didn t pay near enough 200 for the one night for nothing Poor service We stayed at the MK doubletree the night before where service location was perfect we even received cookies on arrival and price was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A few more milks for tea and coffee in the room   Great rooms comfy beds lovely shower and super breakfast Warm cookies on check in are fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Had to change room as there was no view and we had offices overlooking us got changed to another room that wasn t as bad but still had little or no view room was a lot smaller than the review pictures had led me to believe could not eat at hotel as it was way overpriced for breakfast 21 50pp was outrageous and because of this we didn t even consider dinner same as the sky bar just too pricey for the ordinary person plus selection of drink was very limited to poor which meant we only had one drink before leaving even tho we wanted to stay for longer  The hotels location was very close to tube and The Tower of London the staff were very friendly and helpful the hotel was spotless and clean great view from the sky bar lovely smell upon entry at the lobby the facilities in the room were very good fridge iron hair dryer kettle the iMac was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Left my bag in luggage area Lucky I checked it before I left as a bag that was placed inside it wasn t there Staff said it must have rolled out in the luggage area I was rather worried and I did think they could have been a litte more apologetic   Nice staff on checkin Great roof top bar A very quiet room Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The trainee staff knows very little about the Hilton HHonors program I am a gold member and was not offered any upgrade until I had asked I had also prepaid the hotel booking charges but was charged again when I checked upon checked in and refund later I had to suffer from FX losses from this Very disappointed experience I am sure the trainees are doing their best perhaps a supervisor had to be there to assist Thumb down   Generally good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The round table was taking too much space Not necessary Also Internet had to be reconnected after every 24 hours If it is free complimentary then keep it running   Nice neat room Lovely and cozy lobby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: As a Diamond member they used to provide a free bottle of wine and a small snack which was a nice touch Now they don t In the Exec lounge they don t provide lager as a choice of drink how strange is that it is also very annoying and so I never use the lounge as I cant get the drink I would like

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room floor carpet could have gotten a way better clean up especially around the bed All other areas of the room and bathroom were very clean and nice   Wonderfull staff felt super welcome also allowed to check in around noon even though listed as 3pm Location is excellent 2min walking from tube line 2 stops away from Liverpool station connecting to all airports Rooftop terrace bar gives you amazing views to downtown Room was comfortably facilitated everything you need 10 karma points for amazing toiletries

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Confusion with room cards in lifts Apple TV limited and screen small   Room clean comfortable quiet as facing into inner court area Location good Attentive friendly staff Excellent place to stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room could have been a little bigger but still I would strongly recommend this hotel  Super friendly staff Good breakfast Good location Good view from top floor bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was a bit small and when I tried to extend my stay the price went up ridiculously high so I had to relocate Also I don t like the in room Mac computers which double as TVs The remote control is extremely limited and you have to use the keyboard to for example adjust the volume Everybody has their own computer nowadays so why not just have simple TVs Being offered a free cookie at check in is a bit naff too   The location was good and the hotel was very smart and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not much i didnt like only thing i could say is it would have been nice if there was more choice of sandwiches ect on the room service menu after 2am as we got bck late and what was on the menu eg chilli and curry was a little to heavy for that time of night apart from that had a lovely stay of 3 nights  The rooms were lovely and spacious the staff were helpfull and friendly and the cocktails on the pricey side but lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The comfort control was really noise and buzzed when turned off Incredibly annoying  Great location and roof top bar with amazing views Clean modern Great breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: check in took 20 minutes printer would not print for staff there was no paper in the card machine my pass card for the room door was not activated resulting in having to come back to the check in desk to get it activated to be able to use the lift

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Stayed for a Saturday night and the hotel s Sky Lounge was very busy Felt out of place wearing casual clothes  Great central location only a minute from Tower Hill underground station Comfortable clean and well appointed room Wonderful breakfast options

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: we booked for parking to be told on arrival there was no parking had to walk ten mins with are bags in a monsoon we got soaked not happy at all on new years eve   the sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some how convinced us to upgrade even though kept saying we didn t want to which after we realised there was no benefit of upgrading and cost us more money for no reason   Lovely reception really nice hotel Felt bit disappointing after seeing how nice the lobby and reception was to then seeing our room Nice and friendly staff Would visit again Right next to Tower Hill station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wait for checkin queue Room looked on internal courtyard Breakfast was quite expensive No minibar contents Only 4 lifts so a long wait for the lift most times   Late check out Comfortable bed Roof terrace bar Good breakfast Helpful receptionist Great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Was kept waiting a while to check in even though there were several members of staff on the desk   Amazing location lovely facilities lots of bars and restaurants in the area Right next to tower bridge tube Tower of London and Tower Bridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There are not many food options past 10pm in this location Using Apple iMacs for tvs seems like a waste of money its hard to use the tv   Loved the view from the lounge located at the top of the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing as loved it But could explain how lift works a bit better   The room was great Our bed was so comfortable we slept very well Service was good all around the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Requested a pot of tea for breakfast had to request twice as it was forgotton  Friendly staff comfortable and clean room good choice for breakfast and what a view from the skylounge bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Paid for lounge access thinking it was for the sky bar but it was for the lounge in reception which we never used   Sky bar is awesome Hotel ideally placed at Tower Hill very close to tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were excellent Accommodation was perfect Price was very affordable for the quality and location of the hotel I definitely recommend a stay here

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing particularly wrong with the hotel Can t fault it on any fronts   Very solid choice This doubletree is getting a lot of things right Good location well appointed rooms clean courteous and professional staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: If you like to go for a walk to Tower Bridge and along the river around there this place is probably right for you Facility is fairly new looks clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A little pricey in the sky lounge but the views are fantastic  Friendly staff room was warm clean and contained everything you need for a short stay including iron and ironing board sky lounge has great views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: This hotel was one of the best experiences I have had while traveling The amazing rooftop bar the great breakfast the windows made it feel very spacious the room design was incredible I really loved it here The other two I went with did as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only two negatives Breakfast was not included we paid separately and wasn t worth the money The noise I got woken up several times through the night from shouting  Friendly staff and clean hotel The lay out of the hotel is nice and trendy and the sky longue bar is great with brilliant view of the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very welcoming and friendly staff Comfortable room ideal for our 2 night stay Excellent choice of breakfast Could not fault anything had a lovely weekend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Main restaurant wasn t open on Friday night despite literature in hotel saying it would be so we ate at the hotel bar where food was nice but prices not so reasonable 51 without their added tips which you really have to look carefully to avoid gratuity being added 2 burgers and a drink each 51   Breakfast choice was excellent and use of sky lounge superb plus I asked hotel to set up my room with balloon champagne and fruit plate as it was anniversary weekend and they got it spot on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We ordered room service very late at night and it still had not arrived after 45mins so we cancelled the order unfortunately we then had to have it removed from the bill on check out as it had been added to the bill along with phone calls we did not make The staff were lovely apologetic and removed the charges   The hotel was well furnished comfortable and modern Staff were polite and friendly Sky lounge is fantastic and the views were amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was charged for x2 breakfast which we never had and wasn t made aware of this until looking at my statement but when I phoned the issue was resolved straight away   The staff were amazing and really friendly the room was clean and the king bed was really comfy it was in a perfect location and not far from the tube at all we couldn t have asked for more

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bathroom a little small and the door wouldn t stay open so it became a little stifling Could have supplied more tea making supplies although the staff obliged when we asked for more Small things really   Location comfortable room friendly helpful staff Our deal included breakfast which was excellent value Liked the Sky Lounge at night great views Would stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lovely hotel Fantastic staff Made to feel welcome and nothing was too much trouble Relaxed Loved the view from the Sky Lounge Bar Fantastic stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Both restaurants closed on arrival suggest you eat elsewhere sir Why closed Well its Monday sir   Well equipped rooms good showers Good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The pre authorisation 25 that was charged to my credit card without me knowing  The reason we stay here is for the location and facilities as it ticks all the boxes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The wifi sometimes was not working all the time  I asked for a spacious room as I suffer from phobia and I was given a room that was to our satisfaction Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location for our trip was perfect minutes from Tower bridge and Tower of London Fantastic views over London from the rooftop bar Room and hotel in general very comfortable clean and relaxing just what you need after a manic day in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Really helpful and friendly staff our room was lovely spacious well equipment clean and cosy Our breakfast ticked all the boxes good variety hot delicious food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: N A  The location was great for our New Years stay to view the fireworks and also to get to the west end easily The whole hotel was very comfortable and we liked the roof top bar which we will visit again in the summer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Easy to drive to from A1 Very pleasant staff Checking in and out stress free Good choice of food at breakfast Underground car park in central London is a big plus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very clean Bar on 12th floor nice to relax and very nice view over London Very close to Tower Bridge and the river boats Lots of restaurants and coffee shops Very close to tube We will defiantly use this hotel again when we go back to London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Loved the place but the beds and pillows are so uncomfortable it is a shame Also a lot of noise from the air con system during the night which kept me up again very frustrating   Atmosphere is great luxury feel to it Location is also great and easy to get to from Liverpool Street

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: At the reception we were asked if we would like to upgrade to an executive room which pushed the peuce up to 300 for the night As it was NYE we decided to treat ourselves we were told with this that we would receive access to the executive lounge and a full breakfast Our new room was on the tenth floor had a view of roofline and nearly the river but not quite For an executive room it was small I dread to think what the size of the queen rooms are We had a moldy muffin left in he fridge of our room which was a lovely welcome The bathroom was nicely fitted out as expected but with a shower door you had to wrestle with to close and wouldn t actually fully close when you did manage to pull it shut We didn t even try to enter the executive lounge as it had been claimed by a group of fouled mouthed individuals who proceeded to swear at anyone who even walked passed them including an elderly couple Their badly behaved children although not as bad as their parents were allowed to run wild until past 1am Please note this hotel does not have a restaurant Upon coming down for our breakfast we found ourselves sat next to part of the same group who destroyed their table and treated the staff appallingly I am surprised a manager did not come to politely tell them to stop desturbing those around them All in all the stay was disappointed For one of the top London hotels I will not be spending that much on a room in the city again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price its London I didn t expect it to be cheap but what we got for the price we paid was very disappointing we got a queens room which was equal to a standard room at a budget hotel etap ibis   The hotel is in a nice location as we were visiting central London and was very clean and staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Upgraded room was really not worth the extra money the standard rooms are better   I love the location and the friendliness of the staff I also like the Skyloung

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Due to us staying for New Years we expected that on the 12th floor at the sky lounge we would be able to see the fireworks but unfortunately we didn t see them due to a building being in the way Also there was no countdown off the dj and it seemed as if he didn t realise it was 12oclock   Cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Restaurant closed without any warning on 30th December even though TV services said is should be open Lobby bar charged 17 for two salmon bagels and two lukewarm cups of coffee Coffee was replaced free of charge but was no warmer so we gave up An additional round of drinks from the Skylon bar appeared on the bill which was removed when I queried it once they had checked that the bill was unsigned   Nice hotel with great views of Shard and Tower Bridge from the Skylon Bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Excellent from start to finish Booked a King suite room 855 with lounge access brilliant views and lovely suite Staff were very attentive when needed and buffet breakfast was delicious and vast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Some of the staff struggled to understand English the roof top bar was very expensive We upgraded to allow access to the executive lounge which required a number of complaints in relation to Lack of refreshments in the evening   Good location close to Tower of London and Tower Bridge tube station The roof top bar would be lovely in the summer but far to cold in December

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our shampoos and conditioners were not replaced by housekeeping so we were left with insufficient toiletries the next morning   Natural Kitchen the restaurant attached to the hotel was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very friendly welcome Worth while upgrading to the executive club Beer wine and nibbles from 5 8 each evening and no queue for breakfast like the main restaurant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booking com website was unclear as to the different types of rooms I had to check on the Hilton website to get all the info   Comfy bed Don t worry about paying for the breakfast Upgrade to executive room you then get lounge access with free breakfast and free canap s and alcoholic drinks in the evening makes for better value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lift buttons confusing with keycard but a very minor thing compared to SOME hotels I ve stayed in   Everything was good Lovely staff clean quiet modern room comfy bed etc All you need Great views of London from the Sky Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Just one disappointment my colleague s double was bigger than my king room which was booked later and a lot more expensive I queried whether I had been allocated the a double rather than a king room when I checked out a reception but the receptionist didn t seem to understand what I was asking   The reception bars and meeting room were all good and the public areas are spacious The facilities in my bedroom were as expected comfy bed clean bathroom and shower etc The Skylounge Bar was a great venue for drinks after our dinner out I booked for 6 other people too and we all enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Operating the elevator is a little bit tricky   Free cookies Snowman Chocolate Complimentary things Staff Clean Everything They did not charge me for anything I broke

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Very poor mobile network   Helpful staffs nice location clean tidy room excellent breakfast with lots of varieties Kitchen staffs are much helpful and very good customer service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A fantastic location to get anywhere in central London The tube station was just around the corner or you could even walk for some sightseeing which me and my partner did on the second day Staff very welcoming as soon as in line to check in Able to drop off bags before check in which was great Once all checked in we were given some delicious complementary cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Executive lounge does not offer a good choice of alcoholic beverages and is too small cramped for the amount of people using it Queen exec room smaller than expected  Sky bar Restaraunt

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The heating ac fan was very noisy even with the TV at 100 it wasn t easy to hear The bed was uncomfortable and on wheels so every time we sat on it it moved Complimentary water in the room would ve been nice   Staff were nice and room was comfortable but for the roadworks the location would have been excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only let down was its the first hilton I ve stayed in that doesn t have a swimming pool  Hotel was lovely Great location Friendly staff Lovely food Worth every penny

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Location was excellent close to London tourist sights Tower of London the Gherkin the Shard with the London Eye only a few stops on the tube away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: the size of the room was a bit small for how much it cost the building was hard to find bed was a bit too firm   staff was friendly i loved the cookie that i got in check in the hotel was also remarkably clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: i paid for deluxe rather than standard however when we arrived the room and bed was very small we asked to pay to upgrade to a larger room and were told all the room sizes are the same thus was very dissapointing the room was described as very differnt on the internet to what it was we have stayed in many hotels and standard room sizes are bigger   the hotel was cosy and very clean breakfast options were good staff were always helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Asked fora high floor for the view We got 925 view of interior Also breakfast was way too expensive so we went around the corner  General standard of room and public areas was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had breakfast in a restaurant joined on to the hotel which I wouldn t recommend For some reason all the food they served was luke warm cold on both days and it wasn t just us Quite pricey for what it was   Good location two minutes walk to Tower Hill underground Rooftop bar with stunning views and great outdoor area Clean and comfortable room with Apple tv good air con fridge free wi fi and very well designed for a standard room Good value for what we paid

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: If you order eggs at breakfast don t expect quick delivery if at all 1st day very slow at bringing 2nd day did not get at all Apart from that breakfast has plenty of choice   Good location as a base for city visit good sized rooms Friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No issues  Location was perfect 1 min from Tower Hill station and so many local attractions Crutched Frier pub opposite was also friendly and good value

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location nice comfortable bed and the room was nice and quiet for sleeping after a late night out Was also good to have use of a Mac for television and Internet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough channels on tv The rooms on the back don t have good views should imagine other side are nice looking out onto tower bridge Very exspensive bar drinks  Great views from sky lounge Showers were nice Comfy beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We did not like the background music which was far too loud even in the evening but especially at breakfast time when it prevented any conversation I suggest the hotel does a guest survey to see how many people really want any music at all during breakfast time   Location and general impression of the hotel Good breakfast buffet

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location Easy access to transport and fast dining is also minutes away Staff were helpful and facilities were perfect for a short London stay Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check In Staff very slow not enough staff on desk Breakfast was very average had to queue at bread station and wait for toast then had to queue at breakfast station hence toast was cold by the time got back to table   The Rooftop Bar is stunning The Views are amazing Room was clean comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Beds to small and not comfortable and not much space in rooms Was a birthday weekend requested a early booking and late out and birthday cake and room with a view and got non Breakfast was cold on both mornings Room overlooking offices across way so kept curtains closed the whole stay  The location near tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Reception was very busy at check out so extra staff at this time would have been useful Other guests were also commenting on this aspect However vouchers for free coffee or Prosecco in the hotel made up for this I would stay again   Location in the City and the hotel s Lobby Cafe and linked restaurant Natural Kitchen as well as the cleanliness of the rooms and comfort of the beds Lovely interior in the hotel Room service very quick champagne served on ice and Hilton s fish and chips are highly recommended I would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Quite expensive 170 for one night and that didn t include breakfast  There is a Mac computer in every room the beds are very big and very comfortable the rooms are spotless you get a mini fridge in the room with ice buckets and glasses

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Even after paying the charge zone the traffic around the hotel especially on The Embankment was a nightmare so I turned around and went back out 12 for 40 mins for the pleasure of going the 200 yards in and out the zone to from the hotel Lounge bar on top floor had very basic uncomfortable furniture with very loud music and v expensive drinks Forget the ridiculously expensive breakfast and go to the near by Wetherspoons pub only 5 and free refils Also the headline booking rate did not include VAT   Good for the City Also underground car park on site but this expensive as well as hotel being just inside the charge zone Lobby spacious and light Rooms a reasonable size and modern

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Insanely expensive breakfast 21 each TV sound limited to near inaudible level poor choice of pillows both options far too soft for me for some reason complimentary water good kept on shelf not in fridge bad and no mini bar   Good location pleasant staff clean etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The hotel charged me for the whole price of the room for the weekend on arrival and on checkout and charged me a deposit for the room without telling me   The iMac was a nice addition to a room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Had to wait 20mins to check in never seen such slow service when especially when so one is taking payment from you A cookie for compensation hardly compensated for the disappointing start to a relaxing weekend   Clean and comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We booked two Queen rooms but one was a lot smaller than the other room not sure if this down to the design of the building the apple mac televisions were not very loud and we had to adjust the sound manually from the back  Location is fantastic for the Tower Hill tube station and sight seeing the Sky Lounge bar is fantastic and a must see for views although quite pricey the staff were fantastic and helpful and the hotel I cannot fault the beds were extremely comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: How the reception staff spoke to my husband was shocking Had to speak with the manager to get a good check in She was lovely and sorted everything out  Superb location near river Thames and local attractions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Friendly helpful staff from booking to checkout Delicious hot cookies on arrival set us up for an afternoons sight seeing We were able to book in early as room ready

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No parking on first night Parking is abot expensive to pay for 30 for a day id alot money to pay for parking One thing about room we didnt have a nice view as we askd for one before booking   The hotel was a nice place to stay Room was warm and welcoming Staff wer lovely and welcoming too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff very slow to remove used plates at Breakfast and bar staff also slow to remove used glasses from tables which made the bar areas look messy   Warm cookies on welcome was a nice touch Apple Internet TV an excellent feature Room very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: When eventually got checked in an hour after time dedicated receptionist was very rude and abrupt she wasn t abrupt 4 hours earlier when she took payment a total of 600 cash though I wasn t told about the gym facilities or the roof top bar   Location is excellent very is to find from tube station beds very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The barman in sky bar wasn t that friendly a little abrupt   Staff were very friendly and helpful Hotel itself was very nice clean and comfortable The iMac in the room was really useful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Super nice locatition The tube station is near by and nice neigborhoods are also walking distance We walked to the Flower Market on Colombia St St Paul Cathedral and of course the London Tower

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Broken heating Instead of getting a new room received an electric heater which smelled terribly Not the comfort I expected or did indeed pay for very long lines at check out and luggage storage   proximity to the tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: got a room upgrade plus access to Executive Lounge for 40 meant was on 10th floor with as good a view as can have for location of hotel plus free alcohol and snacks 5 30pm 8 30pm plus no queue for breakfast Really great hotel for a special occasion

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room 723 had a hidden drip in the shower I couldnt locate where the drip was so I can only assume it must be dripping behind the walls of the shower cubicle   Staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great location with easy access to underground and the embankment Great views from Sky Lounge Bar on 12th floor Didn t have breakfast at hotel so can t comment but there is a Wetherspoons round the corner if you don t want to pay 22pp for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The receptionist was rude unfriednly didnt tell me when or where breakfast would be served She asked me for my credit card for incidentals and when i asked if she would charge the room to my card she responded no the room was booked through work after returning home i was sent an invoice stating that the room had been charged to my card   The room was well layed out clean and easy to access

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Checking in and out was a problem I checked in the previous day but still had to repeat the process when I arrived why I did not have Express check out under my door but after queuing for some time I was informed that I need not check out   Staff at breakfast were very attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: nothing it was such a beautiful hotel   beautiful modern hotel My first time staying with a Hilton chain hotel and I absolutely loved it The hotel staff and services were impeccable I ve stayed in many hotels within london and this is definitely the best I would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The queue at breakfast lack of alcohol selection in the lobby bar no draught beer   That there was no fuss and was left to do own thing the quiet location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
