Full_Review: The staff was very pleasant but not that helpful I encountered 3 issues with my stay First my key failed to work 3 times I was told the second time that I could call the front desk from my floor and they would send someone up The 3rd time I took their advice and called I was told by the operator that guest services was too busy to come up at the time Second I borrowed an adapter to use for my stay and was charged 5 for it on my bill I was not informed at guest services that I would be charged for borrowing it Third I do not like to have my room made up during hotel stays so I placed the do not disturb sign on my door I was surprised to find that my room had been made up when I retired for the evening This is a huge invasion of privacy and inexcusable   Great location Beautiful view from the bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: As expected the roof top bar drinks were prices but a 5 discount was given if opting out of daily cleaning   A hot cookie on arrival endless facilities to our disposal and extremely friendly staff Perfect location near the tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like great hotel  Lovely clean friendly hotel with great service we were up graded at no extra cost given complementary drinks and cookies on arrival Breakfast was added with no extra cost And the staff could do enough to help would recommend to everyone Close to tube station London Bridge and Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The expensive glass of wine 15 red merlot This wine was not on the menu so didnt know the price The manager did top our glasses to help smooth the price   The Breakfast was very good lots of variety Very busy but the staff where on the ball cleaning tables

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing  Fabulous hotel Friendly staff Great Breakfast Location very close to Tube Sky Lounge has amazing views and delicious cocktails We would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing was bad but London prices do need some getting used to eg A G T in the Sky Line bar circa 10 Breakfast was indeed excellent but at 20 a person so it should be and perhaps there are more economic alternatives nearby   Service was first class location excellent only a few hundred yards from Tower Hill Underground Room was very good and cleaned well The Sky Line bar on the roof has spectacular views of London Bed was a little hard for us and within a short space of time they put on a mattress topper Nothing seemed too much trouble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Delux queen room was pretty average for amount of money I paid I ve stayed in pretty bigger rooms in cheaper hotels   Everything about hotel was great location Staff etc very busy which is good creates a good lively vibe

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Staff were excellent room was very nice and comfortable apple tv internet access was great Stayed as a birthday celebration and got the birthday plate for my wife which she loved Breakfast very tasty especially the streaky bacon Close to tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price of the room was a but steep but then again London is expensive and overpriced so it wasn t surprising Rooms are small but comfortable   Location is excellent and the breakfast was amazing Lots of choice and worth adding to the room rate Their sky bar is also top rate

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Should have more F B outlets open for dinner One is not enough no nearby restaurants esp around Tower hill area   Got a free upgrade with access to lounge Useful esp during Rugby World cup and tea time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: All staff were lovely and pleasant no noise or anything through the night even though we were in the centre of London very nice stay and will stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast the bacon was leathery and the beans cold The lights positioned wrong in the bathroom for tall men trying to shave No towel rail   Roof top bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The weather but we can t blame the hotel for that   In the area we wanted to stay close to ToL Quiet and comfortable at a good price including breakfast for London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was stood in the queue to check in and was asked by two foreign staff members if they could help to be told to stand where I already was Then they stood around doing nothing to assist the long queue formed waiting to check guests in Indicated was a wifi code that was on a card in the room For guests wanting to log into the wifi system This card was not available After the bad rapport found at reception I could not face the ordeal of asking for the code that should be where specified The breakfast was unreasonably priced After already paying for the room at 149 I was then charged a further 25 encase I owed anything at checkout I was asked if I wanted to pay a discounted price of 40 for two breakfasts This is certainly a joke   The location and the room was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only downside was paying so much for a Disappointing climax her fault not the hotel Not a joke   The staff were amazing the location was amazing the room was amazing the little things made all the difference the warm cookie upon checking in amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Poor quality of breakfast Breakfast room too crowded Receptionist woman young with long light brown hair unpleasant not kind at all   Location comfortable beds and pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The beds are not quite as comfortable as one would expect for a hotel under the Hilton name   Staff is friendly plenty of dining options nearby and near the underground Of course there are several London Landmarks in the area as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The room was red hot there was AC but it was too noisey and the pillows were too soft The cooked breakfast was cold   The whole experience was great hotel was beautiful sgtaff were fantastic the room facilites were amazing The choices for breakfast were fabulous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I used express checkout and was overcharged for the room and did not receive an e mail confirmation of the charge I have spent the better part of the last three days trying to get a refund and a copy of the invoice to claim a refund for travel expenses from my employer Customer service is far from satisfactory

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The staff were great Very helpful We were even upgraded to the Executive Floor so we were able to use the Executive Lounge Location was great Tube was just 2 minutes away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Is a very nice hotel would recommend it to anyone staff were so helpful couldn t do enough for you very clean this Is a ideal place to stay if you are travelling around london looking at landmark and easy to commute from

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Management of a large group of Rugby supporters was excellent Extremely busy breakfast in the cafe but at all times staff were friendly and obliging nothing was too much trouble fantastic service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wifi poor no decaf tea or coffee Not enought o spoil the 3 nights we had there   Lovely spacious room Atrium Suite Very comfortable bed and lovely tioletries Excellent location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Variety of choice for breakfast but only lukewarm bacon streaky thought hotel of this calibre could have offered better No restaurant for food on evening only bar snacks  Very friendly staff 2mins walk from tube Comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Loud at night shower screen was broken car park charge was ridiculous The price of the hotel was too high for what it was The carpet was filthy Looking out onto offices Disappointed with the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: In room dining selection was very limited would have like crossiants or pasties on the menu   Welcome on arrival Location was very handy to restaurants sights and the tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Shower door was faulty and shower head leaked from the hose   Quietness and room size and layout good internet facilities and the lounge was excellent for early evening wind down and catch up

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The price of 2 bottles of beer in the sky bar was 14 The staff up there were unfriendly made us feel unwelcome Already paid for breakfast but had to pay extra for the things off the menu if you didn t want the buffet breakfast This never happened before it became a Hilton   The location was excellent only 2 minute walk from the tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No bath only shower in bathroom Unpleasant reception woman on check in   Comfortable bed and good sized bedroom Plentiful supply of taxis outside entrance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Extremely over priced No more than a travel lodge with an expensive bar Rooms basic Won t be returning  It was clean and in a good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We arrived at the hotel at 10 30am and were delighted to be given a room when we hadn t expected to The staff were welcoming and efficient The hotel reception area itself is welcoming and as this was my first visit I was impressed with how luxurious it felt Great location for Borough Market the Tate Globe theatre etc and 2 minutes walk from a tube station It was quiet and the bed was very comfortable The bathroom was immaculately clean with a powerful and hot shower There was a fridge and wine glasses in the room although the Sky Lounge Bar was very inviting for a pre dinner drink Great experience and will definitely stay here on my next visit to London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The Breakfast Buffet It was priced at 15 pound with the voucher The eggs were some type of fake scramble and were stone cold Sausages and Baked beans cold also Hilton DT TH should go visit the Bristol City Centre Marriot to try a good buffet It was only 12 pounds that was an excellent buffet  I liked the location So easy to get to Tower Hill Station Also liked Counting House Pub within walking distance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: So disappointed with our stay We were told that we could check in the hotel from 3 00pm we got to the hotel at 3 45pm and our room still wasn t ready We had to wait until 4 30 until we could actually go to our room We then had to wait a further 30 mins for our bags to be bought up to our room We paid for a deluxe queen room and the bed was smaller than our double bed that we have at home So quite clearly we did not have a queen room and I definitely wouldn t describe the room as a DELUXE room We paid 245 to stay here We we re ripped off big time We were told from the hotels website that the more money you pay subject to availability you will stay in a room on a higher floor with a view of Tower Hill Our view was of an open roof tube station We could see people waiting for the train Really nice view Not worth 245 not even close The location was brilliant walking distance to the station and attractions but that doesn t make up for the disappointment from the hotel Absolutely gutted would not stay here again really disappointed   The sky lounge on the 12th floor had amazing views

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The close proximity to the tube Close to good restaurants Staff very friendly and helpful Service always with a smile Hot chocolate cookies on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We visited the sky lounge bar and were asked to take a seat and wait for service 25 mins later with NOservice in sight we left disgusted There were an abundance or staff who obviously had better things to do Let down the hotel and upset us   Everything else about the hotel was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: a Front dest granted me a very eesrly check in which allowed me freshen up before my early morning meeting b Staff went out of the way to allow us to watch Rugby World Cup semis on Sat 24 Oct at the Executive Lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in was 3 o clock arrived at the hotel at half 3 got told that my room wasn t ready yet and they will give me a call when ready I didn t get a call till half 5 No warning prior to arriving Very disappointing I paid for a deluxe queen room and paid 245 for this room and I thought I would be fairly impressed but it was completely the opposite I felt like I was walking in to a travel lodge room besides the Mac computer which is rather annoying when you are trying to watch television on it when it s on the desk on the other side of the room Very disappointed and not a happy customer   Could not fault the staff they were lovely polite and very apologetic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Check in was late at 1530hrs but we did get complementary drinks for this  Excellent position views from sky lounge were beautiful room clean and beds and pillows comfortable very quiet too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room service food was awful and took 50 mins to arrive Long queue to check in no assistance with getting suitcases to room View into other rooms Could hear banging from kids in next room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was disappointed in the room Although a twin room it was very small and you couldn t walk round the beds Also the view from the bed room window was a very close large ugly building However as we were only there for 1 night it was fine but if I had a longer booking I would have asked to change rooms Pre travel I was offered an upgrade to a queen room but didn t fancy sharing a bed with my friend The facilities in the room were excellent though   Everyone was so friendly you were made to feel very welcome obviously the sky lounge and the views Breakfast was also good I would definitely book again and have told my friends how wonderful this hotel is totally recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Incredible hotel for the price Right by Tower of London and convenient tube station Plenty of restaurants nearby Room was spacious well appointed and extremely clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I booked 2 different types of room a king and queen When i asked to be upgraded or downgraded so i could stay in the same room i could not find out which type of room it was the receptionist was not friendly when asked   Clean and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: So expensive for what you get for a small room and not really all that central of a location Nothing nearby for food after 10pm have to get on the tube to find late night food   Easy access from train and tube station close to Tower of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Really uncomfortable bed was really firm and gave me backache The duvet and duvet cover were not great either didn t feel great and made a surprising amount of sound with small movements Forgot to put the dnd sign on the door but got a double knock on the door at 9am I consider that far too early on a saturday morning   Good location and facilities Nice touch with the apple imac computers that doubles as a TV

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We were given cookies at check in which was very nice but unfrotunatly the cookie contained nuts Due to an allergy I was unable to eat it   Lovely hotel with a good choice for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like   Fabulous location and very central Loved the Sky Lounge what with it s view of Tower bridge and other iconic buildings It s perfect for pre dinner drinks Plus there is a Natural Kitchen restaurant right next door to the hotel which serves the best breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Warm welcome at check in Rooms extremely clean and in very good condition The roof top bar was a bonus with spectacular views of The Tower of London London Bridge The Shard and The Gherkin Amazing cocktails

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Great price and a good quality central London base excellent lobby decent room but nothing to write home about although a good cut above the premier inns and travelodges that are out there Really good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Had to check in before you could park the car   Lovely hotel great location and excellent facilities I would recommend this hotel for a great stay in London I really liked the skyline bar and the Apple TV

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: No bath in room Could do with one after long day walking round London  Fab Location Sky bar is brill Lovely beds and really nice room We will def return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Why they charge you an extra 50 pound when you check in didnt say anything about this when we booked it and we had a budget so really angry about this

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Could have had more choice to the cooked breakfast other than just Scrambled Eggs Bacon and Sausage Hash Browns and Beans wouldn t go a miss before a long day in London   Loved the location loved the hotel will come back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: At the weekend it was very busy in the reception area perhaps a few extra members of staff could have helped out on the desk   The new refurbishment of the hotel is very impressive warm and relaxing Everything contained in the room plus kettle ironing board iron plus beds very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room a touch too small but not really an issue at this price No coffee or tea making facilities  Excellent value for money double room at 120 Quiet room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks VERY expensive well over the odds   Loved the Sky Lounge The Views from the terraces Silhouetted Statues Beautiful Room Very Clean Also Close to Tower Bridge St Katerines Dock to explore

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The check in requested room early but the computers were down so we had to change in the toilets not what I wanted for my birthday only had the room for 8 hours  The sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing at all   A beautiful in a superb quiet location Though the twin room was smallish it was snug and comfortable The beds and bedding were heaven The bathroom was immaculate with the most beautiful toiletries I ve used in a hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We had a couple of minor issues no need to go into it here which I raised with reception My concerns were dealt with immediately and to our complete satisfaction ensuring that we ll be more than happy to stay at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I ordered smoked salmon and scrambled eggs from the a la carte breakfast menu The food was served on a piping hot plate so my smoked salmon was warm The eggs came from the buffet they were dry greasy and crumbly I d rate the dish 1 out of 10   Location is top Facilities are great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having to leave   Simple check in with friendly staff and a free hot chocolate chip cookie Nice start Loved having a Mac in the room Gorgeous sparkly bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Asked for two rooms together as staying with two daughters got same floor but rooms not close Soap dispenser in shower didn t work   excellent clean room Fantastic sky lounge with amazing views Very close to tube station Quick check in and out Natural kitchen next door do great breakfasts

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not enough storage area in the room for our 5 day stay we had to live out of our suitcases and were not able to unpack due to lack of cupboards drawers etc  Location select area felt safe good restaurants within walking distance concierge were very helpful gym was good value

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I was extremely disappointed with the value for money as I booked a queen room one above from standard and for the price I paid I was far from impressed Definitely wouldn t stay again   Staff were friendly great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t like that u paid an extra 50 to use the rooftop lounge and anyone in be hotel could use it And when we got there after 12 the outside was closed and we was never told And the room wasn t the greatest Didn t look how it was in the photos   The location and staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Fantastic Room and very comfortable Fantastic sky lounge bar and great breakfast Staff were helpful and couldn t do enough for you Great Location too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Only bad very minor thing was didn t like shampoo and conditioner containers Very awkward   Very comfortable lovely stylish building interior reception area with bar and glass latticed roof Sky lounge great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The size of the room was tiny the smell from the toilet was like a sewer At breakfast we had to wait over 40 mins for eggs to be cooked Very poor service from a hilton not what I expected at all   The best part of the hotel was the location and the sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: It was quite annoying that the Wi Fi didn t work and the signal on my phone was really poor I really enjoyed my stay overall but have looked to book again a few times recently and the prices have nearly doubled As a result I don t think I ll be visiting again anytime soon   I found the hotel really nice and the location is ideal The sky lounge although ridiculously overpriced is really impressive and the views are stunning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: when we checked out the service was bad from a particular staff member   The location was great close to Underground comfortable bed clean rooms and good food

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 1st room was for disabled and not clean after changing the room it was better but the 3rd day no water in the shower took them 2 hours to send somebody to check nobody offered any compensation unacceptable for that price wifi did not work properly bar on top floor booked for private events on the 1st day being painted on the 3rd day Concierge was useless  restaurant attached to the hotel friendly and efficient staff view from the top

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: A warm welcome would have been better than a warm cookie the worst reception staff I have ever encountered I asked for a room with a view confirmed on the booking No room with a view I booked a car parking space no car parking space Apparently I have to understand the hotel was fully booked and very busy not for long if you carry on like this   The roof bar is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our stay was not cheap Room was nice but very basic for a 4 star hotel Also it was provided with a small Apple TV that we could barely hear when at full volume and there was no movie available   Location is faboulous 50m away from Tower bridge Underground station hotel hall ground floor bar and room service facilities were very good We did not manage to have a drink at the roof top bar due to our very busy schedule for the trip but it looked good Staff was professional and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Awful room husband disabled carpet stained and muddy 1 hand towel had ring staff complain hardly any milk view awful had ring customer care as worried about husband catching germs then we re moved to a better room 2nd floor instead of 6th which was better annoy  Area nice comfy bed nice bath room and staffa

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: This Hotel is in a good position just minutes from Tower Hill Station but nice and quite in a couple of streets back staff were very efficient and helpful on our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Didn t have a bad experience but considering we paid over 400 and was ment to be staying in an queen suit we were slightly disappointed in the size and poshness of our room  The roof top bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We have been here twice before but this time we came our room wasn t clean and there was dirt on the bathroom floor Also scuffs on the wall The air con made an awful noise all night so we didn t have any sleep We won t be visiting again We have been twice before and our 3rd visit was very unsatisfying   I liked where this hotel was located

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I didnt like that there were no robes and slippers Lighting in the room was poor hard to get good light when applying makeup   I like the apple macs the body wash and hand soap was nice Very comfortable bed Loved the sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The waiting service at the Natural resturant The waiter was overly attentive and obviously trying max out our bill The table next door thought similarly though I shall not translate the less then polite Dutch dialogue aimed at the individual in question   Facilities and location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We didn t receive breakfast in the room or at all as it was too late by the time we realised it wasn t coming Staff made up for it by treating us to a wonderful lunch in the onsite restaurant Fantastic food   A fantastic rooftop bar area with beautiful views and beautiful cocktails Staff were very helpful and made our stay Very good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room card key didn t work when we got there had to go down 3 times from the fourth floor to get it changed still didn t work then a member of staff came to open door for use by this time we had been there 45 mins and we missed our reservation for the meal I had booked for my girlfriends 30th birthday

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Our room was not serviced complained to management he said it would be done straight away One hour later we had to complain again This was 6 at night   The location was good for what we needed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The steak we ordered turned up cold The shower nossle has an attachment where you cant take the shower off the wall Annoying My reception in the room on my mobile wasn t great when speaking to my mum on the phone When we called from the hotel room to complain about the food being cold the man on the other side couldn t even hear us so I had to keep repeating myself   Great location Loved the roof top bar The price of the overall hotel booking was good The MAC computer in the room Air Con

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not a bad experience but the breakfast at the lounch could have been richer in terms of more available selections  The overall package and the very spacious suite I have stayed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I could not get a Wi Fi signal on my tablet or phone I had to wait until I got outside of the Hotel Loud Air conditioning The Queens room was a bit on the small side No slippers and the view wasn t that great looking down to the reception area  The bed was comfortable The tube station was only a 2min walk I would use this hotel again staff at the reception area were very friendly on arriving we were given a cookie each

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We were with parents and the location was key Staff were friendly and it was a lovely touch when our waitress in the sky bar asked what we were celebrating and we pointed out it was my parents 60th wedding anniversary and along came four glasses of champagne on the house Very nice feel about the hotel tucked away off busy roads quiet location lovely views although only from the sky bar Bedrooms were comfortable and bathrooms clean We enjoyed our stay and would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The cold water was out the bigger part of the morning making it impossible to shower I decided to have breakfast which took really a long time before the order was taken and the breakfast was served During the evening on the roof top terrace which is excellent btw we were asked around midnight to leave the terrace because they wanted to close Fine not a problem We prepared to leave and took the final sips of our drinks There were still around 50 people on the terrace The so it appeared head of security on the terrace stood 1 metre right next to us and really ushered us off We told him we were on our way maybe he could first tell the other 50 people that the terrace was closing as well He told us we had to leave The way he did that was very aggressive not in a polite manner There was absolutely no need to behave like this We just had 2 drinks there and were going inside In general it appeared that a lot of staff members where either new or very inexperienced  The roof top terrace is absolutely beautiful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The breakfast although plentiful the quality of ingredients was poor for a hotel of this price and status The hot food was cold the bacon was barely cooked and covered in the white gunk of cheap meat sausages were full of gristle and the scrambled eggs resembled rubber

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Food available for room service was pretty basic towels left fluff all over your face volume on the iMac TVs are so low I had to use subtitles But I m clearly being picky I would go back   Good size room good location quiet staff really helpful modern clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room service wasn t great No bottle opened and only one set of cutlery for 2 people Also no chicken curry when only chicken curry and chilli on the menu for hot food on the 24 hour menu   Nice room although a little small but clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Aside from being near Tower Bridge it s quite far from everything else for the tourist   Clean modern hotel with good breakfast The Mac in the room was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: when the fire alarm went off at 6 00 in the morning there was confusion at reception as to weather we could re enter the rooms Being charged 5 00 for tray collection after room service   Breakfast start time superb breakfast Room service was very good Room clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Not worth the money Queen room very small Check in took over half an hour why I ve no idea More business person orientated rather than family friendly hotel IMac televisions have very low volume my elderly grandfather could not hear his television nor work the remote Automatic doors on entry kept jamming and locking people in however berated by staff for touching them to make them move  Good location Free Wifi Breakfast nice and staff working in the breakfast area very lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Did nt like breakfast very much The rashers hard and burnt The scrambled egg looked like porridge The toast took ages so breakfast was cold Sausages hard and looked raw   hotel in great location staff very friendly room very comfortable rooftop bar excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: over priced drinks come on 7 for a small bottle of beer I would expect free nibbles at the bar for this price but none offered   location comfort of beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Perfect location to Tower of London and London Bridge Beautiful views from roof terrace bar great selection of food at breakfast helpful and friendly staff I could go on

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The bed was too soft the Wifi did not work in our room the drink prices in the skybar were extortionately high 27 for 2 for cocktails that were not of great quality   The staff were fantastic the executive lounge was superb and the breakfast was amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Still lousy Internet access and lousy service on Internet access Staff was very polite and friendly but not able to do much Ridiculous to be asked to pay for upgrade for internet for doing business level work VPN and then ahve to face difficulty executing the upgrade 6 50 for the charge but cost me 200 00 for the value of my time calling for assistance and waiting for help This makes me decide to use the Apex Hotel next door which does not charge for higher speed Internet and does not present hassles   Location rooftop bar new Natural Kitchen

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room was very basic and the view was terrible despite me asking for a room with a view for my partners birthday Cigarette butts on the windowsill makeup on the back of the Mac and on the towels No information in the rooms   Breakfast was amazing Top bar was lovely also if rather expensive The welcome we got and the little note for my partners birthday was also great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Lack of movie channels documentries was really dissapointing the only reason why i wouldnt return   Pleasant staff across all areas Room was well appointed without being over the top

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The service was extraordinary every member of staff showed the highest level of professionalism The room was amazing and the breakfast in the morning was even better Great job

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Booked 2 rooms Allocated a room designed for disabled persons with seat in shower etc and the room had an unusual musty smell Complained and was told I had reserved a room with diabled facilities which I had not as will be seen from my booking com reference Was allocated another room As a colleague was yet to check to his room I asked reception if his room had been allocated and was told it had not I wanted to make sure he was not given the room I had rejected I was disappointed and surprised after the first evening to discover that reception had allocated him the same room I had rejected He was not happy with the room but had been too polite to complain as it was my booking I am not pleased that I was deceived and can t imagine it was a coincidence that he got the same room I had rejected For that reason I would not trust the front desk staff again   Location to a venue

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Bed was not particularly comfortable TV in room was too small  Room a good size Public areas are good Breakfast was excellent with hot food on a hot plate which is all too rare these days in many hotels Well positioned for business

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I felt I was living it up lovely room and the rooftop bar was fantastic All the staff I came into contact with were charming Really loved it and would love to go back and stay longer Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The shower vent had mold growing The towels left white fluff on everything it was impossible to escape will bring lint brush next time   The location was perfect for my visit The room was quiet comfy and spacious The water pressure and toiletries were the best I d love to stay here again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Everything was perfect   The cookies on arrival the polite willing staff the marvellous view sky lounge well furnished bedroom en suite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Nothing   Warm welcome from staff Spotlessly clean comfortable room which was quiet and relaxing Good facilities in room plus extremely good location Would recommend highly and re book Sky lounge added enjoyment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was chaotic and food poor Cooked breakfast was almost cold and as you ordered eggs separately had to then queue to get it   Location right by tube and bars restaurants near by

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wifi access was free but didn t always stay connected Phone signal not so strong   Great location for tubes and kings cross Loads of places to eat both in the hotel and across at St Katherine s Dock Rooms and communal areas very well presented and to a high standard

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Drinks could be expensive   Great location for sights staff excellent hotel clean but could have done with some decorating in areas Natural kitchen was excellent Overall fantastic stay and would definitely visit again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Room service was not too a good standard Staff and time for delivery excellent Food delivered below average   Everything was perfect staff breakfast etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Having 50 credited from my account for any extras despite paying cash on arrival and paying cash for extras Now I m still waiting for the 50 to be refunded into my account   The hotel was lovely rooftop bar great really comfy bed and breakfast yummy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Breakfast was ok a little cold really I visited the bar on two occasions in the same afternoon and purchased the same thing both times and was charged a 12 5 service charge on the second visit I was served to my table which was literally 5 feet away from the bar and expected to pay this on asking for the charge to be removed i was confronted with a barrage of questions why and a bit of an attitude to be honest which did not impress me at all Missing a bath from my room I knew there was a shower only in the room however after a long day walking round London and on and off the underground I would ve just loved a bath to relax and sooth my aching body Also i thought the lack of information in the room on the hotel its facilities restaurant times etc was not good If i needed to know anything such as where the ice machine was situated i had to ask reception   The hotel was well situated and set out The staff in most were great Rooms were comfortable and plenty of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: 30 charge extra to park car no mention of this at time of booking  Very friendly beautiful hotel smooth check in very helpful Breakfast fantastic but busy xx

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The only thing I didn t like was the fact that the rooftop bar was abit too cramped   The double tree by Hilton is a great place to stay would highly recommend everything is clean and the staff are very professional and the rooftop bar is mind blowing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wifi connection continued to kick me off periodically was not the strongest connection I ve experienced for business travel   Liked the cleanliness and helpful friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Went to see a show then went back to hotel and tried to get food but was told there was only room service Not a great service for a 4 star hotel   Location was great and good views from the roof top bar if you could get in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The rooms should be more inviting they need more pictures on the walls and a less neutral color paint job It felt very cold and un welcoming   Everything except the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wow I travel to the greater London area and London City since 1998 rather frequently Over the years I got used to many run down hotels and staff that could not really care any less This was my first time at this hotel It was more of an accident that I placed reservations here I was most pleasantly surprised Very kind staff at reception and throughout the entire hotel the bath was the most modern and clean bathroom I have seen in London in ages A shower with a water pressure that was surprise not suppressed to a narrow stream This DoubleTree is worth any extra travel time before I sacrifice on service and comfort again and stay at a different hotel I ll be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: I upgraded to have access the executive lounge The canap s were awful the beef skewers were so try and edible I told the hostess and she removed them but were not replaced Only one bottle beer London Pride Very poor selection The room was of poor standard I wish I hadn t upgraded   Comfortable bed and nice view from the sky bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: We love the sky lounge with its panoramic views of London that s why when needing to stay in London with friends we suggested to stay here Unfortunately that evening the sky lounge was full of city workers very drunk so falling over the language we were able to hear was shocking It took us quite a while to find a seat and all of us non smokers realised that those sitting on the terrace were allowed to smoke which kept blowing to our table We moved inside after having enough of this to a quieter spot which was lovely for a while until they all came inside At one point I went to the ladies to find some men in there talking to a lady then they dropped their glass which smashed they laughed and ran out We are no prudes and love a good night out but we were not happy that this behaviour was allowed to happen spoil over people s evenings   Brilliant location great views of London The bedrooms are clean and comfortable and the breakfast was very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: The roof top bar was reg the furniture a little overused and the food was not as good but the drinks were quite good  Very friendly and helpful staff Their chocolate cookie is amazing good drinks Very convenient location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Wifi was very slow but not too much of a problem no room service in room and requested one twice which took a while but we got there eventually food was excellent   Great location next to station and tube Loved the cookies on arrival nice little touch staff friendly rooms clean and comfortable with fridge to keep extra drinks etc roof top bar was absolutely beautiful Ordered room service which was superb Easy and fast check out just what you need at 4 30am

Full_Review: The executive lounge looked like a small room crammed with people with not much going on I would not be tempted to upgrade for a few free drinks   The location of the hotel is excellent right next to Tower Hill tube station The Sky bar is incredible on sunny day and in the evening when all the landmarks are lit up The room is clean and comfortable Great value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: There was an excellent choice at breakfast which was served until 10 30 but if you did go later the cooked food tea coffee tended to be luke warm There was an ice bucket in the room but couldn t find where to get ice for it   Great location quiet at night but just around the corner from tube station The bed was very comfortable Free Wi Fi and great room facilities We were able to leave our luggage after check out until we were ready to travel home which was very helpful Warm cookie on arrival is a great way to welcome guests

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Queen room very poorly Decoratered view from the room was disappointing The carpet was worn along the corridors and in the bedroom Fire alarm woke us up at 545 am and there was no staff helping or showing people how to evacuate Very disappointed as it was a birthday treat   Location was good The staff at the skyline bar were very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: On our last night a letter from reception was pushed under our door asking us to make good the arrears on our account there were none we had prepaid I phoned reception and they said I had taken breakfast which I hadn t They accepted this and said they would sort it out Next day on checking out I found that the imaginary breakfast was still there on our account When we had checked in the receptionist asked if I wished to leave a credit card to cover extras which I declined to do Good job or else the breakfast would have been charged to my account and I may not have noticed I did complain to the front of house manager who apologised and has since emailed with a further apology and explanation of what happened All fine but I would expect such a large organisation to compensate rather than simply apologise in these cases This was our third stay at the Doubletree Tower Bridge and the first time we have had any cause to complain so I wouldn t want to put anyone else off but make sure you double check your bill   Location appointments of room warm cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: room was very small for the price paid weren t very well informed of the facilities we could use by staff and on the last day we tried to get a drink from the sky lounge as we had spare time before our train however we were told it was table service were given a drinks menu after five minutes but ended up waiting 25 minutes and after still no service we had to leave to catch our train Wasn t busy   Everything was nice looking modern executive lounge was good and good views off sky lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Overpowering scent in reception allergy triggering unfortunately   Great location fantastic Sky lounge and we enjoyed the business lounge too Every member of staff we dealt with was helpful polite and smiled a welcome change compared to other hotels Hot cookies on check in a great touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel London Tower of London
Full_Review: Small room  The whole staff breath customer service Everybody was very pleasant and always looking forward to make your life easier I love the welcome cookie that I keep asking almost everytime I pass by the reception The breakfast is good despite how busy the place is service is still excellent I love the executive lounge Nice drinks and nice nibbles for free

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: There was nothing we did not like about this hotel   The staff went above and beyond to make us feel comfortable and welcome They were so accommodating We were on our honeymoon and they welcomed us with a bottle of champagne in our room Also our room was very spacious and clean The amenities were just what we needed Very conveniently located close to some of the best bistros restaurants and a block away from the metro In a safe and good neighborhood A three minute walk to Luxembourg Gardens

Full_Review: Feels a bit mean having to pay extra for certain items at breakfast  Staff could not have been more attentive or welcoming A really calm ambiance in the hotel Lovely shower room

Full_Review: Lovely Hotel the service brilliant Very good location nice comfortable bed quiet room beautiful design we had a great night Breakfast everything is fresh orange juice grapefruit juice bread croissant very delicious Loved every moment at the hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The room was on the smallish side but that was to be expected for a Parisian hotel Also some might find the walls a bit thin there were times in the middle of the night or early morning when we could hear the plumbing from an adjacent room and even the murmur of another television set However it was not too bothersome and again for Paris we expected tight spaces   This hotel was beautiful and the room looked even better in real life than in the photos The room was very nicely appointed and felt luxe for the relatively reasonable price and unbeatable location very short walk to the metro and many restaurants and shops nearby The shower was amazing with very good water pressure and the bed was comfy Would gladly stay here again

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: I ve stayed at Hotel Baume a few times now and this will not be my last It s a great boutique hotel with a friendly staff good WiFi and a convenient location

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: What was called deluxe room actually is a standard type room back side of the building and it s bathroom narrow and uncomfortable The breakfast very poor   The location

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The bathroom is designed only to accommodate a very slim person I had a problem with my door lock and was locked out for over an hour until it was fixed I also had a problem with my safe and it took a very long time to get it opened by the maintenance The breakfast are was nice however the buffet breakfast really not well organized at all There were very few items on the buffet Only bread and croissant juice If you wanted something different you had to ask for it But since there was only one person serving the breakfast area it took a long time to receive whatever you would order Pity for otherwise nice boutique hotel   The hotel is located in a good quiet area of Paris The personnel were very helpful and friendly The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: That I didn t have more time to sit on my terrace and just veg And that Paris was having a really bad heat wave the worst   Everything and especially the staff All were top notch What is left to say

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: It is a nice modern and well maintained hotel with very friendly and helpful staff It is also well located walking distance to main attractions and good restaurants in the surrounding area We enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The room was a little small but I think that is expected in Paris   We had a room with a balcony overlooking the street and Theatre Odeon it was so nice to have that for our stay The reception staff were very friendly and the surrounding streets offer a lot of choices

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: A couple of the staff members struggled to understand English That was on the last 2 days of our stay though not the whole time The price of the alcoholic beverages at the bar 15 euro for a glass of champagne No eggs for breakfast available our last day   Great location and friendly reception staff Nice little boutique hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: It s a very small boutique hotel The room is very small although we didn t lack for anything   Location was fantastic as a base for exploring the city especially the 6th arrondisement The staff was exceptional professional went out of their way to make restaurant recommendations reservations spoke great English Also great shower

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The bed was a little firm for me and a topper on the bed would make it more comfortable for me   The linen was lovely the products were nice the cleaners noticed I didn t use the blanket on the foot of the bed and put it away The staff were very friendly and helpful I didn t eat there so I can t comment on the food however the space was lovely I paid 140 per night and thought it was very good value We love the area and usually stay in the 6th arr when in Paris I found it very convenient for walking and easy for the metro stations

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Not worth the money I lived in Hotel Indigo Paris before I checked in to this hotel I normally love small boutique hotel but this one is not so great Starting from reception I did mention it was my first time in Paris and it is our honeymoon hotel Indigo was so nice to upgrade us a room for free while this hotel was offering an upgrade for a very high price when they are not at a busy season Also when I ordered 2 cups of coffee in the morning 4 euro per cup they tried to charge me another 10 euro for room service fee This is outrageous and crazy I stayed at many five start luxury hotels worldwide before this is the first time someone charged this much for 2 coffee They are also selling their hotel bath robe in the room with a price tag all these things just made me feel that this hotel is very cheap trying to make money in every way possible I will choose other hotels for sure next time I m in Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Absolutely loved the location of the Hotel Gorgeous part of Paris especially if you are willing to explore off the beaten track The hotel is beautiful the room was so well decorated it felt very luxurious Beds were super comfy made it diffficult to get up for sightseeing Staff were so nice really helpful couldn t be more grateful

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Very comfortable bed for two Modern all around Clean Friendly and helpful staff Very close to the Luxembourg Gardens and metro Many restaurants nearby Notre Dame a ten minute walk Great choice We look forward to our next stay

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: I wish there were bell boys to help with the luggage although the staff did help The room service food was not very good Our view was terrible even though we had a junior suite   The staff was excellent and extremely helpful Souffiane at reception went out of his way Great location The boutiques and cafes in the area made our trip very interesting

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff were excellent Very pleasant and helpful They recommended us a lovely restaurant to eat in I was there for 4 nights with my girlfriend The breakfast was really nice The hotel was in a great location Rooms were modern and clean I would recommend this hotel to anyone going to Paris The location is great in a trendy part St Germain with lovey shops bars and restaurants

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: This is a beautiful 1930 s boutique hotel clean and well presented We upgraded to a room with balcony and were not disappointed The bed was very comfortable and there was also a lounge area which made coming home from a full day s sightseeing enjoyable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Loved this hotel but a serious problem was the lack of a plug near a mirror to dry your hair impossible They gave me an extension cord but still very awkward and difficult Also need a full length mirror no way to check your dress or pants I also missed having a small exercise room just one seated cycle elliptical and treadmill would be enough with a space for a yoga mat and foam rollers   Beautiful well arranged room room for desk work relaxing and good view of rooftops from the balcony and room except for the lack of full length mirror and hair dryer with mirror nearby The lobby and breakfast area are also lovely and easy to use welcoming Breakfasts were truly delicious and enjoyable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The room was perfect Very large for Europe Bed and pillows very comfortable Bathroom pristine and awesome showers Nice lobby and sitting areas The location was perfect Close to metro gardens and restaurants but on a quiet side street Easy walk to river and all attractions we mostly walked everywhere Go to Le Hibou cafe just 2 blocks away for pre dinner drinks great sitting outside Lots of good restaurants all around Lastly the staff was excellent Friendly and helpful We would definitely stay here again We visited most of the arrondissements and felt that this location was the best area to stay We did not eat breakfast at the hotel so can t comment on that We stayed 3 nights

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Breakfast could be much better quality Cappuccino insanely awful Bathroom in the deluxe suite is in a corridor And no bath Some reception staff substitutes had absolutely no idea of Paris or their work No assistance with luggage from door to taxi Staff just stood there pretending to be doing something for a tip No mini bar Seriously   Room was large for Paris One particular receptionist was fantastic knowledgeable Breakfast well priced Quality of room outstanding

Full_Review: The bathroom is designed only to accommodate a very slim person I had a problem with my door lock and was locked out for over an hour until it was fixed I also had a problem with my safe and it took a very long time to get it opened by the maintenance The breakfast are was nice however the buffet breakfast really not well organized at all There were very few items on the buffet Only bread and croissant juice If you wanted something different you had to ask for it But since there was only one person serving the breakfast area it took a long time to receive whatever you would order Pity for otherwise nice boutique hotel   The hotel is located in a good quiet area of Paris The personnel were very helpful and friendly The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: That I didn t have more time to sit on my terrace and just veg And that Paris was having a really bad heat wave the worst   Everything and especially the staff All were top notch What is left to say

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: It is a nice modern and well maintained hotel with very friendly and helpful staff It is also well located walking distance to main attractions and good restaurants in the surrounding area We enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The room was a little small but I think that is expected in Paris   We had a room with a balcony overlooking the street and Theatre Odeon it was so nice to have that for our stay The reception staff were very friendly and the surrounding streets offer a lot of choices

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: A couple of the staff members struggled to understand English That was on the last 2 days of our stay though not the whole time The price of the alcoholic beverages at the bar 15 euro for a glass of champagne No eggs for breakfast available our last day   Great location and friendly reception staff Nice little boutique hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: It s a very small boutique hotel The room is very small although we didn t lack for anything   Location was fantastic as a base for exploring the city especially the 6th arrondisement The staff was exceptional professional went out of their way to make restaurant recommendations reservations spoke great English Also great shower

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The bed was a little firm for me and a topper on the bed would make it more comfortable for me   The linen was lovely the products were nice the cleaners noticed I didn t use the blanket on the foot of the bed and put it away The staff were very friendly and helpful I didn t eat there so I can t comment on the food however the space was lovely I paid 140 per night and thought it was very good value We love the area and usually stay in the 6th arr when in Paris I found it very convenient for walking and easy for the metro stations

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Not worth the money I lived in Hotel Indigo Paris before I checked in to this hotel I normally love small boutique hotel but this one is not so great Starting from reception I did mention it was my first time in Paris and it is our honeymoon hotel Indigo was so nice to upgrade us a room for free while this hotel was offering an upgrade for a very high price when they are not at a busy season Also when I ordered 2 cups of coffee in the morning 4 euro per cup they tried to charge me another 10 euro for room service fee This is outrageous and crazy I stayed at many five start luxury hotels worldwide before this is the first time someone charged this much for 2 coffee They are also selling their hotel bath robe in the room with a price tag all these things just made me feel that this hotel is very cheap trying to make money in every way possible I will choose other hotels for sure next time I m in Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Absolutely loved the location of the Hotel Gorgeous part of Paris especially if you are willing to explore off the beaten track The hotel is beautiful the room was so well decorated it felt very luxurious Beds were super comfy made it diffficult to get up for sightseeing Staff were so nice really helpful couldn t be more grateful

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Very comfortable bed for two Modern all around Clean Friendly and helpful staff Very close to the Luxembourg Gardens and metro Many restaurants nearby Notre Dame a ten minute walk Great choice We look forward to our next stay

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: I wish there were bell boys to help with the luggage although the staff did help The room service food was not very good Our view was terrible even though we had a junior suite   The staff was excellent and extremely helpful Souffiane at reception went out of his way Great location The boutiques and cafes in the area made our trip very interesting

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff were excellent Very pleasant and helpful They recommended us a lovely restaurant to eat in I was there for 4 nights with my girlfriend The breakfast was really nice The hotel was in a great location Rooms were modern and clean I would recommend this hotel to anyone going to Paris The location is great in a trendy part St Germain with lovey shops bars and restaurants

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: This is a beautiful 1930 s boutique hotel clean and well presented We upgraded to a room with balcony and were not disappointed The bed was very comfortable and there was also a lounge area which made coming home from a full day s sightseeing enjoyable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Loved this hotel but a serious problem was the lack of a plug near a mirror to dry your hair impossible They gave me an extension cord but still very awkward and difficult Also need a full length mirror no way to check your dress or pants I also missed having a small exercise room just one seated cycle elliptical and treadmill would be enough with a space for a yoga mat and foam rollers   Beautiful well arranged room room for desk work relaxing and good view of rooftops from the balcony and room except for the lack of full length mirror and hair dryer with mirror nearby The lobby and breakfast area are also lovely and easy to use welcoming Breakfasts were truly delicious and enjoyable

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: The room was perfect Very large for Europe Bed and pillows very comfortable Bathroom pristine and awesome showers Nice lobby and sitting areas The location was perfect Close to metro gardens and restaurants but on a quiet side street Easy walk to river and all attractions we mostly walked everywhere Go to Le Hibou cafe just 2 blocks away for pre dinner drinks great sitting outside Lots of good restaurants all around Lastly the staff was excellent Friendly and helpful We would definitely stay here again We visited most of the arrondissements and felt that this location was the best area to stay We did not eat breakfast at the hotel so can t comment on that We stayed 3 nights

Hotel_Name: H tel Baume
Full_Review: Breakfast could be much better quality Cappuccino insanely awful Bathroom in the deluxe suite is in a corridor And no bath Some reception staff substitutes had absolutely no idea of Paris or their work No assistance with luggage from door to taxi Staff just stood there pretending to be doing something for a tip No mini bar Seriously   Room was large for Paris One particular receptionist was fantastic knowledgeable Breakfast well priced Quality of room outstanding

Full_Review: What s not too like   Perfect hotel second time I ve stayed there and once again I have no complaints The location is fantastic as are the staff Definitely recommend to fellow travellers

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: We had a problem with our closet It didn t close and open properly We couldn t reach it easily We called the staff they said they fixed it but it didn t look like In the end of our stay manager told us that they cannot repair it It was annoying all the time we wanted to get out closes from wardrobe In the end my friend didn t take her cosmetics as it was hidden under the doors which we couldn t open  Location In first day lady manager met us She was so nice and tried to help us with everything we asked

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: I don t understand what I have to do to book a room with balcony I will research further   This is my fourth stay at Hotel West End over the last seven years I booked the superior room for five nights I expected to receive a room with a small balcony as I always have but instead I was offered a room on the first floor without a balcony After discussion I switched to a room on the sixth floor the top floor without balcony but lovely quiet and charming I was able to sleep with the windows open because there was so little street noise Everything about the room was comfortable including the bed linens and spacious bathroom with combination tub shower The hotel offers Hermes products as bath amenities The breakfast is ample and delicious I was very pleased that the hotel offered non dairy milk for those of us who are vegan This was the first time I experienced this in my two weeks in France Another great stay in this fabulous hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Eggs was cold and under cooked A C unit in room had to be turned on by front desk and could not be adjusted unless we call the F D to request very inconvenient Also I asked for a bottle of Red wine to be put in the room on arrival since it was my anniversary seems like this was missed but was given a Chocolate Eiffel Tower   bed comfortable clean room balcony view great if you stayed on the 5th floor Staff was friendly Front desk was nice efficient

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: This has nothing to do with the hotel or area it is in Paris has a major refugee problem there on every street or street corner  Lovely location within walking distance of all the tourist areas some nice restaurants nearby but please make a reservation as there are long queues for the popular ones

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Although breakfast was satisfactory it could have been a bit more diverse   This is a great hotel The room was a reasonable size very nicely decorated well kept and clean The bed was so comfortable The bathroom was a generous size There was also a balcony with a view of the Eiffel Tower The staff was friendly and helpful The location is also great central with a lot of shops and restaurants nearby Wifi worked perfectly fine Over all we ve had a lovely stay Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: The man in charge of the breakfast room was an absolute disgrace He refused to clear dirty tables was incredibly rude to everyone There needs to be more breakfast staff we payed over 1 000 euros for 2 nights the service he provided his attitude were unacceptabe   Everything apart from the disgustingly rude breakfast waiter The hotel all other staff were amazing

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Facilities were slightly dated the bathroom was very basic and the plug wasn t working so couldn t use the bath in room   The location was fantastic and the hotel was beautiful breakfast in bed option was also a really nice touch

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Nothing   This was a fabulous hotel excellent staff and atmosphere from the moment you stepped inside so warm and welcoming High end shops and restaurants in every direction 5 min walk to the Eiffel Tower and much more Found it hard to leave

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Even if it provides for a good level of cleaning moquette was really dusty Breakfast a bit basic and sad not in line with the good standard overall   Cosy hotel for a very pleasant staying Silent and comfortable room nice personnel charming lounge excellent location

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Front desk was great Chloe helped procure tickets to the Louvre and Musee d Orsay We had room 103 which was large and beautifully proportioned with magnificent bathroom We had great bistro style dinner at Chez Andre up the block Walking distance to lots of subways and high end clothing stores on Avenue Montaigne

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Our mini bar wasn t restocked after the last occupant and there were tiny details overlooked in the bathroom hair in the bath tub no face washers The room was a little small but it didn t detract from our enjoyment of our stay For the price though I d expect the basics covered   I chose this hotel as I wanted the glamour of the Hotel Plaza Athenee but couldn t afford the 500ish a night they were asking After going into the Plaza during our stay I have to say this is an excellent alternative I would probably choose it over the Plaza after my experience this weekend The location is excellent for a visit to Pairs we were able to walk to the Champs Elyesse very easily and the Eifel Tower is a stone through away It has excellent transport links to other areas of Paris While the Plaza asks for hundreds of pounds a night for a view of the tower we got ours for less than half of that for 493 for two nights The photo attached is the view from our room on the 6th floor mind you I had to lean a little awkwardly out the window to get it What I liked about this hotel was the friendly and intimate feel much unlike the Plaza which felt like a place you d go to be seen The lobby and reception were well decorated and the staff are warm and accommodating They have an honesty system in the front room for drinks which was a nice touch Around the corner at the Plaza they are asking 16 for a bottle of Bud The rooms while small are comfortable and the is minimal noise at night time despite the central location The breakfast was included which was an unexpected surprise they will deliver the continental breakfast to your room for free if you pre order the night before All in all I was very glad I chose this hotel and felt that it was good value for money I would definitely choose this hotel again

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Hotel needs updating Room was supposed to be superior but was small Terrace faced an abandoned building on Main Street If you are looking for luxury this is not your hotel Toilet was not working properly Carpeting needs to be cleaned Shower water pressure low Not enough info given at check in For example the light switches phone in room to call desk Not enough towels and soap bathroom tile around toilet didn t look clean We did however like the location   Location

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: The staff were friendly and helpful especially Daniel The hotel is super clean and the bed comfortable Seeing the eiffel tower from the rooms are a bonus The breakfast was very nice and fresh too

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: One room was two hours late with check in they had had a very busy week with lots of people leaving on the day of our arrival but we had been traveling since three in the morning so the room not being ready was very annoying   Hotel was lovely air conditioning was great view from room was lovely as in the picture Breakfast was good plenty to choose from and excellent time scale from breakfast on the weekend 7am to 12 noon which was brilliant Staff were lovely and helpful and very friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Our only complaint is the size of the breakfast room Way too small given the size of the hotel Yet breakfast quality was very good  A very well located comfortable hotel Large room and very clean and well maintained Excellent location very close to Champs Elysesee Would definitely stay again Breakfast was no additional charge

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Considering we paid 500 aud per night for a deluxe room we were expecting a bigger room It was quite small They also had no tea and coffe in the room The staff did bring it up but again for the money you expect more When booking we asked for an effiel tower view they wrote back and said we will see but cant guarantee When we got there they didnt mention it We asked and they said there is availability but not for the solid 6 nights Call me crazy could they not havemoved peoples bookings around before got there Pretty disappointed   The location was fabulous

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: The breakfast room service was fabulous and was available up to 10 30am maybe later I forget If you are looking for a location quality hotel for a great price this hotel is the answer In addition the staff was always ready to help in any way possible even when we were checking out When we return to Paris we will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: The room was entirely pleasant but rather basic and personality free Shower head was a bit low There were no face washers in the towel set Minimal electrical outlets No room mirror only bathroom   Excellent breakfast delivered to room No fuss

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: See above pkease  The breakfast room was far too small The waitress was pleasant but too slow The food wasn t stocked up enough we had to keep asking for things

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Nothing at all   Excellent customer service from Daniel who helped us immediately taxi arrived Carlos helping with museum tickets and restaurant advice organising taxis and restaurant bookings Henrique making us very early morning coffee before our departure and running out with beautiful flaky crossaints and pain au chocolat to have breakfast on the run At all times every staff member was very helpful Our room had view Eifel Tower and a balcony which made our stay extra special for our 41st anniversary Quiet neighbourhood close to Champs Elysees and stunning boutiques Comfortable bed and nice big soft towels Easy walk to the Louvre and Musee D Orsay

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: The standard room is very very small and not nice at all As soon as we entered we asked for an upgrade and we moved to a very nice and spacious deluxe room This room is as the pictures big and new with a beautiful bathroom We also didn t like the breakfast you have max 3 options   The location of the hotel is great It is quiet and so Parisian Beautiful

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End

Hotel_Name: Hotel West End
Full_Review: Perfect location Very friendly staff and warm welcome Beautiful room that felt cozy and enabled me to relax with a terrasse wtih a table and chairs and a fabulous view Fluffy bathrobe and soft slippers in room Free WiFi Good choice of good restaurants within walking distance Champs Elysees within only 3 minutes on foot away Cozy lounge with open fire and honours bar for guests Receptionist are very knowledgable and helpful I got a good restaurant recommendation from lady at front desk and I asked for a kettle in the room and was very happy to find that one had been placed in the room Breakfast in the room was just wonderful I was able to order a double espresso I enjoyed my stay immensely and will return to Hotel West End next time I am in Paris

Full_Review: Breakfast room became quite crowded in the morning but staff worked hard to accommodate everyone I would absolutely stay there again Great job to The West End Hotel and staff   Around the corner from the famous Four Seasons Hotel George V Arch de Triumph Champ Elysees Really fabulous location 20 30 minute walk to Eiffel Tower Louvre Also some great restaurants close by Really nice boutique hotel offering a fantastic location lovely rooms and a very nice hotel staff

Full_Review: Terrible terrible service   Terrible service I booked a room with a balcony specifically and paid premium price and once checked in it was not the room that I booked It was not the room that was advertised and they were not helpful at all Extremely disappointed
